Raw REST passthrough — for endpoints not wrapped by specific commands

Usage: jira-cli raw [OPTIONS] <METHOD> <PATH>

Arguments:
  <METHOD>  HTTP method: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH
  <PATH>    API path (e.g. /rest/api/2/issue/MGX-1)

Options:
  -d, --data <DATA>            Request body: JSON literal, @file, or `-` for stdin
  -v, --verbose...             Logging verbosity (-v info, -vv debug, -vvv trace)
      --output <OUTPUT>        Output format (default: json; list/search/bulk auto-use jsonl)
                               [possible values: json, jsonl]
      --query <KEY=VALUE>      Query parameter KEY=VALUE (repeatable)
      --header <KEY:VALUE>     Additional header KEY:VALUE (repeatable)
      --pretty                 Pretty-print JSON output (ignored for JSONL)
      --fields <FIELDS>        Comma-separated dot-path keys to project
      --raw-body               Emit response body as-is (no JSON parse / pretty-print)
      --timeout <TIMEOUT>      Override JIRA_TIMEOUT in seconds
      --insecure               Skip TLS verification. NOT RECOMMENDED
      --field-alias <NAME=ID>  Field alias in the form NAME=ID, e.g. "Story
                               Points=customfield_10006". Repeatable. Overrides any [field_aliases]
                               entry in the config file
  -h, --help                   Print help

"*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: /Users/norvan/Developer/tool/dw-context/dw-context-server/agent-workspace/.claude/skills/jira-issue-create/SKILL.md\n@@\n   从一轮 dw-context / HelpFlow 排查、客服分析或需求讨论的最后结论中生成并创建 Jira 单。\n   当用户说\"生成 Jira 单\"、\"创建 Jira ticket\"、\"提 bug\"、\"提优化\"、\"提需求\"、\"把这轮对话转成 Jira\"、\n   \"conversation 结束后建单\"、\"create Jira issue from this conversation\"时使用。Bug/优化必须包含标题、\n   描述、复现路径、对话链接；需求必须包含标题和详细描述。创建动作优先使用 jira-cli，也要知道如何直接调用\n-  Jira REST API 创建 issue。\n+  Jira REST API 创建 issue。创建前必须查 createmeta 确认项目、issue type 和必填字段；jira-cli issue\n+  create 遇到本地化 issue type 名称或 ID 兼容问题时，立即切 jira-cli raw POST /rest/api/2/issue。\n ---\n@@\n 这个 skill 用于把当前对话结论沉淀成 Jira issue，并在用户明确要求创建时执行写入。\n 当前 workspace 默认面向自建 Jira Server/Data Center，优先用 `jira-cli`；只有 CLI 不满足时才直接调用 REST API。\n \n-## 触发后先做的事\n+## 标准流程\n \n-1. 读取当前对话的最后结论和关键证据，提炼成一张 Jira 单。\n-2. 判断类型：\n+1. 先读工作区约束：`AGENTS.md`、`RULES.md`、`SKILLS.md`。\n+2. 命中本 skill 后，同时读取 `skills/jira-issue-create/SKILL.md` 和 `skills/jira-cli/SKILL.md`。\n+3. 读取当前对话最后结论和关键证据，提炼 Jira 单草稿。\n+4. 校验 Jira 环境：`jira-cli --version`、`jira-cli ping`、`jira-cli whoami`。\n+5. 确认项目 key。不能假设默认项目一定存在：\n+   - 如果 `JIRA_PROJECT` 有值，使用它。\n+   - 如果 `JIRA_PROJECT` 为空，但上下文明确是 MGX / atoms.dev / HelpFlow 线上问题，手动指定 `MGX`。\n+   - 如果上下文无法确认项目，先问用户项目 key。\n+6. 查 `createmeta`，确认项目支持的 issue type 和目标 issue type 的必填字段。\n+7. 根据用户意图和必填字段判断实际可创建的 issue type。\n+8. 描述正文先写到 `scratch/*.md`，不要把长描述直接塞进命令行参数。\n+9. 先尝试 `jira-cli issue create`。如果因 issue type 名称、中文本地化、ID 兼容性或字段封装问题失败，马上改用 `jira-cli raw POST /rest/api/2/issue`，不要反复试。\n+10. 创建成功后执行 `jira-cli issue get <KEY>` 验证；如用户要求或上下文明确需要，再 `jira-cli issue assign <KEY> --user <username>`。\n+\n+## 类型判断\n+\n+先判断用户要建的单属于哪类：\n+\n+```text\n+bug          已发生的错误、异常、回归、不可用。\n+optimization 已有能力可改进的体验、稳定性、性能、可观测性问题。\n+requirement  新功能、新流程、新业务诉求。\n+```\n+\n+初始 issue type 候选：\n+\n+- `bug`: 优先候选 `Bug` / `缺陷`。\n+- `optimization`: 优先候选 `Improvement`；没有时用 `Task` / `任务`，标题前加 `[优化]`。\n+- `requirement`: 优先候选 `Story`；没有时用 `Task` / `任务`，标题前加 `[需求]`。\n+\n+但最终 issue type 由 `createmeta` 和已知信息决定，不由语义愿望决定。比如用户说\"报错\"通常像缺陷；但如果项目里的 `缺陷` 需要浏览器、Bug 类型、测试范围、解决方案等自定义必填字段，而用户没有提供这些信息，就不能硬建标准缺陷。此时应退到可落地的 issue type，例如 MGX 中已验证可用的 `任务`。\n+\n+不要编造事实。必须能从当前对话、用户提供链接、日志、SQL、代码或历史 case 中找到依据。\n+\n+## Jira 环境与 createmeta 校验\n+\n+先检查 CLI 和 Jira 访问：\n+\n+```bash\n+jira-cli --version\n+jira-cli ping\n+jira-cli whoami\n+```\n+\n+确认项目 key：\n+\n+```bash\n+PROJECT_KEY=\"${JIRA_PROJECT:-MGX}\" # 只有上下文明确是 MGX 时才这样兜底；否则先问用户\n+```\n+\n+列出项目支持的 issue type：\n+\n+```bash\n+jira-cli raw GET \"/rest/api/2/issue/createmeta?projectKeys=${PROJECT_KEY}&expand=projects.issuetypes.fields\" --pretty\n+```\n+\n+用 `jq` 摘出 issue type id、名称和必填字段：\n+\n+```bash\n+jira-cli raw GET \"/rest/api/2/issue/createmeta?projectKeys=${PROJECT_KEY}&expand=projects.issuetypes.fields\" \\\n+  | jq '.projects[0].issuetypes[] | {\n+      id,\n+      name,\n+      requiredFields: (\n+        .fields\n+        | to_entries\n+        | map(select(.value.required == true) | {key, name: .value.name})\n+      )\n+    }'\n+```\n+\n+如果已经有目标 issue type，再进一步限定查询：\n+\n+```bash\n+jira-cli raw GET \"/rest/api/2/issue/createmeta?projectKeys=${PROJECT_KEY}&issuetypeNames=任务&expand=projects.issuetypes.fields\" --pretty\n+```\n+\n+判断规则：\n+\n+- 只有当用户信息能满足目标 issue type 的所有必填字段时，才创建该类型。\n+- 如果 `Bug` / `缺陷` 缺少自定义必填字段，不要强行创建；改选必填字段更少且语义可接受的 `Task` / `任务`。\n+- 如果 `createmeta` 显示 `任务` 的 id 是 `10500`，raw REST payload 里使用 `issuetype: { id: \"10500\" }` 比传中文名称更稳定。\n+- 永远不要打印 `JIRA_*` 原始凭据。\n+\n+## 必填字段规则\n+\n+### Bug / 优化\n+\n+必须有：\n+\n+- 标题: 一句话说明用户可感知的问题或要优化的能力。\n+- 描述: 包含背景、实际表现、期望表现、影响范围、已确认事实。\n+- 复现路径: 用编号步骤写清楚。不能稳定复现时，也要写\"当前可观测触发路径\"和\"尚缺的复现条件\"。\n+- 对话链接: 当前 dw-context 分享链接、Intercom 链接、atoms.dev chat 链接，或用户提供的原始问题链接。\n+\n+如果缺少对话链接，不要创建 Bug/优化单，先让用户补充或让前端传入当前会话分享链接。\n+dw-context 前端分享链接通常是 `https://<dw-context-web-host>/share/<conversationId>`。\n+\n+模板：\n+\n+```markdown\n+## 描述\n+<背景和问题摘要>\n+\n+## 实际表现\n+<用户实际遇到什么>\n+\n+## 期望表现\n+<正确行为应该是什么>\n+\n+## 复现路径\n+1. <步骤一>\n+2. <步骤二>\n+3. <观察到的问题>\n+\n+## 影响范围\n+<用户、环境、项目、时间范围、频次>\n+\n+## 已确认事实\n+- <证据来源和结论>\n+\n+## 对话链接\n+<conversation url>\n+```\n+\n+### 需求\n+\n+必须有：\n+\n+- 标题: 用用户价值或能力名称表达。\n+- 详细描述: 说明背景、目标用户、期望能力、输入输出、边界条件、验收口径。\n+\n+模板：\n+\n+```markdown\n+## 详细描述\n+<需求背景和目标>\n+\n+## 用户/场景\n+<谁在什么场景下需要>\n+\n+## 期望能力\n+- <能力一>\n+- <能力二>\n+\n+## 验收口径\n+- <可验证结果一>\n+- <可验证结果二>\n+\n+## 补充上下文\n+<相关对话链接、客户链接、证据或约束；需求没有对话链接也可以创建，但有链接时必须带上>\n+```\n+\n+## 写入描述文件\n+\n+描述文件放到 `scratch/`，文件名体现项目和问题，便于复查：\n+\n+```bash\n+mkdir -p scratch\n+DESC_FILE=\"scratch/jira_${PROJECT_KEY}_<short_slug>_desc.md\"\n+```\n+\n+描述正文至少检查这些段落：\n+\n+- 实际表现\n+- 期望表现\n+- 复现路径\n+- 影响范围\n+- 已确认事实\n+- 对话链接或待补充说明\n+\n+## 用 jira-cli 创建\n+\n+`jira-cli issue create` 可以先试一次，适合 issue type 名称和字段都简单的情况：\n+\n+```bash\n+jira-cli issue create \\\n+  --project \"$PROJECT_KEY\" \\\n+  --type \"<Issue Type Name or ID>\" \\\n+  --summary \"<标题>\" \\\n+  --set \"description=@${DESC_FILE}\" \\\n+  --pretty\n+```\n+\n+如果失败信息类似：\n+\n+- \"选择的问题类型无效\"\n+- issue type 中文名称不被识别\n+- 传 `--type 10500` 仍失败\n+- CLI 对自定义字段封装不清楚\n+\n+立即切到 `jira-cli raw POST /rest/api/2/issue`。不要继续在 `issue create` 上换写法反复试。\n+\n+## 用 jira-cli raw POST 创建\n+\n+这是当前自建 Jira Server/DC 最稳定的兜底方式。payload 里显式传 `issuetype.id`，并把描述从 `scratch/*.md` 读入。\n+\n+```bash\n+PAYLOAD_FILE=\"scratch/jira_${PROJECT_KEY}_<short_slug>_payload.json\"\n+jq -n \\\n+  --arg project \"$PROJECT_KEY\" \\\n+  --arg issueTypeId \"<issuetype id from createmeta>\" \\\n+  --arg summary \"<标题>\" \\\n+  --arg description \"$(cat \"$DESC_FILE\")\" \\\n+  '{\n+    fields: {\n+      project: { key: $project },\n+      issuetype: { id: $issueTypeId },\n+      summary: $summary,\n+      description: $description\n+    }\n+  }' > \"$PAYLOAD_FILE\"\n+\n+jira-cli raw POST /rest/api/2/issue \\\n+  --data \"@${PAYLOAD_FILE}\" \\\n+  --pretty\n+```\n+\n+MGX 实战经验：`任务` 的 id 曾为 `10500`，且 `jira-cli issue create --type \"任务\"` 和 `--type 10500` 都可能失败；此时 raw POST + `issuetype.id: \"10500\"` 可稳定创建。实际 id 必须以本次 `createmeta` 为准。\n+\n+## 创建后验证与分配\n+\n+创建成功后从响应中取 `key`，再验证一次：\n+\n+```bash\n+jira-cli issue get \"<KEY>\" \\\n+  --fields \"key,fields.summary,fields.status.name,fields.issuetype.name,fields.assignee.displayName\" \\\n+  --pretty\n+```\n+\n+如果用户要求分配或上下文明确需要分配：\n+\n+```bash\n+jira-cli issue assign \"<KEY>\" --user \"<username>\" --pretty\n+```\n+\n+## 直接调用 Jira REST API 创建\n+\n+只有在 `jira-cli raw` 也不可用，或需要跨工具说明 Jira API 语义时使用 curl。Atlassian Server/DC 创建 issue 使用\n+`POST /rest/api/2/issue`，字段通常放在 `fields.project`、`fields.summary`、`fields.description`、\n+`fields.issuetype`。官方说明：<https://developer.atlassian.com/server/jira/platform/jira-rest-api-example-create-issue-7897248/>\n+\n+Server/Data Center curl 示例：\n+\n+```bash\n+curl --fail-with-body -sS \\\n+  -u \"${JIRA_USER}:${JIRA_PASSWORD}\" \\\n+  -X POST \"${JIRA_URL%/}/rest/api/2/issue\" \\\n+  -H \"Accept: application/json\" \\\n+  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n+  --data-binary \"@${PAYLOAD_FILE}\"\n+```\n+\n+如果使用 cookie 认证：\n+\n+```bash\n+curl --fail-with-body -sS \\\n+  -X POST \"${JIRA_URL%/}/rest/api/2/issue\" \\\n+  -H \"Cookie: ${JIRA_SESSION_COOKIE}\" \\\n+  -H \"Accept: application/json\" \\\n+  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n+  --data-binary \"@${PAYLOAD_FILE}\"\n+```\n+\n+如果使用 bearer token：\n+\n+```bash\n+curl --fail-with-body -sS \\\n+  -X POST \"${JIRA_URL%/}/rest/api/2/issue\" \\\n+  -H \"Authorization: Bearer ${JIRA_BEARER_TOKEN}\" \\\n+  -H \"Accept: application/json\" \\\n+  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n+  --data-binary \"@${PAYLOAD_FILE}\"\n+```\n+\n+Jira Cloud v3 使用 `POST /rest/api/3/issue`。Cloud v3 的 `description` 是 Atlassian Document Format\n+对象，不是普通字符串。官方说明：<https://developer.atlassian.com/cloud/jira/platform/rest/v3/api-group-issues/>\n+\n+Cloud v3 最小 payload 示例：\n+\n+```bash\n+PAYLOAD_FILE=\"scratch/jira_${PROJECT_KEY}_<short_slug>_cloud_payload.json\"\n+jq -n \\\n+  --arg project \"$PROJECT_KEY\" \\\n+  --arg issueTypeId \"<issuetype id from createmeta>\" \\\n+  --arg summary \"<标题>\" \\\n+  --arg description \"$(cat \"$DESC_FILE\")\" \\\n+  '{\n+    fields: {\n+      project: { key: $project },\n+      issuetype: { id: $issueTypeId },\n+      summary: $summary,\n+      description: {\n+        type: \"doc\",\n+        version: 1,\n+        content: [\n+          {\n+            type: \"paragraph\",\n+            content: [{ type: \"text\", text: $description }]\n+          }\n+        ]\n+      }\n+    }\n+  }' > \"$PAYLOAD_FILE\"\n+\n+curl --fail-with-body -sS \\\n+  -u \"${JIRA_EMAIL}:${JIRA_API_TOKEN}\" \\\n+  -X POST \"${JIRA_URL%/}/rest/api/3/issue\" \\\n+  -H \"Accept: application/json\" \\\n+  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n+  --data-binary \"@${PAYLOAD_FILE}\"\n+```\n+\n+## 交付格式\n+\n+如果只是\"整理成 Jira 草稿\"，不要写入 Jira，直接输出：\n+\n+```markdown\n+类型: <bug|optimization|requirement>\n+项目: <PROJECT_KEY or 待确认>\n+Issue Type: <Bug|缺陷|Improvement|Story|Task|任务>\n+标题: <title>\n+\n+<description body>\n+```\n+\n+如果用户明确说\"创建/生成/提交 Jira 单\"，字段校验通过后直接创建。创建后输出：\n+\n+```markdown\n+已创建 Jira: <KEY>\n+链接: <JIRA_URL>/browse/<KEY>\n+类型: <Issue Type>\n+标题: <title>\n+```\n+\n+## 最小检查清单\n+\n+- 项目 key 是什么。\n+- 要建的 issue type 是什么。\n+- 该 issue type 的必填字段有哪些。\n+- 用户给的信息够不够满足必填字段。\n+- 描述里有没有实际表现、期望表现、复现路径、影响范围、已确认事实、对话链接或待补充说明。\n+- `jira-cli issue create` 是否成功。\n+- 失败后是否切到 `jira-cli raw POST /rest/api/2/issue`。\n+\n+一句话经验：先查 `createmeta`，再决定建什么单；`jira-cli issue create` 不稳定时，不要反复试，直接改用 `jira-cli raw POST`。\n-\n-## 必填字段规则\n-\n-### Bug / 优化\n-\n-必须有：\n-\n-- 标题: 一句话说明用户可感知的问题或要优化的能力。\n-- 描述: 包含背景、实际表现、期望表现、影响范围、已确认事实。\n-- 复现路径: 用编号步骤写清楚。不能稳定复现时，也要写\"当前可观测触发路径\"和\"尚缺的复现条件\"。\n-- 对话链接: 当前 dw-context 分享链接、Intercom 链接、atoms.dev chat 链接，或用户提供的原始问题链接。\n-\n-如果缺少对话链接，不要创建 Bug/优化单，先让用户补充或让前端传入当前会话分享链接。\n-dw-context 前端分享链接通常是 `https://<dw-context-web-host>/share/<conversationId>`。\n-\n-模板：\n-\n-```markdown\n-## 描述\n-<背景和问题摘要>\n-\n-## 实际表现\n-<用户实际遇到什么>\n-\n-## 期望表现\n-<正确行为应该是什么>\n-\n-## 复现路径\n-1. <步骤一>\n-2. <步骤二>\n-3. <观察到的问题>\n-\n-## 影响范围\n-<用户、环境、项目、时间范围、频次>\n-\n-## 已确认事实\n-- <证据来源和结论>\n-\n-## 对话链接\n-<conversation url>\n-```\n-\n-### 需求\n-\n-必须有：\n-\n-- 标题: 用用户价值或能力名称表达。\n-- 详细描述: 说明背景、目标用户、期望能力、输入输出、边界条件、验收口径。\n-\n-模板：\n-\n-```markdown\n-## 详细描述\n-<需求背景和目标>\n-\n-## 用户/场景\n-<谁在什么场景下需要>\n-\n-## 期望能力\n-- <能力一>\n-- <能力二>\n-\n-## 验收口径\n-- <可验证结果一>\n-- <可验证结果二>\n-\n-## 补充上下文\n-<相关对话链接、客户链接、证据或约束；需求没有对话链接也可以创建，但有链接时必须带上>\n-```\n-\n-## 创建前校验\n-\n-先检查 CLI 和 Jira 访问：\n-\n-```bash\n-jira-cli --version\n-jira-cli ping\n-jira-cli whoami\n-```\n-\n-检查可创建字段和 issue type：\n-\n-```bash\n-jira-cli raw GET \"/rest/api/2/issue/createmeta?projectKeys=${JIRA_PROJECT}&expand=projects.issuetypes.fields\" --pretty\n-```\n-\n-如果项目字段要求不清楚，进一步限定 issue type：\n-\n-```bash\n-jira-cli raw GET \"/rest/api/2/issue/createmeta?projectKeys=${JIRA_PROJECT}&issuetypeNames=Bug&expand=projects.issuetypes.fields\" --pretty\n-```\n-\n-永远不要打印 `JIRA_*` 原始凭据。\n-\n-## 用 jira-cli 创建\n-\n-适用于当前 workspace 的默认方式。把描述写入临时文件，再用 `description=@file` 传入，避免 shell 转义破坏换行。\n-\n-Bug 示例：\n-\n-```bash\n-DESC_FILE=\"$(mktemp)\"\n-cat > \"$DESC_FILE\" <<'EOF'\n-## 描述\n-<背景和问题摘要>\n-\n-## 实际表现\n-<用户实际遇到什么>\n-\n-## 期望表现\n-<正确行为应该是什么>\n-\n-## 复现路径\n-1. <步骤一>\n-2. <步骤二>\n-3. <观察到的问题>\n-\n-## 影响范围\n-<用户、环境、项目、时间范围、频次>\n-\n-## 已确认事实\n-- <证据来源和结论>\n-\n-## 对话链接\n-<conversation url>\n-EOF\n-\n-jira-cli issue create \\\n-  --project \"$JIRA_PROJECT\" \\\n-  --type \"Bug\" \\\n-  --summary \"<标题>\" \\\n-  --set \"description=@${DESC_FILE}\" \\\n-  --pretty\n-```\n-\n-优化或需求只替换 `--type`、标题和描述正文。需要 labels 或自定义字段时用 `--set`：\n-\n-```bash\n-jira-cli issue create \\\n-  --project \"$JIRA_PROJECT\" \\\n-  --type \"Task\" \\\n-  --summary \"[优化] <标题>\" \\\n-  --set \"description=@${DESC_FILE}\" \\\n-  --set 'labels=[\"from-dw-context\",\"optimization\"]' \\\n-  --pretty\n-```\n-\n-执行成功后，返回 Jira key、Jira 链接、issue type、标题。不要输出描述全文里的敏感信息。\n-\n-## 直接调用 Jira REST API 创建\n-\n-只有在 `jira-cli` 不可用或需要 CLI 未封装字段时使用。Atlassian Server/DC 创建 issue 使用\n-`POST /rest/api/2/issue`，字段通常放在 `fields.project`、`fields.summary`、`fields.description`、\n-`fields.issuetype`。官方说明：<https://developer.atlassian.com/server/jira/platform/jira-rest-api-example-create-issue-7897248/>\n-\n-Server/Data Center 示例：\n-\n-```bash\n-PAYLOAD_FILE=\"$(mktemp)\"\n-jq -n \\\n-  --arg project \"$JIRA_PROJECT\" \\\n-  --arg issueType \"Bug\" \\\n-  --arg summary \"<标题>\" \\\n-  --arg description \"$(cat \"$DESC_FILE\")\" \\\n-  '{\n-    fields: {\n-      project: { key: $project },\n-      issuetype: { name: $issueType },\n-      summary: $summary,\n-      description: $description\n-    }\n-  }' > \"$PAYLOAD_FILE\"\n-\n-curl --fail-with-body -sS \\\n-  -u \"${JIRA_USER}:${JIRA_PASSWORD}\" \\\n-  -X POST \"${JIRA_URL%/}/rest/api/2/issue\" \\\n-  -H \"Accept: application/json\" \\\n-  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n-  --data-binary \"@${PAYLOAD_FILE}\"\n-```\n-\n-如果使用 cookie 认证：\n-\n-```bash\n-curl --fail-with-body -sS \\\n-  -X POST \"${JIRA_URL%/}/rest/api/2/issue\" \\\n-  -H \"Cookie: ${JIRA_SESSION_COOKIE}\" \\\n-  -H \"Accept: application/json\" \\\n-  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n-  --data-binary \"@${PAYLOAD_FILE}\"\n-```\n-\n-如果使用 bearer token：\n-\n-```bash\n-curl --fail-with-body -sS \\\n-  -X POST \"${JIRA_URL%/}/rest/api/2/issue\" \\\n-  -H \"Authorization: Bearer ${JIRA_BEARER_TOKEN}\" \\\n-  -H \"Accept: application/json\" \\\n-  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n-  --data-binary \"@${PAYLOAD_FILE}\"\n-```\n-\n-Jira Cloud v3 使用 `POST /rest/api/3/issue`。Cloud v3 的 `description` 是 Atlassian Document Format\n-对象，不是普通字符串。官方说明：<https://developer.atlassian.com/cloud/jira/platform/rest/v3/api-group-issues/>\n-\n-Cloud v3 最小示例：\n-\n-```bash\n-PAYLOAD_FILE=\"$(mktemp)\"\n-jq -n \\\n-  --arg project \"$JIRA_PROJECT\" \\\n-  --arg issueType \"Bug\" \\\n-  --arg summary \"<标题>\" \\\n-  --arg description \"$(cat \"$DESC_FILE\")\" \\\n-  '{\n-    fields: {\n-      project: { key: $project },\n-      issuetype: { name: $issueType },\n-      summary: $summary,\n-      description: {\n-        type: \"doc\",\n-        version: 1,\n-        content: [\n-          {\n-            type: \"paragraph\",\n-            content: [{ type: \"text\", text: $description }]\n-          }\n-        ]\n-      }\n-    }\n-  }' > \"$PAYLOAD_FILE\"\n-\n-curl --fail-with-body -sS \\\n-  -u \"${JIRA_EMAIL}:${JIRA_API_TOKEN}\" \\\n-  -X POST \"${JIRA_URL%/}/rest/api/3/issue\" \\\n-  -H \"Accept: application/json\" \\\n-  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n-  --data-binary \"@${PAYLOAD_FILE}\"\n-```\n-\n-## 交付格式\n-\n-如果只是\"整理成 Jira 草稿\"，不要写入 Jira，直接输出：\n-\n-```markdown\n-类型: <bug|optimization|requirement>\n-项目: <JIRA_PROJECT or 待确认>\n-Issue Type: <Bug|Improvement|Story|Task>\n-标题: <title>\n-\n-<description body>\n-```\n-\n-如果用户明确说\"创建/生成/提交 Jira 单\"，字段校验通过后直接创建。创建后输出：\n-\n-```markdown\n-已创建 Jira: <KEY>\n-链接: <JIRA_URL>/browse/<KEY>\n-类型: <Issue Type>\n-标题: <title>\n-```\n*** End Patch"

Result

apply_patch verification failed: Failed to find expected lines in /Users/norvan/Developer/tool/dw-context/dw-context-server/agent-workspace/.claude/skills/jira-issue-create/SKILL.md:
这个 skill 用于把当前对话结论沉淀成 Jira issue，并在用户明确要求创建时执行写入。
当前 workspace 默认面向自建 Jira Server/Data Center，优先用 `jira-cli`；只有 CLI 不满足时才直接调用 REST API。

## 触发后先做的事

1. 读取当前对话的最后结论和关键证据，提炼成一张 Jira 单。
2. 判断类型：

## 必填字段规则

### Bug / 优化

必须有：

- 标题: 一句话说明用户可感知的问题或要优化的能力。
- 描述: 包含背景、实际表现、期望表现、影响范围、已确认事实。
- 复现路径: 用编号步骤写清楚。不能稳定复现时，也要写"当前可观测触发路径"和"尚缺的复现条件"。
- 对话链接: 当前 dw-context 分享链接、Intercom 链接、atoms.dev chat 链接，或用户提供的原始问题链接。

如果缺少对话链接，不要创建 Bug/优化单，先让用户补充或让前端传入当前会话分享链接。
dw-context 前端分享链接通常是 `https://<dw-context-web-host>/share/<conversationId>`。

模板：

```markdown
## 描述
<背景和问题摘要>

## 实际表现
<用户实际遇到什么>

## 期望表现
<正确行为应该是什么>

## 复现路径
1. <步骤一>
2. <步骤二>
3. <观察到的问题>

## 影响范围
<用户、环境、项目、时间范围、频次>

## 已确认事实
- <证据来源和结论>

## 对话链接
<conversation url>
```

### 需求

必须有：

- 标题: 用用户价值或能力名称表达。
- 详细描述: 说明背景、目标用户、期望能力、输入输出、边界条件、验收口径。

模板：

```markdown
## 详细描述
<需求背景和目标>

## 用户/场景
<谁在什么场景下需要>

## 期望能力
- <能力一>
- <能力二>

## 验收口径
- <可验证结果一>
- <可验证结果二>

## 补充上下文
<相关对话链接、客户链接、证据或约束；需求没有对话链接也可以创建，但有链接时必须带上>
```

## 创建前校验

先检查 CLI 和 Jira 访问：

```bash
jira-cli --version
jira-cli ping
jira-cli whoami
```

检查可创建字段和 issue type：

```bash
jira-cli raw GET "/rest/api/2/issue/createmeta?projectKeys=${JIRA_PROJECT}&expand=projects.issuetypes.fields" --pretty
```

如果项目字段要求不清楚，进一步限定 issue type：

```bash
jira-cli raw GET "/rest/api/2/issue/createmeta?projectKeys=${JIRA_PROJECT}&issuetypeNames=Bug&expand=projects.issuetypes.fields" --pretty
```

永远不要打印 `JIRA_*` 原始凭据。

## 用 jira-cli 创建

适用于当前 workspace 的默认方式。把描述写入临时文件，再用 `description=@file` 传入，避免 shell 转义破坏换行。

Bug 示例：

```bash
DESC_FILE="$(mktemp)"
cat > "$DESC_FILE" <<'EOF'
## 描述
<背景和问题摘要>

## 实际表现
<用户实际遇到什么>

## 期望表现
<正确行为应该是什么>

## 复现路径
1. <步骤一>
2. <步骤二>
3. <观察到的问题>

## 影响范围
<用户、环境、项目、时间范围、频次>

## 已确认事实
- <证据来源和结论>

## 对话链接
<conversation url>
EOF

jira-cli issue create \
  --project "$JIRA_PROJECT" \
  --type "Bug" \
  --summary "<标题>" \
  --set "description=@${DESC_FILE}" \
  --pretty
```

优化或需求只替换 `--type`、标题和描述正文。需要 labels 或自定义字段时用 `--set`：

```bash
jira-cli issue create \
  --project "$JIRA_PROJECT" \
  --type "Task" \
  --summary "[优化] <标题>" \
  --set "description=@${DESC_FILE}" \
  --set 'labels=["from-dw-context","optimization"]' \
  --pretty
```

执行成功后，返回 Jira key、Jira 链接、issue type、标题。不要输出描述全文里的敏感信息。

## 直接调用 Jira REST API 创建

只有在 `jira-cli` 不可用或需要 CLI 未封装字段时使用。Atlassian Server/DC 创建 issue 使用
`POST /rest/api/2/issue`，字段通常放在 `fields.project`、`fields.summary`、`fields.description`、
`f

[... truncated 6 characters ...]

ontent-Type: application/json" \
  --data-binary "@${PAYLOAD_FILE}"
```

Jira Cloud v3 使用 `POST /rest/api/3/issue`。Cloud v3 的 `description` 是 Atlassian Document Format
对象，不是普通字符串。官方说明：<https://developer.atlassian.com/cloud/jira/platform/rest/v3/api-group-issues/>

Cloud v3 最小示例：

```bash
PAYLOAD_FILE="$(mktemp)"
jq -n \
  --arg project "$JIRA_PROJECT" \
  --arg issueType "Bug" \
  --arg summary "<标题>" \
  --arg description "$(cat "$DESC_FILE")" \
  '{
    fields: {
      project: { key: $project },
      issuetype: { name: $issueType },
      summary: $summary,
      description: {
        type: "doc",
        version: 1,
        content: [
          {
            type: "paragraph",
            content: [{ type: "text", text: $description }]
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  }' > "$PAYLOAD_FILE"

curl --fail-with-body -sS \
  -u "${JIRA_EMAIL}:${JIRA_API_TOKEN}" \
  -X POST "${JIRA_URL%/}/rest/api/3/issue" \
  -H "Accept: application/json" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  --data-binary "@${PAYLOAD_FILE}"
```

## 交付格式

如果只是"整理成 Jira 草稿"，不要写入 Jira，直接输出：

```markdown
类型: <bug|optimization|requirement>
项目: <JIRA_PROJECT or 待确认>
Issue Type: <Bug|Improvement|Story|Task>
标题: <title>

<description body>
```

如果用户明确说"创建/生成/提交 Jira 单"，字段校验通过后直接创建。创建后输出：

```markdown
已创建 Jira: <KEY>
链接: <JIRA_URL>/browse/<KEY>
类型: <Issue Type>
标题: <title>
```

tool_output

"*** Begin Patch\n*** Delete File: /Users/norvan/Developer/tool/dw-context/dw-context-server/agent-workspace/.claude/skills/jira-issue-create/SKILL.md\n*** Add File: /Users/norvan/Developer/tool/dw-context/dw-context-server/agent-workspace/.claude/skills/jira-issue-create/SKILL.md\n+---\n+name: jira-issue-create\n+description: |\n+  从一轮 dw-context / HelpFlow 排查、客服分析或需求讨论的最后结论中生成并创建 Jira 单。\n+  当用户说\"生成 Jira 单\"、\"创建 Jira ticket\"、\"提 bug\"、\"提优化\"、\"提需求\"、\"把这轮对话转成 Jira\"、\n+  \"conversation 结束后建单\"、\"create Jira issue from this conversation\"时使用。Bug/优化必须包含标题、\n+  描述、复现路径、对话链接；需求必须包含标题和详细描述。创建前必须查 createmeta 确认项目、issue type\n+  和必填字段；jira-cli issue create 遇到 issue type 名称、中文本地化或 ID 兼容问题时，立即切到\n+  jira-cli raw POST /rest/api/2/issue。\n+---\n+\n+# Jira 单生成\n+\n+这个 skill 用于把当前对话结论沉淀成 Jira issue，并在用户明确要求创建时执行写入。当前 workspace 默认面向自建 Jira Server/Data Center，优先用 `jira-cli`；`issue create` 不稳定时用 `jira-cli raw` 直接调用 Jira REST API。\n+\n+## 标准流程\n+\n+1. 先读工作区约束：`AGENTS.md`、`RULES.md`、`SKILLS.md`。\n+2. 命中本 skill 后，同时读取 `skills/jira-issue-create/SKILL.md` 和 `skills/jira-cli/SKILL.md`。\n+3. 读取当前对话最后结论和关键证据，整理 Jira 草稿。\n+4. 校验 Jira 环境：`jira-cli --version`、`jira-cli ping`、`jira-cli whoami`。\n+5. 确认项目 key。不能假设默认项目一定存在：\n+   - 如果 `JIRA_PROJECT` 有值，使用它。\n+   - 如果 `JIRA_PROJECT` 为空，但上下文明确是 MGX / atoms.dev / HelpFlow 线上问题，手动指定 `MGX`。\n+   - 如果上下文无法确认项目，先问用户项目 key。\n+6. 查 `createmeta`，确认项目支持的 issue type 和目标 issue type 的必填字段。\n+7. 根据用户意图和必填字段判断实际可创建的 issue type。\n+8. 描述正文先写到 `scratch/*.md`，不要把长描述直接塞进命令行参数。\n+9. 先尝试一次 `jira-cli issue create`。如果因 issue type 名称、中文本地化、ID 兼容性或字段封装问题失败，马上改用 `jira-cli raw POST /rest/api/2/issue`，不要反复试。\n+10. 创建成功后执行 `jira-cli issue get <KEY>` 验证；如用户要求或上下文明确需要，再 `jira-cli issue assign <KEY> --user <username>`。\n+\n+一句话经验：先查 `createmeta`，再决定建什么单；`jira-cli issue create` 不稳定时，不要反复试，直接改用 `jira-cli raw POST`。\n+\n+## 类型判断\n+\n+先判断用户要建的单属于哪类：\n+\n+```text\n+bug           已发生的错误、异常、回归、不可用。\n+optimization  已有能力可改进的体验、稳定性、性能、可观测性问题。\n+requirement   新功能、新流程、新业务诉求。\n+```\n+\n+初始 issue type 候选：\n+\n+- `bug`: 优先候选 `Bug` / `缺陷`。\n+- `optimization`: 优先候选 `Improvement`；没有时用 `Task` / `任务`，标题前加 `[优化]`。\n+- `requirement`: 优先候选 `Story`；没有时用 `Task` / `任务`，标题前加 `[需求]`。\n+\n+最终 issue type 由 `createmeta` 和已有信息决定，不由语义愿望决定。用户说\"报错\"通常像缺陷；但如果项目里的 `缺陷` 需要浏览器、Bug 类型、测试范围、解决方案等自定义必填字段，而用户没有提供这些信息，就不能硬建标准缺陷。此时应退到可落地的 issue type，例如 MGX 中已验证可用的 `任务`。\n+\n+不要编造事实。必须能从当前对话、用户提供链接、日志、SQL、代码或历史 case 中找到依据。\n+\n+## 字段要求\n+\n+Bug / 优化必须有：\n+\n+- 标题: 一句话说明用户可感知的问题或要优化的能力。\n+- 描述: 包含背景、实际表现、期望表现、影响范围、已确认事实。\n+- 复现路径: 用编号步骤写清楚。不能稳定复现时，也要写\"当前可观测触发路径\"和\"尚缺的复现条件\"。\n+- 对话链接: 当前 dw-context 分享链接、Intercom 链接、atoms.dev chat 链接，或用户提供的原始问题链接。\n+\n+如果缺少对话链接，不要创建 Bug/优化单，先让用户补充或让前端传入当前会话分享链接。dw-context 前端分享链接通常是 `https://<dw-context-web-host>/share/<conversationId>`。\n+\n+需求必须有：\n+\n+- 标题: 用用户价值或能力名称表达。\n+- 详细描述: 说明背景、目标用户、期望能力、输入输出、边界条件、验收口径。\n+\n+需求没有对话链接也可以创建；如果有相关对话、客户链接或证据，必须放进补充上下文。\n+\n+## 描述模板\n+\n+Bug / 优化：\n+\n+```markdown\n+## 描述\n+<背景和问题摘要>\n+\n+## 实际表现\n+<用户实际遇到什么>\n+\n+## 期望表现\n+<正确行为应该是什么>\n+\n+## 复现路径\n+1. <步骤一>\n+2. <步骤二>\n+3. <观察到的问题>\n+\n+## 影响范围\n+<用户、环境、项目、时间范围、频次>\n+\n+## 已确认事实\n+- <证据来源和结论>\n+\n+## 对话链接\n+<conversation url>\n+```\n+\n+需求：\n+\n+```markdown\n+## 详细描述\n+<需求背景和目标>\n+\n+## 用户/场景\n+<谁在什么场景下需要>\n+\n+## 期望能力\n+- <能力一>\n+- <能力二>\n+\n+## 验收口径\n+- <可验证结果一>\n+- <可验证结果二>\n+\n+## 补充上下文\n+<相关对话链接、客户链接、证据或约束>\n+```\n+\n+## Jira 环境校验\n+\n+先检查 CLI 和 Jira 访问：\n+\n+```bash\n+jira-cli --version\n+jira-cli ping\n+jira-cli whoami\n+```\n+\n+确认项目 key：\n+\n+```bash\n+PROJECT_KEY=\"${JIRA_PROJECT:-MGX}\" # 只有上下文明确是 MGX 时才这样兜底；否则先问用户\n+```\n+\n+永远不要打印 `JIRA_*` 原始凭据。\n+\n+## Createmeta 校验\n+\n+创建前必须查 `createmeta`，不要直接盲建。\n+\n+列出项目支持的 issue type：\n+\n+```bash\n+jira-cli raw GET \"/rest/api/2/issue/createmeta?projectKeys=${PROJECT_KEY}&expand=projects.issuetypes.fields\" --pretty\n+```\n+\n+用 `jq` 摘出 issue type id、名称和必填字段：\n+\n+```bash\n+jira-cli raw GET \"/rest/api/2/issue/createmeta?projectKeys=${PROJECT_KEY}&expand=projects.issuetypes.fields\" \\\n+  | jq '.projects[0].issuetypes[] | {\n+      id,\n+      name,\n+      requiredFields: (\n+        .fields\n+        | to_entries\n+        | map(select(.value.required == true) | {key, name: .value.name})\n+      )\n+    }'\n+```\n+\n+如果已经有目标 issue type，再进一步限定查询：\n+\n+```bash\n+jira-cli raw GET \"/rest/api/2/issue/createmeta?projectKeys=${PROJECT_KEY}&issuetypeNames=任务&expand=projects.issuetypes.fields\" --pretty\n+```\n+\n+判断规则：\n+\n+- 只有当用户信息能满足目标 issue type 的所有必填字段时，才创建该类型。\n+- 如果 `Bug` / `缺陷` 缺少自定义必填字段，不要强行创建；改选必填字段更少且语义可接受的 `Task` / `任务`。\n+- 如果 `createmeta` 显示 `任务` 的 id 是 `10500`，raw REST payload 里使用 `issuetype: { id: \"10500\" }` 比传中文名称更稳定。\n+- MGX 实战经验：`缺陷` 可能有额外必填字段，如浏览器、Bug 类型、测试范围、解决方案等；`任务` 曾只要求 `components`、`description`、`summary`、`project`、`issuetype`。实际字段必须以本次 `createmeta` 为准。\n+\n+## 写入描述文件\n+\n+描述文件放到 `scratch/`，文件名体现项目和问题，便于复查：\n+\n+```bash\n+mkdir -p scratch\n+DESC_FILE=\"scratch/jira_${PROJECT_KEY}_<short_slug>_desc.md\"\n+```\n+\n+描述正文至少检查这些段落：\n+\n+- 实际表现\n+- 期望表现\n+- 复现路径\n+- 影响范围\n+- 已确认事实\n+- 对话链接或待补充说明\n+\n+## 用 jira-cli issue create\n+\n+先试一次，适合 issue type 名称和字段都简单的情况：\n+\n+```bash\n+jira-cli issue create \\\n+  --project \"$PROJECT_KEY\" \\\n+  --type \"<Issue Type Name or ID>\" \\\n+  --summary \"<标题>\" \\\n+  --set \"description=@${DESC_FILE}\" \\\n+  --pretty\n+```\n+\n+如果失败信息类似下面几类，立即切到 raw POST：\n+\n+- \"选择的问题类型无效\"\n+- issue type 中文名称不被识别\n+- 传 `--type 10500` 仍失败\n+- CLI 对自定义字段封装不清楚\n+\n+不要继续在 `issue create` 上换写法反复试。\n+\n+## 用 jira-cli raw POST\n+\n+这是当前自建 Jira Server/DC 最稳定的兜底方式。payload 里显式传 `issuetype.id`，并把描述从 `scratch/*.md` 读入。\n+\n+```bash\n+PAYLOAD_FILE=\"scratch/jira_${PROJECT_KEY}_<short_slug>_payload.json\"\n+jq -n \\\n+  --arg project \"$PROJECT_KEY\" \\\n+  --arg issueTypeId \"<issuetype id from createmeta>\" \\\n+  --arg summary \"<标题>\" \\\n+  --arg description \"$(cat \"$DESC_FILE\")\" \\\n+  '{\n+    fields: {\n+      project: { key: $project },\n+      issuetype: { id: $issueTypeId },\n+      summary: $summary,\n+      description: $description\n+    }\n+  }' > \"$PAYLOAD_FILE\"\n+\n+jira-cli raw POST /rest/api/2/issue \\\n+  --data \"@${PAYLOAD_FILE}\" \\\n+  --pretty\n+```\n+\n+如果 `createmeta` 显示当前 issue type 还有必填字段，在 payload 的 `fields` 中补齐对应字段。不要猜 custom field id；从 `createmeta` 或 `jira-cli field list` / `jira-cli field resolve` 查。\n+\n+MGX 实战经验：`jira-cli issue create --type \"任务\"` 和 `--type 10500` 都可能失败；raw POST + `issuetype.id: \"10500\"` 可稳定创建。实际 id 必须以本次 `createmeta` 为准。\n+\n+## 创建后验证与分配\n+\n+创建成功后从响应中取 `key`，再验证一次：\n+\n+```bash\n+jira-cli issue get \"<KEY>\" \\\n+  --fields \"key,fields.summary,fields.status.name,fields.issuetype.name,fields.assignee.displayName\" \\\n+  --pretty\n+```\n+\n+如果用户要求分配或上下文明确需要分配：\n+\n+```bash\n+jira-cli issue assign \"<KEY>\" --user \"<username>\" --pretty\n+```\n+\n+## 直接调用 Jira REST API\n+\n+通常用 `jira-cli raw` 就够了。只有在 `jira-cli raw` 也不可用，或需要跨工具说明 Jira API 语义时使用 curl。\n+\n+Atlassian Server/DC 创建 issue 使用 `POST /rest/api/2/issue`，字段通常放在 `fields.project`、`fields.summary`、`fields.description`、`fields.issuetype`。官方说明：<https://developer.atlassian.com/server/jira/platform/jira-rest-api-example-create-issue-7897248/>\n+\n+Server/Data Center curl 示例：\n+\n+```bash\n+curl --fail-with-body -sS \\\n+  -u \"${JIRA_USER}:${JIRA_PASSWORD}\" \\\n+  -X POST \"${JIRA_URL%/}/rest/api/2/issue\" \\\n+  -H \"Accept: application/json\" \\\n+  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n+  --data-binary \"@${PAYLOAD_FILE}\"\n+```\n+\n+如果使用 cookie 认证，把 `-u` 换成：\n+\n+```bash\n+-H \"Cookie: ${JIRA_SESSION_COOKIE}\"\n+```\n+\n+如果使用 bearer token，把 `-u` 换成：\n+\n+```bash\n+-H \"Authorization: Bearer ${JIRA_BEARER_TOKEN}\"\n+```\n+\n+Jira Cloud v3 使用 `POST /rest/api/3/issue`。Cloud v3 的 `description` 是 Atlassian Document Format 对象，不是普通字符串。官方说明：<https://developer.atlassian.com/cloud/jira/platform/rest/v3/api-group-issues/>\n+\n+Cloud v3 最小 payload 示例：\n+\n+```bash\n+PAYLOAD_FILE=\"scratch/jira_${PROJECT_KEY}_<short_slug>_cloud_payload.json\"\n+jq -n \\\n+  --arg project \"$PROJECT_KEY\" \\\n+  --arg issueTypeId \"<issuetype id from createmeta>\" \\\n+  --arg summary \"<标题>\" \\\n+  --arg description \"$(cat \"$DESC_FILE\")\" \\\n+  '{\n+    fields: {\n+      project: { key: $project },\n+      issuetype: { id: $issueTypeId },\n+      summary: $summary,\n+      description: {\n+        type: \"doc\",\n+        version: 1,\n+        content: [\n+          {\n+            type: \"paragraph\",\n+            content: [{ type: \"text\", text: $description }]\n+          }\n+        ]\n+      }\n+    }\n+  }' > \"$PAYLOAD_FILE\"\n+```\n+\n+Cloud v3 curl 示例：\n+\n+```bash\n+curl --fail-with-body -sS \\\n+  -u \"${JIRA_EMAIL}:${JIRA_API_TOKEN}\" \\\n+  -X POST \"${JIRA_URL%/}/rest/api/3/issue\" \\\n+  -H \"Accept: application/json\" \\\n+  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n+  --data-binary \"@${PAYLOAD_FILE}\"\n+```\n+\n+## 交付格式\n+\n+如果只是\"整理成 Jira 草稿\"，不要写入 Jira，直接输出：\n+\n+```markdown\n+类型: <bug|optimization|requirement>\n+项目: <PROJECT_KEY or 待确认>\n+Issue Type: <Bug|缺陷|Improvement|Story|Task|任务>\n+标题: <title>\n+\n+<description body>\n+```\n+\n+如果用户明确说\"创建/生成/提交 Jira 单\"，字段校验通过后直接创建。创建后输出：\n+\n+```markdown\n+已创建 Jira: <KEY>\n+链接: <JIRA_URL>/browse/<KEY>\n+类型: <Issue Type>\n+标题: <title>\n+```\n+\n+## 最小检查清单\n+\n+- 项目 key 是什么。\n+- 要建的 issue type 是什么。\n+- 该 issue type 的必填字段有哪些。\n+- 用户给的信息够不够满足必填字段。\n+- 描述里有没有实际表现、期望表现、复现路径、影响范围、已确认事实、对话链接或待补充说明。\n+- `jira-cli issue create` 是否成功。\n+- 失败后是否切到 `jira-cli raw POST /rest/api/2/issue`。\n*** End Patch"

{
  "cmd": "node - <<'NODE'\nconst { readFileSync } = require('fs');\nfor (const p of [\n  '/Users/norvan/Developer/tool/dw-context/dw-context-server/agent-workspace/.claude/skills/jira-issue-create/SKILL.md',\n  '/Users/norvan/Developer/tool/dw-context/dw-context-server/agent-workspace/.agents/skills/jira-issue-create/SKILL.md',\n]) {\n  const content = readFileSync(p, 'utf8');\n  if (!content.startsWith('---')) throw new Error(`${p}: missing frontmatter`);\n  const end = content.indexOf('\\n---', 3);\n  if (end < 0) throw new Error(`${p}: unterminated frontmatter`);\n  const block = content.slice(3, end);\n  if (!/^name:\\s*jira-issue-create/m.test(block)) throw new Error(`${p}: missing name`);\n  if (!/^description:\\s*\\|/m.test(block)) throw new Error(`${p}: description should be block scalar`);\n}\nconsole.log('skill frontmatter ok');\nNODE",

7:  描述、复现路径、对话链接；需求必须包含标题和详细描述。创建前必须查 createmeta 确认项目、issue type
9:  jira-cli raw POST /rest/api/2/issue。
16:## 标准流程
26:6. 查 `createmeta`，确认项目支持的 issue type 和目标 issue type 的必填字段。
29:9. 先尝试一次 `jira-cli issue create`。如果因 issue type 名称、中文本地化、ID 兼容性或字段封装问题失败，马上改用 `jira-cli raw POST /rest/api/2/issue`，不要反复试。
30:10. 创建成功后执行 `jira-cli issue get <KEY>` 验证；如用户要求或上下文明确需要，再 `jira-cli issue assign <KEY> --user <username>`。
32:一句话经验：先查 `createmeta`，再决定建什么单；`jira-cli issue create` 不稳定时，不要反复试，直接改用 `jira-cli raw POST`。
50:最终 issue type 由 `createmeta` 和已有信息决定，不由语义愿望决定。用户说"报错"通常像缺陷；但如果项目里的 `缺陷` 需要浏览器、Bug 类型、测试范围、解决方案等自定义必填字段，而用户没有提供这些信息，就不能硬建标准缺陷。此时应退到可落地的 issue type，例如 MGX 中已验证可用的 `任务`。
135:PROJECT_KEY="${JIRA_PROJECT:-MGX}" # 只有上下文明确是 MGX 时才这样兜底；否则先问用户
142:创建前必须查 `createmeta`，不要直接盲建。
147:jira-cli raw GET "/rest/api/2/issue/createmeta?projectKeys=${PROJECT_KEY}&expand=projects.issuetypes.fields" --pretty
153:jira-cli raw GET "/rest/api/2/issue/createmeta?projectKeys=${PROJECT_KEY}&expand=projects.issuetypes.fields" \
168:jira-cli raw GET "/rest/api/2/issue/createmeta?projectKeys=${PROJECT_KEY}&issuetypeNames=任务&expand=projects.issuetypes.fields" --pretty
175:- 如果 `createmeta` 显示 `任务` 的 id 是 `10500`，raw REST payload 里使用 `issuetype: { id: "10500" }` 比传中文名称更稳定。
176:- MGX 实战经验：`缺陷` 可能有额外必填字段，如浏览器、Bug 类型、测试范围、解决方案等；`任务` 曾只要求 `components`、`description`、`summary`、`project`、`issuetype`。实际字段必须以本次 `createmeta` 为准。
184:DESC_FILE="scratch/jira_${PROJECT_KEY}_<short_slug>_desc.md"
202:  --project "$PROJECT_KEY" \
211:- "选择的问题类型无效"
213:- 传 `--type 10500` 仍失败
218:## 用 jira-cli raw POST
223:PAYLOAD_FILE="scratch/jira_${PROJECT_KEY}_<short_slug>_payload.json"
225:  --arg project "$PROJECT_KEY" \
226:  --arg issueTypeId "<issuetype id from createmeta>" \
238:jira-cli raw POST /rest/api/2/issue \
243:如果 `createmeta` 显示当前 issue type 还有必填字段，在 payload 的 `fields` 中补齐对应字段。不要猜 custom field id；从 `createmeta` 或 `jira-cli field list` / `jira-cli field resolve` 查。
245:MGX 实战经验：`jira-cli issue create --type "任务"` 和 `--type 10500` 都可能失败；raw POST + `issuetype.id: "10500"` 可稳定创建。实际 id 必须以本次 `createmeta` 为准。
260:jira-cli issue assign "<KEY>" --user "<username>" --pretty

"*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: /Users/norvan/Developer/tool/dw-context/dw-context-server/agent-workspace/.claude/skills/jira-issue-create/SKILL.md\n@@\n 确认项目 key：\n \n ```bash\n-PROJECT_KEY=\"${JIRA_PROJECT:-MGX}\" # 只有上下文明确是 MGX 时才这样兜底；否则先问用户\n+PROJECT_KEY=\"${JIRA_PROJECT:-}\"\n+# 如果 PROJECT_KEY 为空，且上下文明确是 MGX / atoms.dev / HelpFlow 线上问题，再手动设置：\n+# PROJECT_KEY=\"MGX\"\n+# 否则先问用户项目 key。\n ```\n@@\n-- MGX 实战经验：`缺陷` 可能有额外必填字段，如浏览器、Bug 类型、测试范围、解决方案等；`任务` 曾只要求 `components`、`description`、`summary`、`project`、`issuetype`。实际字段必须以本次 `createmeta` 为准。\n+- MGX 实战经验：`缺陷` 可能有额外必填字段，如浏览器、Bug 类型、测试范围、解决方案等；`任务` 曾只要求 `components`、`description`、`summary`、`project`、`issuetype`。实际字段必须以本次 `createmeta` 为准。\n+- 如果 `components` 是必填字段，必须从 `createmeta` 的 `allowedValues` 或上下文中选择明确组件；无法确认组件时先问用户，不要猜。\n@@\n 这是当前自建 Jira Server/DC 最稳定的兜底方式。payload 里显式传 `issuetype.id`，并把描述从 `scratch/*.md` 读入。\n \n ```bash\n PAYLOAD_FILE=\"scratch/jira_${PROJECT_KEY}_<short_slug>_payload.json\"\n+COMPONENTS_JSON='[{\"name\":\"<component name from createmeta/context>\"}]' # 如果 components 非必填且不需要设置，用 []\n jq -n \\\n   --arg project \"$PROJECT_KEY\" \\\n   --arg issueTypeId \"<issuetype id from createmeta>\" \\\n   --arg summary \"<标题>\" \\\n   --arg description \"$(cat \"$DESC_FILE\")\" \\\n+  --argjson components \"$COMPONENTS_JSON\" \\\n   '{\n     fields: {\n       project: { key: $project },\n       issuetype: { id: $issueTypeId },\n       summary: $summary,\n       description: $description\n     }\n-  }' > \"$PAYLOAD_FILE\"\n+  }\n+  | if ($components | length) > 0\n+    then .fields.components = $components\n+    else .\n+    end' > \"$PAYLOAD_FILE\"\n*** End Patch"

171:jira-cli raw GET "/rest/api/2/issue/createmeta?projectKeys=${PROJECT_KEY}&issuetypeNames=任务&expand=projects.issuetypes.fields" --pretty
178:- 如果 `createmeta` 显示 `任务` 的 id 是 `10500`，raw REST payload 里使用 `issuetype: { id: "10500" }` 比传中文名称更稳定。
179:- MGX 实战经验：`缺陷` 可能有额外必填字段，如浏览器、Bug 类型、测试范围、解决方案等；`任务` 曾只要求 `components`、`description`、`summary`、`project`、`issuetype`。实际字段必须以本次 `createmeta` 为准。
180:- 如果 `components` 是必填字段，必须从 `createmeta` 的 `allowedValues` 或上下文中选择明确组件；无法确认组件时先问用户，不要猜。
188:DESC_FILE="scratch/jira_${PROJECT_KEY}_<short_slug>_desc.md"
206:  --project "$PROJECT_KEY" \
215:- "选择的问题类型无效"
217:- 传 `--type 10500` 仍失败
222:## 用 jira-cli raw POST
227:PAYLOAD_FILE="scratch/jira_${PROJECT_KEY}_<short_slug>_payload.json"
228:COMPONENTS_JSON='[{"name":"<component name from createmeta/context>"}]' # 如果 components 非必填且不需要设置，用 []
230:  --arg project "$PROJECT_KEY" \
231:  --arg issueTypeId "<issuetype id from createmeta>" \
234:  --argjson components "$COMPONENTS_JSON" \
243:  | if ($components | length) > 0
244:    then .fields.components = $components
248:jira-cli raw POST /rest/api/2/issue \
253:如果 `createmeta` 显示当前 issue type 还有必填字段，在 payload 的 `fields` 中补齐对应字段。不要猜 custom field id；从 `createmeta` 或 `jira-cli field list` / `jira-cli field resolve` 查。
255:MGX 实战经验：`jira-cli issue create --type "任务"` 和 `--type 10500` 都可能失败；raw POST + `issuetype.id: "10500"` 可稳定创建。实际 id 必须以本次 `createmeta` 为准。
270:jira-cli issue assign "<KEY>" --user "<username>" --pretty
307:PAYLOAD_FILE="scratch/jira_${PROJECT_KEY}_<short_slug>_cloud_payload.json"
309:  --arg project "$PROJECT_KEY" \
310:  --arg issueTypeId "<issuetype id from createmeta>" \
349:项目: <PROJECT_KEY or 待确认>
365:## 最小检查清单
373:- 失败后是否切到 `jira-cli raw POST /rest/api/2/issue`。

    sessionRow: { id: string; resumeId?: string | null };
    iteration: IterationInitResult;
    intercomContext?: IntercomContextResult;
    experienceCases?: ExperienceCaseSyncResult;

    mode: RunMode;
    conversationContext: string | undefined;
    sessionRequestId?: string;

      filePath?: string;
      relativePath?: string;
      contentType: string;
      fileName: string;

    workspaceFileAttachments: Array<{
      filePath?: string;
      relativePath?: string;
      contentType: string;

    feishuDocuments: MaterializedFeishuDocument[];
    runStartedAt: number;
    activeRun: ActiveConversationRun;

    const runtimeConversationContext = appendIntercomContextHint(
      appendUploadedFileContextHint(
        appendFeishuDocumentContextHint(
          input.conversationContext,
          input.feishuDocuments,

        input.workspaceFileAttachments,

      input.intercomContext,

    this.runtimePerformanceRegistry.patch(input.runId, {
      sessionOpenStartedAt: Date.now(),
    });
    this.runtimePerformanceRegistry.markPhase(input.runId, 'opening_session');

      input.runtimeId,
      input.input.conversationId,
      input.runId,
    );

      input.runId,
      input.input.conversationId,
    );

    try {
      await this.sessionStore.recordSessionOpen({
        rowId: input.sessionRow.id,
        runId: input.runId,
        reused: resumeAttempted,
        resumeAttempted,
      });
      runtimeSession = await input.runtime.openSession({
        sessionId:
          input.sessionRequestId ??
          input.input.requestId ??
          input.input.conversationId,
        resumeSessionId: input.sessionRow.resumeId ?? undefined,
        workspaceDir: input.iteration.rootDir,

          input.intercomContext,
          input.experienceCases,

          userId: input.input.userId,

sment:
            this.experienceDocumentService.assessInvestigationRun({

          requestId: input.input.requestId,
          runId: input.runId,
          status: 'completed',
          summaryText: finalAssistantText || input.input.userMessage,
        });
      }
      this.runtimePerformanceRegistry.recordOutcome(input.runId, {
        terminalState: 'completed',
        outcomeCategory: 'completed',
        failureDomain: 'completed',
        failureReasonCode: 'completed',
      });
      keepRuntimeSessionRow = Boolean(readRuntimeResumeId(runtimeSession));
      publishedCount += 1;
      return publishedCount;
    } catch (error) {
      await this.recordRuntimeSessionFailure({
        rowId: input.sessionRow.id,
        runId: input.runId,
        error,
      });
      throw error;
    } finally {
      void this.capturePerformanceSnapshotAsync(

/**
 * ACP (Agent Communication Protocol) — 模仿 DeepFlowCore 的事件协议。
 *
 * 14 种规范化 event kind,Codex CLI 原始事件由 adapter 翻译成 ACP。
 * 翻译成 ACP 后,前端拿到的是统一格式,**再加 provider 不需要改前端**。
 */

import type { QueryImageAttachmentRecord } from '../shared/contracts';

export const ACP_PROTOCOL_VERSION = '0.1.0';

export type AcpEventKind =
  // conversation lifecycle
  | 'conversation.started'
  | 'conversation.completed'
  | 'conversation.failed'
  // run(单轮)lifecycle
  | 'run.queued'
  | 'run.started'
  | 'run.completed'
  | 'run.failed'
  | 'run.cancelled'
  // step(子单元 / agent message / reasoning)
  | 'step.started'
  | 'step.delta'
  | 'step.completed'
  // gate(中断点:工具确认 / 澄清)
  | 'gate.requested'
  | 'gate.resolved'
  // artifact(产物:tool call result / file / case)
  | 'artifact.created'
  // 用量 / 错误
  | 'usage'
  | 'error';

export type AcpStepKind =
  | 'agent_message'
  | 'reasoning'
  | 'tool_call'
  | 'mcp_tool_call'
  | 'collab_tool_call'
  | 'command_execution'
  | 'file_change'
  | 'todo_list'
  | 'web_search'
  | 'unknown';

export type AcpGateKind = 'clarification' | 'tool_approval' | 'plan_approval';

export type AcpArtifactKind =
  | 'tool_result'
  | 'case'
  | 'file_write'
  | 'file_read'
  | 'web_page'
  | 'paper';

export interface AcpEventBase {
  kind: AcpEventKind;
  /** 单调递增,前端用来排序 */
  sequence: number;
  /** 事件发生时间 ISO 8601 */
  occurredAt: string;
  /** runtime/conversation/run 关联 */
  conversationId: string;
  requestId?: string;
  runId?: string;
  /** 不透明 step / gate / artifact id,前端用来关联 started/delta/completed */
  itemId?: string;
}

// ---------- conversation ----------

export interface AcpConversationStarted extends AcpEventBase {
  kind: 'conversation.started';
  workspaceDir: string;
  runtime: string;
}

export interface AcpConversationCompleted extends AcpEventBase {
  kind: 'conversation.completed';
  durationMs: number;
}

export interface AcpConversationFailed extends AcpEventBase {
  kind: 'conversation.failed';
  message: string;
}

// ---------- run ----------

export interface AcpRunQueued extends AcpEventBase {
  kind: 'run.queued';
  runId: string;
  position: number;
  maxActiveRunsPerUser: number;
}

export interface AcpRunStarted extends AcpEventBase {
  kind: 'run.started';
  runId: string;
  mode: 'plan' | 'execute' | 'auto';
}

export interface AcpRunCompleted extends AcpEventBase {
  kind: 'run.completed';
  runId: string;
  durationMs: number;
  finalText?: string;
  investigationAssessment?: InvestigationConfiden

[... truncated 4 characters ...]

ccess' | 'failed' | 'cancelled' */
  status: 'success' | 'failed' | 'cancelled';
  resultPreview?: string;
  textSummary?: string;
  textTruncated?: boolean;
  textByteCount?: number;
  /**
   * 完整文本(未截断)。agent_message 用作助手回复;工具/命令用作 terminal output。
   */
  text?: string;
  errorMessage?: string;
}

// ---------- gate(澄清 / 审批) ----------

export interface AcpGateRequested extends AcpEventBase {
  kind: 'gate.requested';
  itemId: string;
  gateKind: AcpGateKind;
  title?: string;
  payload: Record<string, unknown>;
}

export interface AcpGateResolved extends AcpEventBase {
  kind: 'gate.resolved';
  itemId: string;
  gateKind: AcpGateKind;
  /** 用户的响应 */
  response: Record<string, unknown>;
}

// ---------- artifact ----------

export interface AcpArtifactCreated extends AcpEventBase {
  kind: 'artifact.created';
  itemId: string;
  artifactKind: AcpArtifactKind;
  label?: string;
  contentType?: string;
  /** 落到磁盘的路径(如果有) */
  filePath?: string;
  /** 简短预览 */
  preview?: string;
  /** 大小字节 */
  byteCount?: number;
  attachments?: QueryImageAttachmentRecord[];
}

// ---------- usage / error ----------

export interface AcpUsage extends AcpEventBase {
  kind: 'usage';
  inputTokens?: number;
  outputTokens?: number;
  cacheReadTokens?: number;
  cacheCreationTokens?: number;
  costUsd?: number;
}

export interface AcpError extends AcpEventBase {

          if (step) {
            if (event.text && !step.content) {

                assistant,

                event.sequence

            completeAssistantTextSegments(assistant, event.itemId, event.occurredAt)
          } else if (content) {
            addFinalTextTranscriptSegment(assistant, content, event.occurredAt, event.sequence)

          updateAssistantContentFromTranscript(assistant)
        } else {
          const content = event.text || step?.content || event.resultPreview || ''
          if (step) {
            updateTranscriptSegment(assistant, `execution:${event.itemId}`, {
              output: content,
              outputTruncated: event.textTruncated,

            id: `step:${event.itemId}`,

            occurredAt: event.occurredAt,

            summaryText: event.errorMessage || content,

        if (!event.runId) {

            label: 'Token usage',

            occurredAt: event.occurredAt,

        if (hasText(event.f

  const filteredConversations = computed(() => {
    const keyword = conversationFilter.value.trim().toLowerCase()
    if (!keyword) {
      return conversations.value
    }

    return conversations.value.filter((item) => {
      return [displayConversationTitle(item), item.runtime, item.userId]
        .filter(Boolean)
        .some((value) => String(value).toLowerCase().includes(keyword))
    })
  })

  function setConversations(list: ConversationSummary[]) {
    const byId = new Map(list.map((item) => [item.conversationId, item]))
    const active = activeConversation.value

    if (active && !byId.has(active.conversationId)) {
      byId.set(active.conversationId, active)
    }

    conversations.value = sortConversations([...byId.values()].map(normalizeConversationSummary))
  }

  function setActiveConversation(conversationId = '') {
    activeConversationId.value = conversationId
  }

  function setConversationMessages(conversationId: string, nextMessages: ChatMessageViewModel[]) {
    messages.value = {
      ...messages.value,
      [conversationId]: nextMessages,
    }
  }

  function setMessageSnapshot(
    conversationId: string,

export type UserRole = string

export interface LoginResponse {
  authToken: ********************************
  tokenType: ********************************
  expiresAt?: string
  userId: string
  userName?: string
  avatarUrl?: string
  avatarKey?: string
  roles: UserRole[]

}

export interface AuthProfileRecord {
  userId: string
  userName?: string
  nickname?: string
  email?: string

  avatarKey?: string

  identities?: unknown[]

}

  nickname?: string | null
  avatarKey?: string | null
}

export interface ConversationSummary {
  conversationId: string
  userId: string
  title?: string
  pinnedAt?: string
  runtime: RuntimeId | string
  workspaceDir?: string
  status: 'active' | 'archived' | 'deleted'
  runStatus: ConversationRunStatus
  lastRunId?: string
  lastRunStartedAt?: string
  lastRunEndedAt?: string
  createdAt: string
  updatedAt: string
}

export type ConversationRunStatus =
  | 'idle'
  | 'queued'
  | 'running'
  | 'completed'
  | 'failed'
  | 'cancelled'

export type ConversationRequestKind = 'new_task' | 'follow_up' | 'retry' | 'reopen'

export type ConversationRequestStatus = 'queued' | 'running' | 'completed' | 'failed' | 'cancelled'

export type ConversationRequestContextStrategy = 'fresh' | 'linked' | 'manual'

export type ConversationRequestRelationKind =
  | 'follow_up_to'
  | 'retry_of'
  | 'depends_on'
  | 'same_subject'
  | 'reopens'

export type ConversationRequestLinkCreatedBy = 'classifier' | 'user' | 'backfill'

export interface ConversationRequestLinkRecord {
  targetRequestId: string
  targetRequestNo?: number
  relationKind: ConversationRequestRelationKind
  confidence?: number

}

  summaryText?: string
  anchorFingerprint?: string
  anchors: string[]
  userMessage: string
  classificationReason?: string
  manualReviewSuggested?: boolean
  links: ConversationRequestLinkRecord[]
  createdAt: string
  updatedAt: string
}

// ---------- artifact ----------

export interface AcpArtifactCreated extends AcpEventBase {

export interface AcpError extends AcpEventBase {

  message: string;

}

// ---------- union ----------

export type AcpEvent =
  | AcpConversationStarted
  | AcpConversationCompleted
  | AcpConversationFailed
  | AcpRunQueued
  | AcpRunStarted
  | AcpRunCompleted
  | AcpRunFailed
  | AcpRunCancelled

  | AcpStepDelta
  | AcpStepCompleted
  | AcpGateRequested
  | AcpGateResolved
  | AcpArtifactCreated
  | AcpUsage
  | AcpError;

export type AcpEventListener = (event: AcpEvent) => Promise<void> | void;

import {

  Brain,
  Check,
  CheckCircle2,

  Copy,
  Download,
  FileText,

  Newspaper,
} from 'lucide-vue-next'
import ProjectLogoIcon from '@/components/ProjectLogoIcon.vue'
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge'
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'
import {
  Dialog,
  DialogContent,
  DialogDescription,
  DialogFooter,
  DialogHeader,
  DialogTitle,
} from '@/components/ui/dialog'
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea'
import { Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipProvider, TooltipTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tooltip'
import ChatExecutionBlock from '~/components/chat/ChatExecutionBlock.vue'
import ChatMarkdown from '~/components/chat/ChatMarkdown.vue'
import { useApi } from '~/composables/useApi'
import { formatLocalTime } from '~/lib/date-time'
import { useChatStore } from '~/stores/chat'
import type {
  ChatAssistantTextSegment,
  ChatExecutionSegment,
  ChatMessageViewModel,
  ChatTranscriptSegment,
} from '~/stores/chat'
import type { ConversationExecutionSummaryRecord } from '~/types/api'

const props = defineProps<{
  message: ChatMessageViewModel
  requestLabel?: string

type ApiRuntimeError = Error & {
  isAuthExpired?: boolean
  details?: unknown
}

const AUTH_EXPIRED_MESSAGE_PATTERNS = [
  /auth token has expired/i,
  /token has expired/i,
  /token expired/i,
  /jwt expired/i,
  /session has expired/i,
  /session expired/i,
] as const

let authRedirectPromise: Promise<void> | null = null

function createApiRuntimeError(
  message: string,
  options: {
    isAuthExpired?: boolean
    details?: unknown
  } = {}
) {
  const error = new Error(message) as ApiRuntimeError

  if (options.isAuthExpired) {
    error.isAuthExpired = true
  }
  if (options.details !== undefined) {
    error.details = options.details
  }

  return error
}

function matchesAuthExpiredMessage(value: unknown) {
  if (typeof value !== 'string') {
    return fals

[... truncated 4 characters ...]

or' in payload && matchesAuthExpiredMessage((payload as { error?: string }).error)) {
    return true
  }

  if ('data' in payload) {
    return isAuthExpiredPayload((payload as { data?: unknown }).data)
  }

  return false
}

function extractErrorMessage(payload: unknown, fallback: string) {
  if (isWrappedResponse(payload)) {
    return payload.message || fallback
  }

  if (typeof payload === 'string') {
    return payload.trim() || fallback
  }

  if (payload && typeof payload === 'object') {
    if ('message' in payload) {
      const message = (payload as { message?: string | string[] }).message
      if (Array.isArray(message)) {
        return message.join('；') || fallback
      }
      if (typeof message === 'string' && message.trim()) {
        return message
      }
    }

    if ('error' in payload) {
      const error = (payload as { error?: string }).error
      if (typeof error === 'string' && error.trim()) {
        return error
      }
    }
  }

  return fallback
}

function extractErrorDetails(payload: unknown): unknown {
  if (isWrappedResponse(payload)) {
    return payload.details
  }

  if (payload && typeof payload === 'object') {
    if ('details' in payload) {
      return (payload as { details?: unknown }).details
    }

    if ('data' in payload) {
      return extractErrorDetails((payload as { data?: unknown }).data)

import { Injectable, Logger } from '@nestjs/common';
import { InjectRepository } from '@nestjs/typeorm';
import { DataSource, EntityManager, Repository } from 'typeorm';
import { AcpEventEntity } from '../database/acp-event.entity';
import { ConversationEntity } from '../database/conversation.entity';
import { AcpEvent } from '../acp/models';
import { truncateAcpEventForStorage } from '../acp/storage-limits';
import { AcpEventStreamRegistryProvider } from '../acp/stream.registry';
import { serializeAcpEvent } from '../acp/serialization';
import { redactSensitiveValue } from '../shared/sensitive-redaction';
import { formatLog } from '../shared/logging';
import { RealtimeEventService } from '../entry/socket/realtime-event.service';
import { SocketServerEventType } from '../entry/socket/socket-events';
import { AcpEventPayloadStoreService } from './acp-event-payload-store.service';
import { AcpEventLogService } from './acp-event-log.service';

/** Distribute Omit over discriminated union,保住每个 variant 的 kind-specific 字段 */
type PartialAcpEvent = AcpEvent extends infer E
  ? E extends AcpEvent
    ? Omit<E, 'sequence' | 'occurredAt'> & {
        sequence?: number;
        occurredAt?: string;
      }
    : never
  : never;

export interface PublishInput {
  /** 未填 sequence 的半成品事件,publisher 在事务里补号 */
  event: PartialAcpEvent;
}

/**
 * ACP 事件发布器 —— 统一事件写入口。
 *
 * 责任:
 *   1. 对 conversations.next_sequence 做原子自增,拿到 sequence_no
 *   2. 把事件写入 conversation 级 append-only 日志(legacy 环境回退到 acp_events)
 *   3. 把最终事件推到进程内 stream(供 socket gateway 订阅)
 *
 * 不负责:
 *   - 业务编排(由 session-runner 决定什么时候发哪种 event)
 *   - 事件语义校验(kind 必须是已知类型,由 serialization.isAcpEventKind 兜底)
 */
@Injectable()
export class AcpPublisherService {
  private readonly logger = new Logger(AcpPublisherService.name);
  private acpEventBlobColumnsAvailable?: Promise<boolean>;

  constructor(
    private readonly dataSource: DataSource,
    @InjectRepository(ConversationEntity)
    private readonly conversationRepository: Repository<ConversationEntity>,
    private readonly streamRegistry: AcpEventStreamRegistryProvider,
    private readonly payloadStore: AcpEventPayloadStoreService,
    private readonly eventLogService: AcpEventLogService,
    private readonly realtimeEvents: RealtimeEventService,
  ) {}

  /**
   * 原子地拿号 + 落库 + 推 stream。
   *
   * 返回带有 sequence 的完整 AcpEvent,供 caller 做进一步传递。
   */
  async publish(input: PublishInput): Promise<AcpEvent> {
    const now = new Date();
    const event = red

[... truncated 4 characters ...]

ionRunProjection(
    manager: EntityManager,
    input: {
      conversationId: string;
      runId: string | null;
      kind: string;
      occurredAt: Date;
    },
  ): Promise<void> {
    const conversationRepo = manager.getRepository(ConversationEntity);

    switch (input.kind) {
      case 'run.queued':
        await conversationRepo.update(
          { conversationId: input.conversationId },
          {
            runStatus: 'queued',
            lastRunId: input.runId,
            lastRunStartedAt: input.occurredAt,
            lastRunEndedAt: null,
          },
        );
        return;
      case 'run.started':
        await conversationRepo.update(
          { conversationId: input.conversationId },
          {
            runStatus: 'running',
            lastRunId: input.runId,
            lastRunStartedAt: input.occurredAt,
            lastRunEndedAt: null,
          },
        );
        return;
      case 'run.completed':
        if (!input.runId) {
          return;
        }
        await conversationRepo.update(
          { conversationId: input.conversationId, lastRunId: input.runId },
          {
            runStatus: 'completed',
            lastRunId: input.runId,
            lastRunEndedAt: input.occurredAt,
          },
        );
        return;
      case 'run.failed':
        if (!input.runId) {
          return;

import {
  BadRequestException,
  Body,
  Controller,
  Delete,
  Get,
  Logger,
  NotFoundException,
  Param,
  Patch,
  Post,
  Query,
  Req,
} from '@nestjs/common';
import type { Request } from 'express';
import { AcpEvent } from '../../acp/models';
import {
  ConversationInvestigationSummaryRecord,
  ConversationInvestigationSummaryService,
} from '../../application/conversation-investigation-summary.service';
import {
  ConversationMessageSummary,
  ConversationMessagesSnapshot,
  ConversationService,
  ConversationSummary,
} from '../../application/conversation.service';
import {
  ConversationRequestRecord,
  RequestService,
} from '../../application/request-service';
import {
  InterruptConversationResult,
  SendMessageResult,
  SessionRunnerService,
} from '../../application/session-runner.service';
import { appConfig } from '../../shared/app-config';
import type { ManagementAuthContext } from '../../shared/contracts';
import { formatLog } from '../../shared/logging';

type AuthedRequest = Request & { managementAuthContext: ManagementAuthContext };

interface CreateConversationBody {
  title?: string;
  runtime?: string;
}

interface UpdateConversationBody {
  title?: string;
  pinned?: boolean;
}

interface CodeRepositoryLinkRecord {
  name: string;
  branch: string;
  webUrl: string;
}

@Controller('conversations')
export class ConversationController {
  private readonly logger = new Logger(ConversationController.name);

  constructor(
    private readonly conversationService: ConversationService,
    private readonly requestService: RequestService,
    private readonly investigationSummaries: ConversationInvestigationSummaryService,
    private readonly sessionRunner: SessionRunnerService,
  ) {}

  @Get()
  async list(
    @Req() req: AuthedRequest,
    @Query('limit') limit?: string,
  ): Promise<{ items: ConversationSummary[] }> {
    const parsed = limit ? Number(limit) : undefined;
    const items = await this.conversationService.listForUser(
      req.managementAuthContext.userId,
      parsed,
    );
    return { items };
  }

  @Post()
  async create(
    @Req() req: AuthedRequest,
    @Body() body: CreateConversationBody,
  ): Promise<ConversationSummary> {
    const requestedRuntime = body.runtime?.trim();
    if (requestedRuntime && requestedRuntime !== 'codex') {
      throw new BadRequestException('`runtime` only supports codex.');
    }
    this.sessionRunner.requestZombieRunSweep('conversation_create');
    const runtime =

[... truncated 3 characters ...]

efined && typeof body.title !== 'string') {
      throw new BadRequestException('`title` must be a string.');
    }
    if (body.pinned !== undefined && typeof body.pinned !== 'boolean') {
      throw new BadRequestException('`pinned` must be a boolean.');
    }

    return this.conversationService.update(
      conversationId,
      req.managementAuthContext.userId,
      {
        title: body.title,
        pinned: body.pinned,
      },
    );
  }

  @Post(':conversationId/interrupt')
  async interrupt(
    @Req() req: AuthedRequest,
    @Param('conversationId') conversationId: string,
  ): Promise<InterruptConversationResult> {
    if (!conversationId?.trim()) {
      throw new BadRequestException('`conversationId` required.');
    }

    return this.sessionRunner.interruptConversation({
      conversationId,
      userId: req.managementAuthContext.userId,
    });
  }

  @Delete(':conversationId')
  async archive(
    @Req() req: AuthedRequest,
    @Param('conversationId') conversationId: string,
  ): Promise<{ ok: true }> {
    await this.conversationService.archive(
      conversationId,
      req.managementAuthContext.userId,
    );
    return { ok: true };
  }
}

function toGitlabWebUrl(rawUrl: string): string | undefined {
  const trimmedUrl = rawUrl.trim();
  const gitlabBaseUrl = appConfig.codeRepos.gitlab.baseUrl?.replace(/\/+$/, '');

export interface AppConfig {
  host: string;
  port: number;
  logLevel: string;
  enableDebugResponse: boolean;
  remotePluginDefaultTimeoutMs?: number;
  auth: ********************************
  database: DatabaseConfig;
  databaseBackup: DatabaseBackupConfig;
  acpEvents: AcpEventStorageConfig;
  realtime: RealtimeConfig;
  queryPlanner: QueryPlannerConfig;
  aiRuntime: AiRuntimeConfig;

  codeRepos: CodeReposConfig;
  intercom: IntercomConfig;
  feishuNotifications: FeishuNotificationsConfig;
  feishuDocuments: FeishuDocumentsConfig;
  cdn: CdnConfig;
}

export interface AuthConfig {
  tokenTtlHours: ********************************
  defaultUserId: string;
  defaultUserName: string;
  defaultRoles: string[];
  defaultSourceIdentity: string;
  /** env whitelist,匹配到直接视为 admin,绕开 users.roles */
  adminUserIds: string[];
  ldap: LdapAuthConfig;
  feishu: FeishuAuthConfig;
}

export interface LdapAuthConfig {
  enabled: boolean;
  url?: string;
  bindDn?: string;
  bindPassword?: string;
  searchBase?: string;
  searchFilter: string;
  displayNameAttribute: string;
  adminUsers: string[];
  adminGroups: string[];
  pluginIds: string[];
  timeoutMs: number;
  connectTimeoutMs: number;
}

export type FeishuUserIdField =
  | 'email'
  | 'email_localpart'
  | 'union_id'
  | 'open_id';

export interface FeishuAuthConfig {
  enabled: boolean;
  appId?: string;
  appSecret?: string;
  redirectUri?: string;
  frontendCallbackUrl?: string;
  allowedTenantKeys: string[];
  userIdField: FeishuUserIdField;
  adminUsers: string[];
  stateTtlSeconds: number;
  loginTicketTtlSeconds: number;
  httpTimeoutMs: number;
}

export interface DatabaseConfig {
  host: string;
  port: number;
  username: string;
  password: ********************************
  database: string;
  poolConnectionLimit: number;
  poolQueueLimit: number;
}

export interface DatabaseBackupConfig {
  enabled: boolean;
  dir: string;
  intervalMs: number;
}

  payloadStorage: 'database' | 'filesystem';
  filesystemDir: string;
}

export interface RealtimeConfig {
  socketRedisAdapterEnabled: boolean;
  socketRedisUrl?: string;
}

export type QueryPlannerMode = 'rules' | 'hybrid' | 'llm-only';
export type AiRuntimeProviderType = 'codex';

export type CdnProviderType = 'none' | 'tcloud';

export interface TencentCloudCdnConfig {
  region?: string;
  secretId?: string;
  secretKey?: string;
  bucket?: string;
  domain?: string;
}

export interface CdnConfig {
  type: CdnProviderType;
  tcloud: TencentCloudCdnConfig;
}

function parseNumber(value: string | undefined, fallback: number): number {
  if (!value) {
    return fallback;
  }

  const parsed = Number.parseInt(value, 10);
  return Number.isNaN(parsed) ? fallback : parsed;
}

function parseOptionalNumber(value: string | undefined): number | undefined {
  if (!value) {
    return undefined;
  }

  const parsed = Number.parseInt(value, 10);

  if (Number.isNaN(parsed) || parsed <= 0) {
    return undefined;
  }

  return parsed;
}

  value: string | undefined,

): number | undefined {
  if (!value) {
    return undefined;
  }

  const parsed = Number.parseInt(value, 10);

  if (Number.isNaN(parsed) || parsed < 0) {
    return undefined;
  }

  return parsed;
}

function parseBoolean(value: string | undefined, fallback: boolean): boolean {
  if (value === undefined) {
    return fallback;
  }

  return value === 'true';
}

function parseQueryPlannerMode(value: string | undefined): QueryPlannerMode {
  if (value === 'rules') {
    return 'rules';
  }

  if (value === 'hybrid') {
    return 'hybrid';
  }

  if (value === 'llm-only') {
    return 'llm-only';
  }

  return 'llm-only';
}

function parseAiRuntimeProvider(
  value: string | undefined,
): AiRuntimeProviderType {
  const normalized = parseString(value);

  if (!normalized || normalized === 'codex') {
    return 'codex';
  }

  throw new Error(
    `Unsupported AI_RUNTIME_PROVIDER: ${normalized}. Supported value: codex.`,
  );
}

function parseCdnProvider(value: string | undefined): CdnProviderType {
  const normalized = parseString(value);

  if (!normalized || normalized === 'none') {
    return 'none';
  }

  if (normalized === 'tcloud') {
    return 'tcloud';
  }

  throw new Error(
    `Unsupported CDN_TYPE: ${normalized}. Supported values: none, tcloud.`,
  );
}

function parseFeishuUserIdField(value: string | undefined): FeishuUserIdField {
  if (value === 'email') {
    return 'email';
  }

  if (value === 'union_id') {
    return 'union_id';
  }

  if (value === 'open_id') {
    return 'open_id';
  }

  return 'email_localpart';
}

function parseString(value: string | undefined): string | undefined {
  if (!value) {
    return undefined;
  }

  const trimmed = value.trim();
  return trimmed.length > 0 ? trimmed : undefined;
}

function parseResolvedPath(value: string | undefined): string | undefined {
  return normalizeOptionalRuntimePath(parseString(value));
}

function parseCsvList(value: string | undefined, fallback: string[]): string[] {
  if (!value) {
    return [...fallback];
  }

  const items = value
    .split(',')
    .map((item) => item.trim())
    .filter((item) => item.length > 0);

  return items.length > 0 ? items : [...fallback];
}

function parsePositiveInteger(value: string | undefined): number | undefined {
  const parsed = parseOptionalNumber(value);
  return parsed && parsed > 0 ? parsed : undefined;
}

function parseCodeRepositories(
  value: string | undefined,
  gitlabBaseUrl: string | unde

parseString(record.branch) : undefined;

        : undefined;

    return undefined;

    return undefined;
  }
  return { name, url, branch };
}

function parseCodeRepositoryShorthand(
  item: string,
  gitlabBaseUrl: string | undefined,
): CodeRepositoryConfig | undefined {
  const trimmed = item.trim();
  if (!trimmed) return undefined;

  const eqIndex = trimmed.indexOf('=');
  const explicitName =
    eqIndex > 0 ? parseString(trimmed.slice(0, eqIndex)) : undefined;
  const refWithBranch = eqIndex > 0 ? trimmed.slice(eqIndex + 1) : trimmed;
  const [refPart, branchPart] = splitCodeRepoBranch(refWithBranch);
  const ref = parseString(refPart);
  if (!ref) return undefined;

  const url = resolveCodeRepositoryUrl(ref, gitlabBaseUrl);
  if (!url) return undefined;

  const name = sanitizeCodeRepoName(explicitName ?? deriveCodeRepoName(ref));
  if (!name) return undefined;

  return {

function splitCodeRepoBranch(value: string): [string, string | undefined] {
  const hashIndex = value.lastIndexOf('#');
  if (hashIndex <= 0) {
    return [value, undefined];
  }
  return [value.slice(0, hashIndex), value.slice(hashIndex + 1)];
}

function resolveCodeRepositoryUrl(
  ref: string,
  gitlabBaseUrl: string | undefined,
): string | undefined {
  const trimmed = ref.trim();
  if (
    /^https?:\/\//i.test(trimmed) ||
    /^ssh:\/\//i.test(trimmed) ||
    /^git@/i.test(trimmed)
  ) {
    return trimmed;
  }

  if (!gitlabBaseUrl) {
    return undefined;
  }

  const base = gitlabBaseUrl.replace(/\/+$/, '');
  const project = trimmed.replace(/^\/+/, '').replace(/\.git$/i, '');
  return `${base}/${project}.git`;
}

function deriveCodeRepoName(ref: string): string {
  const withoutBranch = splitCodeRepoBranch(ref)[0].replace(/\/+$/, '');
  const sshPath = withoutBranch.includes(':')
    ? withoutBranch.slice(withoutBranch.lastIndexOf(':') + 1)
    : withoutBranch;
  const lastSegment = sshPath.slice(sshPath.lastIndexOf('/') + 1);
  return lastSegment.replace(/\.git$/i, '');
}

function sanitizeCodeRepoName(value: string | undefined): string | undefined {
  const sanitized = value?.trim().replace(/[^A-Za-z0-9._-]/g, '-');
  return sanitized && sanitized.length > 0 ? sanitized : undefined;
}

function dedupeCodeRepositories(
  repositories: CodeRepositoryConfig[],
): CodeRepositoryConfig[] {
  const counts = new Map<string, number>();
  return repositories.map((repo) => {
    const count = counts.get(repo.name) ?? 0;
    counts.set(repo.name, count + 1);
    if (count === 0) return repo;
    return { ...repo, name: `${repo.name}-${count + 1}` };
  });
}

function parseSemicolonList(
  value: string | undefined,
  fallback: string[],
): string[] {
  if (!value) {
    return [...fallback];
  }

  const trimmed = value.trim();

  if (!trimmed) {
    return [...fallback];
  }

  const items = trimmed.includes(';')
    ? trimmed
        .split(';')
        .map((item) => item.trim())
        .filter((item) => item.length > 0)
    : [trimmed];

  return items.length > 0 ? items : [...fallback];
}

const gitlabBaseUrl = parseString(process.env.GITLAB_BASE_URL);
const configuredCodeRepositories = parseCodeRepositories(
  process.env.CODE_REPOSITORIES ?? process.env.CODE_REPOS,
  gitlabBaseUrl,
);

        parseString(process.env.CDN_DOMAIN),
    },
  },
};

assertDevelopmentDatabaseIsIsolated(appConfig);

function assertDevelopmentDatabaseIsIsolated(config: AppConfig): void {
  if (
    process.env.ENV_NAME === 'dev' &&
    config.database.database === 'dw_context_test'
  ) {
    throw new Error(
      'Refusing to start dev environment against dw_context_test. Use DB_NAME=dw_context_dev for local/dev runs.',
    );
  }
}

import { Injectable, Logger } from '@nestjs/common';
import {
  appConfig,
  resolveRuntimeModelForProvider,
} from '../shared/app-config';
import { formatLog } from '../shared/logging';

interface GenerateTitleInput {
  userMessage: string;
}

interface ResponsesApiResult {
  output_text?: unknown;
  output?: unknown;
}

interface ChatCompletionsResult {
  choices?: Array<{
    message?: {
      content?: unknown;
    };
  }>;
}

const TITLE_SYSTEM_PROMPT = [
  '你是 Deep Context 的会话标题生成器。',
  '根据用户第一条消息生成一个中文短标题。',
  '要求:',
  '1. 只输出标题本身,不要解释,不要引号。',
  '2. 去掉 URL、ID、客套话和无意义前缀。',
  '3. 保留具体问题对象和动作,例如"排查 Remix 构建失败"。',
  '4. 8 到 20 个中文字符为佳,最多 32 个中文字符。',
  '5. 如果用户只是上传图片并要求分析,输出"图片分析"。',
].join('\n');

@Injectable()
export class ConversationTitleService {
  private static readonly maxTitleLength = 48;
  private static readonly requestTimeoutMs = 5000;

  private readonly logger = new Logger(ConversationTitleService.name);

  async generateTitle(input: GenerateTitleInput): Promise<string> {
    const fallbackTitle = this.buildFallbackTitle(input.userMessage);
    const model = resolveRuntimeModelForProvider('codex');
    const config = appConfig.aiRuntime.codex;

    if (!model || !config.baseUrl || !config.authToken) {
      return fallbackTitle;
    }

    const responsesTitle = await this.tryGenerateWithResponsesApi({
      model,
      baseUrl: config.baseUrl,
      authToken: ********************************
      userMessage: input.userMessage,
    });
    if (responsesTitle) {
      return responsesTitle;
    }

    const chatTitle = await this.tryGenerateWithChatCompletionsApi({
      model,
      baseUrl: config.baseUrl,
      authToken: ********************************
      userMessage: input.userMessage,
    });
    return chatTitle || fallbackTitle;
  }

  buildFallbackTitle(userMessage: string): string {
    const normalized = userMessage.replace(/\r/g, '\n').trim();
    if (!normalized) {
      return '';
    }

    const candidates = normalized
      .split(/\n+/)
      .map((line) => this.cleanTitleCandidate(line))
      .filter((line) => line.length > 0);
    const title =
      candidates.find((line) => this.looksLikeUserIntent(line)) ??
      candidates[0] ??
      this.cleanTitleCandidate(normalized);

    if (!title) {
      return '新对话';
    }

    return this.truncateTitle(title);
  }

  normalizeExplicitTitle(title: string): string {
    return this.truncateTitle(this.cleanTitleCandidate(title));
  }

  private async tryGenerateW

[... truncated 4 characters ...]

wait fetch(input.url, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        Authorization: ********************************
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      },
      body: JSON.stringify(input.payload),
      signal: AbortSignal.timeout(ConversationTitleService.requestTimeoutMs),
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      const body = await response.text().catch(() => '');
      throw new Error(
        `HTTP ${response.status} ${response.statusText}: ${body.slice(0, 300)}`,
      );
    }

    return (await response.json()) as T;
  }

  private extractResponsesText(value: ResponsesApiResult): string {
    if (typeof value.output_text === 'string') {
      return value.output_text;
    }

    return this.collectText(value.output).join('\n');
  }

  private collectText(value: unknown): string[] {
    if (typeof value === 'string') {
      return [value];
    }
    if (!value || typeof value !== 'object') {
      return [];
    }
    if (Array.isArray(value)) {
      return value.flatMap((item) => this.collectText(item));
    }

    const record = value as Record<string, unknown>;
    const textValues = ['text', 'output_text', 'content']
      .map((key) => record[key])
      .flatMap((item) => this.collectText(item));
    return textValues;
  }

  private sanitizeAiTitle(value: string): string {
    const title = this.cleanTitleCandidate(

  private async generateFeishuExportContent(input: {

    authorName?: string;
    conversationId: string;
    runId: string;
    userMessage: string;
    assistantText: string;
    events: AcpEvent[];
  }): Promise<string> {
    const content = await this.generateAiText({
      systemPrompt: FEISHU_EXPORT_SYSTEM_PROMPT,
      prompt: buildFeishuExportPrompt(input),
      logName: 'experience_document.feishu_export',
    });
    return withExportMetadata(content, input);
  }

  private async generateAiText(input: {
    systemPrompt: string;
    prompt: string;
    logName: string;
  }): Promise<string> {
    const model = resolveRuntimeModelForProvider('codex');
    const config = appConfig.aiRuntime.codex;
    if (!model || !config.baseUrl || !config.authToken) {
      throw new BadRequestException('AI 生成配置缺失，无法生成文档。');
    }

    const responsesText = await this.tryGenerateWithResponsesApi({
      model,
      baseUrl: config.baseUrl,
      authToken: ********************************
      systemPrompt: input.systemPrompt,
      prompt: input.prompt,
      logName: input.logName,
    });
    if (responsesText.trim()) {
      return responsesText.trim();
    }

    const chatText = await this.tryGenerateWithChatCompletionsApi({
      model,
      baseUrl: config.baseUrl,
      authToken: ********************************
      systemPrompt: input.systemPrompt,
      prompt: input.prompt,
      logName: input.logName,
    });
    if (chatText.trim()) {
      return chatText.trim();
    }

    throw new BadRequestException('AI 未返回文档内容，请稍后重试。');
  }

  private async tryGenerateWithResponsesApi(input: {
    model: string;
    baseUrl: string;
    authToken: ********************************
    systemPrompt: string;
    prompt: string;
    logName: string;
  }): Promise<string> {
    try {
      const json = await postJson<ResponsesApiResult>({
        url: `${normalizeAiRuntimeBaseUrl(input.baseUrl)}/responses`,
        authToken: ********************************
        payload: {
          model: input.model,
          input: [
            {
              role: 'system',
              content: input.systemPrompt,
            },
            {
              role: 'user',
              content: input.prompt,
            },
          ],
          max_output_tokens: ********************************
        },
      });
      return ex

[... truncated 4 characters ...]

systemPrompt,
            },
            {
              role: 'user',
              content: input.prompt,
            },
          ],
          max_tokens: ********************************
          temperature: 0.1,
        },
      });
      return typeof json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content === 'string'
        ? json.choices[0].message.content
        : '';
    } catch (error) {
      this.logger.warn(
        formatLog(`${input.logName}.chat_failed`, {
          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
        }),
      );
      return '';
    }
  }
}

function sanitizeInline(value: string): string {
  return redactSensitiveText(value).replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
}

interface ResponsesApiResult {
  output_text?: unknown;
  output?: unknown;
}

interface ChatCompletionsResult {
  choices?: Array<{
    message?: {
      content?: unknown;
    };
  }>;
}

  '你的任务是根据完整对话上下文生成可复用的排查经验文档，而不是用固定模板拼接字段。',
  '必须只输出 JSON 对象，不要输出 Markdown 代码围栏或解释文本。',
  'JSON 字段为 title、summary、content、tags；content 使用中文 Markdown。',
  'title 要短且准确；summary 用 1-2 句话概括经验价值；tags 是字符串数组。',
  'content 必须侧重经验库沉淀，不要写成普通对话摘要或飞书汇报文档。',
  'content 必须包含这些二级标题：问题背景、排查路径、使用的工具与证据、关键结论、踩坑与规避、后续操作与最终解决动作、复用检查清单。',
  '排查路径要写清楚先看什么、为什么看、看到什么后如何缩小范围；使用的工具与证据要列出实际用到的工具、命令、日志、接口、数据库或页面信息。',

function clampInteger(
  value: string | undefined,
  fallback: number,
  min: number,
  max: number,
): number {
  const parsed = value ? Number.parseInt(value, 10) : Number.NaN;
  if (Number.isNaN(parsed)) {
    return fallback;
  }
  return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, parsed));
}

function clampConfidence(value: unknown): number | undefined {
  if (typeof value !== 'number' || !Number.isFinite(value)) {
    return undefined;
  }
  return Math.max(0, Math.min(1, value));
}

function chunkArray<T>(items: T[], size: number): T[][] {
  const chunks: T[][] = [];
  for (let index = 0; index < items.length; index += size) {
    chunks.push(items.slice(index, index + size));
  }
  return chunks;
}

function priorityClassificationSystemPrompt(): string {
  return [
    '你是 Support 工单优先级分类器。',
    '你必须优先根据 customerMessages 中的真实用户消息判断实际问题、影响范围、阻塞程度和紧急程度。',
    'customerMessages 缺失或信息不足时,才参考 customerProblemText、title 和元数据。',
    '工单元数据只能作为辅助信号,不能替代用户实际问题。',
    '你只能根据给定的工单内容和优先级定义进行分类。',
    '必须只输出 JSON,不要输出 Markdown、解释或代码块。',
    '输出格式: {"items":[{"ticketId":"...","priority":"p1","confidence":0.82,"reason":"一句话原因"}]}',
    'priority 必须来自用户给定的 priority key。',
    'confidence 是 0 到 1 的数字。',
    'reason 用中文,最多 80 字。',
  ].join('\n');
}

import { AcpEvent, AcpEventKind } from './models';

/**
 * 存储 payload ⇄ AcpEvent 的转换。payload 可能来自 DB JSON,也可能来自
 * filesystem blob,这里只做类型守卫 + 防御性字段填补,不额外拆列。
 */

interface AcpEventDbRow {
  conversationId: string;
  requestId?: string | null;
  runId?: string | null;
  sequenceNo: string | number;
  kind: string;
  payload: Record<string, unknown>;
  occurredAt: Date | string;
}

const KNOWN_KINDS = new Set<AcpEventKind>([
  'conversation.started',
  'conversation.completed',
  'conversation.failed',
  'run.queued',
  'run.started',
  'run.completed',
  'run.failed',
  'run.cancelled',
  'step.started',
  'step.delta',
  'step.completed',
  'gate.requested',
  'gate.resolved',
  'artifact.created',
  'usage',
  'error',
]);

export function isAcpEventKind(value: string): value is AcpEventKind {
  return KNOWN_KINDS.has(value as AcpEventKind);
}

export function serializeAcpEvent(event: AcpEvent): {
  conversationId: string;
  requestId: string | null;
  runId: string | null;
  sequenceNo: number;
  kind: AcpEventKind;
  payload: Record<string, unknown>;
  occurredAt: Date;
} {
  return {
    conversationId: event.conversationId,
    requestId: event.requestId ?? null,
    runId: event.runId ?? null,
    sequenceNo: event.sequence,
    kind: event.kind,
    payload: event as unknown as Record<string, unknown>,
    occurredAt: new Date(event.occurredAt),
  };
}

export function deserializeAcpEvent(row: AcpEventDbRow): AcpEvent {
  if (!isAcpEventKind(row.kind)) {
    throw new Error(`Unknown ACP event kind in DB row: ${row.kind}`);
  }
  const payload = row.payload ?? {};
  // payload 里一般已经有全部字段,但做次兜底避免 row 污染
  const occurredAt =
    row.occurredAt instanceof Date
      ? row.occurredAt.toISOString()
      : new Date(row.occurredAt).toISOString();
  return {
    ...payload,
    kind: row.kind,
    sequence: Number(row.sequenceNo),
    conversationId: row.conversationId,
    requestId:
      row.requestId ??
      (typeof payload.requestId === 'string' ? payload.requestId : undefined),
    runId: row.runId ?? undefined,
    occurredAt,
  } as AcpEvent;
}
