import {
  Column,
  CreateDateColumn,
  Entity,
  Index,
  PrimaryGeneratedColumn,
} from 'typeorm';
import type { AcpEventKind } from '../acp/models';

/**
 * ACP 事件的 append-only 日志。一张表统所有:
 *   conversation lifecycle / run lifecycle / step started/delta/completed /
 *   gate / artifact / usage / error —— 按 (conversation_id, sequence_no) 严格有序。
 *
 * 前端重放 = SELECT * WHERE conversation_id=? ORDER BY sequence_no。
 */
@Entity({ name: 'acp_events' })
@Index('uk_conv_seq', ['conversationId', 'sequenceNo'], { unique: true })
@Index('idx_conv_occurred', ['conversationId', 'occurredAt'])
@Index('idx_acp_events_conv_kind_seq', ['conversationId', 'kind', 'sequenceNo'])
export class AcpEventEntity {
  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn({
    type: 'bigint',
    unsigned: true,
  })
  id!: string;

  @Column({ name: 'conversation_id', type: 'varchar', length: 64 })
  conversationId!: string;

  @Column({ name: 'request_id', type: 'varchar', length: 64, nullable: true })
  requestId?: string | null;

  @Column({ name: 'run_id', type: 'varchar', length: 64, nullable: true })
  runId?: string | null;

  @Column({
    name: 'sequence_no',
    type: 'bigint',
    unsigned: true,
  })
  sequenceNo!: string;

  @Column({ name: 'kind', type: 'varchar', length: 32 })
  kind!: AcpEventKind;

  /** 完整 AcpEvent JSON(含所有 kind-specific 字段) */
  @Column({
    name: 'payload',
    type: 'json',
    nullable: true,
  })
  payload?: Record<string, unknown> | null;

  @Column({
    name: 'payload_blob_uri',
    type: 'varchar',
    length: 512,
    nullable: true,
  })
  payloadBlobUri?: string | null;

  @Column({
    name: 'payload_blob_offset',
    type: 'bigint',
    unsigned: true,
    nullable: true,
  })
  payloadBlobOffset?: string | null;

  @Column({
    name: 'payload_blob_bytes',
    type: 'int',
    unsigned: true,
    nullable: true,
  })
  payloadBlobBytes?: number | null;

  @Column({
    name: 'occurred_at',
    type: 'datetime',
    precision: 6,
  })
  occurredAt!: Date;

  @CreateDateColumn({
    name: 'created_at',
    type: 'datetime',
    precision: 6,
  })
  createdAt!: Date;
}

    return {
      ...segment,

}

function addFinalTextTranscriptSegment(
  message: ChatMessageViewModel,
  content: string,
  occurredAt: string,
  sequenceNo: number
) {
  const normalized = content.trim()
  if (!normalized) {
    return
  }

  const comparableNormalized = comparableText(normalized)
  const existingText = assistantTranscriptText(message)
  if (
    comparableText(existingText) === comparableNormalized ||
    comparableText(message.content) === comparableNormalized
  ) {
    return
  }

  appendTranscriptSegment(message, {
    id: `final:${message.runId || sequenceNo}`,
    type: 'assistant_text',
    sequenceNo,
    content,
    startedAt: occurredAt,
    endedAt: occurredAt,
    pending: false,
  })
}

function upsertProgressStep(progress: ChatProgressStep[], step: ChatProgressStep) {
  const next = [...progress]
  const index = next.findIndex((item) => item.id === step.id)

  if (index === -1) {
    next.push(step)
    return next
  }

  next[index] = {
    ...next[index],
    ...step,
  }
  return next
}

function appendThinkingEvent(
  message: ChatMessageViewModel,
  event: AcpEvent,
  patch: Omit<ChatThinkingEventRecord, 'eventId' | 'sequenceNo' | 'occurredAt' | 'rawEvent'>
) {
  const existing = message.thinkingEvents ?? []
  const eventId = `${event.sequence}:${event.kind}:${event.itemId ?? event.runId ?? 'event'}`

  if (existing.some((item) => item.eventId === eventId)) {
    return
  }

  message.thinkingEvents = [
    ...existing,
    {
      eventId,
      sequenceNo: event.sequence,
      occurredAt: event.occurredAt,
      rawEvent: event,
      ...patch,
    },
  ].sort((left, right) => left.sequenceNo - right.sequenceNo)
}

function applyProgress(message: ChatMessageViewModel, step: ChatProgressStep) {
  message.progress = upsertProgressStep(message.progress ?? [], step)
}

function isUserMessageArtifact(event: AcpArtifactCreated) {
  return event.label === 'user_message'
}

  conversationId: string,

  const messages: ChatMessageViewModel[] = []
  const assistantByRun = new Map<string, ChatMessageViewModel>()
  const steps = new Map<string, ProjectedStepState>()

  const ensureAssistant = (runId: string, occurredAt: string, requestId?: string) => {
    let message = assistantByRun.get(r

import { defineStore } from 'pinia'
import type {
  AcpArtifactCreated,
  AcpEvent,
  AcpStepKind,
  ConversationRunStatus,
  ConversationExecutionSummaryRecord,
  ConversationMessageRecord,
  ConversationSummary,
  InvestigationConfidenceAssessment,
  QueryImageAttachmentRecord,
} from '~/types/api'

export type ChatImageAttachmentViewModel = QueryImageAttachmentRecord & {
  previewUrl?: string
}

export interface ChatThinkingEventRecord {
  eventId: string
  sequenceNo: number
  title: string
  summaryText?: string
  status: 'running' | 'completed' | 'error'
  occurredAt: string
  rawEvent: AcpEvent
}

export interface ChatProgressStep {
  id: string
  label: string
  status: 'running' | 'completed' | 'error'
  detail?: string
  occurredAt?: string
}

export type ChatExecutionStatus = 'running' | 'completed' | 'error' | 'cancelled'

export interface ChatAssistantTextSegment {
  id: string
  type: 'assistant_text'
  sequenceNo: number
  itemId?: string
  content: string
  startedAt: string
  endedAt?: string
  pending?: boolean
}

export interface ChatExecutionSegment {
  id: string
  type: 'execution'
  sequenceNo: number
  conversationId?: string
  stepKind: AcpStepKind
  title: string
  subtitle?: string
  inputLabel?: string
  input?: string
  output?: string
  outputTruncated?: boolean
  outputByteCount?: number
  outputEventSequence?: number
  status: ChatExecutionStatus
  startedAt: string
  endedAt?: string
  durationMs?: number
  errorMessage?: string
}

export type ChatTranscriptSegment = ChatAssistantTextSegment | ChatExecutionSegment

export interface ChatMessageViewModel {
  id: string
  conversationId?: string
  requestId?: string
  runId?: string
  role: 'user' | 'assistant' | 'system'
  content: string
  attachments?: ChatImageAttachmentViewModel[]
  createdAt: string
  runDurationMs?: number
  completedAt?: string
  pending?: boolean
  progress?: ChatProgressStep[]
  thinkingEvents?: ChatThinkingEventRecord[]
  transcript?: ChatTranscriptSegment[]
  executionSummary?: ConversationExecutionSummaryRecord
  experienceAssessment?: InvestigationConfidenceAssessment
  errorMessage?: string
}

interface ProjectedStepState {
  itemId: string
  stepKind: AcpStepKind
  title: string
  subtitle?: string
  content: string
}

function hasText(value: unknown): value is string {
  return typeof value === 'string' && value.trim().length > 0
}

function getConversationOrderTime(item: ConversationSummary) {
  const timestamp = new Date(item.createdAt).getTime()
  return Number.isFinite(timestamp) ? timestamp : 0
}

function getConversationPinnedTime(item: ConversationSummary) {
  const timestamp = item.pinnedAt ? new Date(item.pinnedAt).getTime() : 0
  return Number.isFinite(timestamp) ? timestamp : 0
}

function compareConversations(left: ConversationSummary, right: ConversationSummary) {
  const leftPinnedTime = getConversationPinnedTime(left)
  const rightPinnedTime = getConversationPinnedTime(right)

  if (leftPinnedTime || rightPinnedTime) {
    const pinnedDelta = rightPinnedTime - leftPinnedTime
    if (pinnedDelta !== 0) {

interface UpdateExperienceDocumentInput {

}

interface AiGeneratedExperienceDocument {

@Injectable()
export class ExperienceDocumentService {
  private readonly logger = new Logger(ExperienceDocumentService.name);

  constructor(
    @InjectRepository(ExperienceDocumentEntity)
    private readonly documentRepository: Repository<ExperienceDocumentEntity>,
    @InjectRepository(ConversationEntity)
    private readonly conversationRepository: Repository<ConversationEntity>,
    @InjectRepository(ConversationRunFeishuExportEntity)
    private readonly feishuExportRepository: Repository<ConversationRunFeishuExportEntity>,
    @InjectRepository(ConversationRunPaperEntity)
    private readonly paperRepository: Repository<ConversationRunPaperEntity>,
    private readonly eventLogService: AcpEventLogService,
    private readonly feishuDocumentService: FeishuDocumentService,
    private readonly runtimeManager: RuntimeManager,
    private readonly workspaceBuilder: WorkspaceBuilderService,
    private readonly publisher: AcpPublisherService,
  ) {}

  assessInvestigationRun(
    input: AssessInvestigationRunInput,
  ): InvestigationConfidenceAssessment {
    const userMessage = input.userMessage.trim();
    const assistantText = input.assistantText.trim();
    const combined = `${userMessage}\n${assistantText}`.toLowerCase();
    const signals: string[] = [];
    let score = 35;

    if (isContentSummarizationIntent(userMessage)) {
      return {
        score: 20,
        level: 'low',
        eligibleForExperience: false,
        reason: '用户请求是文档总结/内容整理，不属于问题排查或故障分析。',
        signals: ['非排查类内容任务'],
      };
    }

    if (matchesAny(combined, INVESTIGATION_KEYWORDS)) {
      score += 20;
      signals.push('请求或回复呈现排查/定位问题语义');
    }

    const completedToolEvents = input.events.filter(
      (event) =>
        event.kind === 'step.completed' &&
        event.status === 'success' &&
        event.stepKind !== 'agent_message' &&
        event.stepKind !== 'reasoning',
    );
    if (completedToolEvents.length > 0) {
      score += 18;
      signals.push(`有 ${completedToolEvents.length} 个成功执行步骤作为依据`);
    }

    const failedToolEvents = input.eve

[... truncated 4 characters ...]

e) {
        score -= 6;
        signals.push('部分数据源不可用，但已有替代证据');
      } else {
        score -= 15;
        score = Math.min(score, 45);
        signals.unshift('关键数据源不可用，未取得完整排查证据');
      }
    }

    if (userRequestedLogs && !hasLogEvidenceSamples) {
      score -= 10;
      score = Math.min(score, 45);
      signals.unshift('用户请求接口日志，但最终回复没有给出日志样本');
    }

    if (!assistantText) {
      score -= 30;
      signals.push('缺少最终回复文本');
    }

    const normalizedScore = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, score));
    const level =
      normalizedScore >= 80 ? 'high' : normalizedScore >= 60 ? 'medium' : 'low';
    const reason =
      signals.length > 0
        ? signals.slice(0, 4).join('；')
        : '证据不足，无法形成高可信排查结论';

    return {
      score: normalizedScore,
      level,
      eligibleForExperience: normalizedScore > 80,
      reason,
      signals,
    };
  }

  async list(input: {
    requesterUserId: string;
    query?: string;
    limit?: number;
    sourceConversationId?: string;
    sourceRunId?: string;
  }): Promise<ExperienceDocumentRecord[]> {
    const limit = Math.max(1, Math.min(200, input.limit ?? 100));
    const query = input.query?.trim();
    const qb = this.documentRepository
      .createQueryBuilder('doc')
      .where('doc.status = :status', { status: 'active' })
      .orderBy('doc.updatedAt', 'DESC')
      .take(limit);

  async archive(conversationId: string, userId: string): Promise<void> {
    const row = await this.conversationRepository.findOne({
      where: { conversationId, userId },
    });
    if (!row) {
      throw new NotFoundException(
        `Conversation ${conversationId} not found for user ${userId}.`,
      );
    }
    if (row.runStatus === 'running') {
      throw new BadRequestException(
        'Conversation is running and cannot be deleted.',
      );
    }
    row.status = 'archived';
    await this.conversationRepository.save(row);
  }

  /** 统一读取会话事件流(文件日志优先,兼容旧 acp_events)。 */
  async listEvents(
    conversationId: string,
    options: ListEventsOptions = {},
  ): Promise<AcpEvent[]> {
    const startedAt = performance.now();
    let events: AcpEvent[];
    try {
      events = await this.eventLogService.listConversationEvents(
        conversationId,
        {
          includeLegacy: options.includeLegacy,
        },
      );
    } catch (error) {
      this.logger.error(
        formatLog('conversation.list_events.query_failed', {
          conversationId,
          message: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
          stack: error instanceof Error ? error.stack : undefined,
        }),
      );
      throw error;
    }
    const filteredEvents = options.requestId?.trim()
      ? events.filter((event) => event.requestId === options.requestId)
      : events;
    const queryMs = elapsedMs(startedAt);
    const agentMessageItemIds = new Set<string>();
    const mapStartedAt = performance.now();
    const mappedEvents = filteredEvents.map((event) => {
      if (!options.lightweight) {
        return event;
      }
      if (event.kind === 'step.started' && event.stepKind === 'agent_message') {
        agentMessageItemIds.add(event.itemId);
      }
      return this.toLightweightEvent(event, agentMessageItemIds);
    });
    this.logger.log(
      formatLog('conversation.list_events.completed', {
        conversationId,
        lightweight: options.lightweight ?? false,
        includeLegacy: options.includeLegacy ?? true,
        requestId: options.requestId,
        returnedRows: filteredEvents.length,
        queryMs,
        mapMs: elapsedMs(mapStartedAt),
        durationMs: elapsedMs(startedAt),
      }),
    );
    return mappedEvents;
  }

  async hasPublishedEvents(conversationId: string): Promise<boolean> {
    const row = await this.conversationRepository.findOne({
      where: { conversationId },
      sele

[... truncated 4 characters ...]

Sequence(
      conversationId,
      sequence,
    );
    if (!event) {
      throw new NotFoundException(
        `Conversation event ${conversationId}:${sequence} not found.`,
      );
    }
    if (event.kind !== 'step.completed' || typeof event.text !== 'string') {
      return { sequence, text: '', textByteCount: 0 };
    }

    return {
      sequence,
      text: event.text,
      textByteCount:
        event.textByteCount ?? Buffer.byteLength(event.text, 'utf8'),
    };
  }

  async listMessageSummaries(
    conversationId: string,
    options: Pick<ListEventsOptions, 'includeLegacy' | 'requestId'> = {},
  ): Promise<ConversationMessagesSnapshot> {
    const events = await this.listEvents(conversationId, {
      lightweight: true,
      includeLegacy: options.includeLegacy,
      requestId: options.requestId,
    });

    return {
      messages: projectEventsToMessageSummaries(conversationId, events),
      lastSequence: events.at(-1)?.sequence ?? 0,
    };
  }

  private toLightweightEvent(
    event: AcpEvent,
    agentMessageItemIds: Set<string>,
  ): AcpEvent {
    if (event.kind === 'step.delta' && !agentMessageItemIds.has(event.itemId)) {
      return {
        ...event,
        delta: '',
        contentSoFar: undefined,
      };
    }

    if (
      event.kind !== 'step.completed' ||
      event.stepKind === 'agent_message' ||

  private toSummary(row: ConversationEntity): ConversationSummary {
    return {
      conversationId: row.conversationId,
      userId: row.userId,
      title: row.title?.trim() || undefined,
      pinnedAt: row.pinnedAt?.toISOString(),
      runtime: row.runtime,
      workspaceDir: row.workspaceDir ?? undefined,
      status: row.status,
      runStatus: row.runStatus ?? 'idle',
      lastRunId: row.lastRunId ?? undefined,
      lastRunStartedAt: row.lastRunStartedAt?.toISOString(),
      lastRunEndedAt: row.lastRunEndedAt?.toISOString(),
      createdAt: row.createdAt.toISOString(),
      updatedAt: row.updatedAt.toISOString(),
    };
  }
}

interface ProjectedStepState {
  itemId: string;
  stepKind: AcpStepKind;
  title: string;
  subtitle?: string;
  content: string;
}

interface MutableExecutionSummary extends ConversationExecutionSummary {
  hasRunningStep?: boolean;
}

interface MutableAssistantMessage extends ConversationMessageSummary {
  executionSummary?: MutableExecutionSummary;
}

function isUserMessageArtifact(event: AcpArtifactCreated) {
  return event.label === 'user_message';
}

function hasText(value: unknown): value is string {
  return typeof value === 'string' && value.trim().length > 0;
}

function truncateInlineText(value: string, max = 120) {
  const normalized = value.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
  if (normalized.length <= max) {
    return normalized;
  }

  return `${normalized.slice(0, max - 3)}...`;
}

function stringifyStructuredValue(value: unknown) {
  if (value === undefined || value === null) {
    return '';
  }

  if (typeof value === 'string') {
    return value;
  }

  try {
    return JSON.stringify(value, null, 2);
  } catch {
    return '[unserializable input]';
  }
}

function stepKindLabel(stepKind: AcpStepKind) {
  const labels: Record<AcpStepKind, string> = {
    agent_message: 'Assistant reply',
    reasoning: 'Reasoning',
    tool_call: 'Tool call',
    mcp_tool_call: 'MCP tool',
    collab_tool_call: 'Sub-agent',
    command_execution: 'Command',
    file_change: 'File change',
    todo_list: 'Plan',
    web_search: 'Web search',

[... truncated 4 characters ...]

: match[1],
    toolName: match[2],
    rawName: toolName || '',
  };
}

function formatToolTitle(event: AcpEvent) {
  if (event.kind !== 'step.started') {
    return '';
  }

  if (event.stepKind === 'command_execution') {
    return event.toolName || 'Bash';
  }

  if (event.stepKind === 'todo_list') {
    return event.title || 'Plan';
  }

  if (event.stepKind === 'file_change') {
    return event.title || 'File changes';
  }

  if (event.stepKind === 'reasoning') {
    return event.title || 'Thinking';
  }

  const parsedMcp = parseMcpToolName(event.toolName);
  if (parsedMcp) {
    return `${event.serverId || parsedMcp.serverId}.${parsedMcp.toolName}`;
  }

  if (event.toolName && event.serverId) {
    return `${event.serverId}.${event.toolName}`;
  }

  return (
    event.toolName ||
    event.title ||
    event.command ||
    stepKindLabel(event.stepKind)
  );
}

function formatExecutionSubtitle(event: AcpEvent) {
  if (event.kind !== 'step.started') {
    return undefined;
  }

  if (event.command) {
    return event.command;
  }

  if (event.stepKind === 'web_search' && event.arguments?.query) {
    return stringifyStructuredValue(event.arguments.query);
  }

  const parsedMcp = parseMcpToolName(event.toolName);
  if (parsedMcp) {
    return parsedMcp.rawName;
  }

  if (event.toolName && event.title && event.toolName !== event.title) {

Chunk ID: 3ad08a

Output:
  if (event.toolName && event.title && event.toolName !== event.title) {
    return event.toolName;
  }

  return undefined;
}

function formatExecutionDetail(value: string | undefined) {
  return value ? truncateInlineText(value, 120) : undefined;
}

function ensureExecutionSummary(
  message: MutableAssistantMessage,
): MutableExecutionSummary {
  if (message.executionSummary) {
    return message.executionSummary;
  }

  const summary: MutableExecutionSummary = {
    itemCount: 0,
    failedCount: 0,
    cancelledCount: 0,
    status: 'completed',
  };
  message.executionSummary = summary;
  return summary;
}

function finalizeExecutionSummary(message: MutableAssistantMessage) {
  const summary = message.executionSummary;
  if (!summary) {
    return;
  }

  if (summary.hasRunningStep) {
    summary.status = 'running';
  } else if (summary.failedCount > 0) {
    summary.status = 'error';
  } else if (
    summary.itemCount > 0 &&
    summary.cancelledCount === summary.itemCount
  ) {
    summary.status = 'cancelled';
  } else {
    summary.status = 'completed';
  }

  delete summary.hasRunningStep;
  if (summary.itemCount <= 0) {
    delete message.executionSummary;
  }
}

function projectEventsToMessageSummaries(
  conversationId: string,
  events: AcpEvent[],
): ConversationMessageSummary[] {
  const sorted = [...events].sort(
    (left, right) => left.sequence - right.sequence,
  );
  const messages: MutableAssistantMessage[] = [];
  const assistantByRun = new Map<string, MutableAssistantMessage>();
  const steps = new Map<string, ProjectedStepState>();

  const ensureAssistant = (
    runId: string,
    occurredAt: string,
    requestId?: string,
  ) => {
    let message = assistantByRun.get(runId);

    if (!message) {
      message = {
        id: `assistant_${runId}`,
        conversationId,
        requestId,
        runId,
        role: 'assistant',
        content: '',
        createdAt: occurredAt,
        pending: true,
      };
      assistantByRun.set(runId, message);
      messages.push(message);
    } else if (requestId && !message.requestId) {
      message.requestId = requestId;
    }

    return message;
  };

  for (const event of sorted) {
    switch (event.kind) {
      case 'artifact.created': {
        if (isUserMessageArtifact(event)) {
          messages.push({
            id: event.itemId,
            conversationId,
            requestId: event.requestId,
            runId: event.runId,
            role: 'user',

[... truncated 22 characters ...]

gStep = true;
          summary.latestStepKind = event.stepKind;
          summary.latestTitle = title;
          summary.latestDetail = formatExecutionDetail(
            formatExecutionSubtitle(event) ||
              stringifyStructuredValue(event.arguments),
          );
        }
        break;
      }

      case 'step.delta': {
        if (!event.runId) {
          break;
        }

        const assistant = ensureAssistant(
          event.runId,
          event.occurredAt,
          event.requestId,
        );
        const step = steps.get(event.itemId);
        if (!step) {
          break;
        }

        step.content = event.contentSoFar ?? `${step.content}${event.delta}`;
        if (step.stepKind === 'agent_message') {
          assistant.content = step.content;
          assistant.pending = true;
        } else {
          const summary = ensureExecutionSummary(assistant);
          summary.latestStepKind = step.stepKind;
          summary.latestTitle = step.title;
          summary.latestDetail = formatExecutionDetail(step.content);
        }
        break;
      }

      case 'step.completed': {
        if (!event.runId) {
          break;
        }

        const assistant = ensureAssistant(
          event.runId,
          event.occurredAt,
          event.requestId,
        );
        const step = steps.get(event.itemId);

const shouldShowWorkspaceHeader = computed(() => {
  if (props.embedded) {
    return false
  }

  return isMobile.value ? !openMobile.value : state.value === 'collapsed'
})
const shouldShowConversationError = computed(
  () =>
    Boolean(chat.lastError) &&
    !isActiveConversationBusy.value &&
    activeConversationRunStatus.value === 'failed'
)

function syncGlobalSendingState() {
  chat.sending =
    runningConversationIds.size > 0 ||
    pendingSendConversationKeys.size > 0 ||
    interruptingConversationIds.size > 0 ||
    chat.conversations.some((conversation) => conversation.runStatus === 'running')
}

function setConversationRequests(conversationId: string, list: ConversationRequestRecord[]) {
  conversationRequests.value = {
    ...conversationRequests.value,
    [conversationId]: [...list].sort((left, right) => left.requestNo - right.requestNo),
  }
}

async function loadConversationEventsForConversation(
  conversationId: string,
  options: {
    includeLegacy?: boolean
  } = {}
) {
  const includeLegacy = options.includeLegacy ?? loadedLegacyConversationEvents.has(conversationId)
  const events = await api.listConversationEvents(conversationId, { includeLegacy })
  if (includeLegacy) {
    loadedLegacyConversationEvents.add(conversationId)
  }
  return events
}

function shouldLoadFullConversationEvents(conversation?: { runStatus?: string }) {
  return conversation?.runStatus === 'queued' || conversation?.runStatus === 'running'
}

async function loadConversationMessageSnapshot(
  conversationId: string,
  options: {
    includeLegacy?: boolean
  } = {}
) {
  const snapshot = await api.listConversationMessages(conversationId, options)
  if (options.includeLegacy) {
    loadedLegacyConversationEvents.add(conversationId)
  }
  chat.setMessageSnapshot(conversationId, snapshot.messages, snapshot.lastSequence)
  return snapshot
}

async function ensureConversationLegacyEventsLoaded(conversationId: string) {
  if (
    !conversationId ||
    !session.hasApiCredential ||
    loadedLegacyConversationEvents.has(conversationId)
  ) {
    return
  }

  const events = await loadConversationEventsForConversation(conversationId, {
    includeLegacy: true,
  })
  if (conversationId !== chat.activeConversationId) {
    return

  chat.setEvents(conversationId, events)

async function requestConversationExecutionDetails() {
  const conversationId = chat.activeConversationId
  if (!conversationId || chat.events[conversationId]?.length) {
    return
  }

  const events = await loadConversationEventsForConversation(conversationId)
  if (conversationId !== chat.activeConversationId) {
    return
  }
  chat.setEvents(conversationId, events)
}

async function loadConversationRequestsForConversation(
  conversationId: string,
  options: {
    force?: boolean
  } = {}
) {
  if (!conversationId || !session.hasApiCredential) {
    return
  }
  if (!options.force && conversationRequests.value[conversationId]) {
    return
  }

  try {
    const requests = await api.listConversationRequests(conversationId)
    setConversationRequests(conversationId, requests)
  } catch (error) {
    console.warn('[dw-context] conversation requests load failed', error)
  }
}

function requestKindLabel(kind: ConversationRequestRecord['kind']) {
  if (kind === 'follow_up') return 'Follow-up'

Output:

  function setActiveConversation(conversationId = '') {
    activeConversationId.value = conversationId
  }

  function setConversationMessages(conversationId: string, nextMessages: ChatMessageViewModel[]) {
    messages.value = {
      ...messages.value,
      [conversationId]: nextMessages,
    }
  }

  function setMessageSnapshot(
    conversationId: string,
    nextMessages: ConversationMessageRecord[],
    lastSequence: number
  ) {
    setConversationMessages(
      conversationId,
      nextMessages.map((message) => ({
        ...message,
      }))
    )
    events.value = omitRecordKey(events.value, conversationId)
    lastSequences.value = {
      ...lastSequences.value,
      [conversationId]: lastSequence,
    }
  }

  function omitRecordKey<TValue>(record: Record<string, TValue>, key: string) {
    const next = { ...record }
    delete next[key]
    return next
  }

  function rebuildMessages(conversationId: string) {
    setConversationMessages(
      conversationId,
      projectEventsToMessages(conversationId, events.value[conversationId] || [])
    )
  }

  function setEvents(conversationId: string, list: AcpEvent[]) {
    const deduped = new Map<number, AcpEvent>()
    for (const event of list) {
      deduped.set(event.sequence, event)
    }
    events.value = {
      ...events.value,
      [conversationId]: [...deduped.values()].sort((left, right) => left.sequence - right.sequence),

[... truncated 4 characters ...]

function improvePaperCjkLatinSpacing(document: Document) {
  const walker = document.createTreeWalker(document.body, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT)
  const ignoredParents = new Set(['SCRIPT', 'STYLE', 'TEXTAREA', 'PRE', 'CODE', 'KBD', 'SAMP'])
  const textNodes: Text[] = []
  let textNodeSpacingChanges = 0
  let node = walker.nextNode()
  while (node) {
    const parent = node.parentElement
    if (parent && !ignoredParents.has(parent.tagName)) {
      textNodes.push(node as Text)
    }
    node = walker.nextNode()
  }

  for (const textNode of textNodes) {
    const before = textNode.nodeValue || ''
    const after = addCjkLatinSpacing(before)
    if (after !== before) {
      textNodeSpacingChanges += 1
      textNode.nodeValue = after
    }
  }

  return {
    textNodeSpacingChanges,
    boundarySpacingInsertions: addCjkLatinBoundarySpacing(document.body),
  }
}

function addCjkLatinSpacing(value: string) {
  const cjk = '\\p{Script=Han}\\p{Script=Hiragana}\\p{Script=Katakana}\\p{Script=Hangul}'
  const latinLike = 'A-Za-z0-9@._%+\\-/'
  const gap = '\u2009'
  return value
    .replace(new RegExp(`([${cjk}])([${latinLike}])`, 'gu'), `$1${gap}$2`)
    .replace(new RegExp(`([${latinLike}])([${cjk}])`, 'gu'), `$1${gap}$2`)
}

function addCjkLatinBoundarySpacing(root: HTMLElement) {
  const ignoredElements = new Set(['SCRIPT', 'STYLE', 'TEXTAREA', 'PRE'])

Chunk ID: 7681d8

Output:
  const ignoredElements = new Set(['SCRIPT', 'STYLE', 'TEXTAREA', 'PRE'])
  let insertions = 0

  function visit(element: Element) {
    if (ignoredElements.has(element.tagName)) return

    const children = Array.from(element.childNodes)
    let previous: ChildNode | undefined
    for (const child of children) {
      if (previous && needsCjkLatinBoundaryGap(previous, child)) {
        element.insertBefore(document.createTextNode('\u2009'), child)
        insertions += 1
      }
      previous = child
    }

    for (const child of children) {
      if (child.nodeType === Node.ELEMENT_NODE) {
        visit(child as Element)
      }
    }
  }

  visit(root)
  return insertions
}

function needsCjkLatinBoundaryGap(left: ChildNode, right: ChildNode) {
  const leftChar = lastVisibleCharacter(left)
  const rightChar = firstVisibleCharacter(right)
  if (!leftChar || !rightChar) return false
  if (/\s/.test(leftChar) || /\s/.test(rightChar)) return false
  return (
    (isCjkCharacter(leftChar) && isLatinLikeCharacter(rightChar)) ||
    (isLatinLikeCharacter(leftChar) && isCjkCharacter(rightChar))
  )
}

function firstVisibleCharacter(node: ChildNode): string {
  const value = node.textContent || ''
  return value.trimStart().charAt(0)
}

function lastVisibleCharacter(node: ChildNode): string {
  const value = node.textContent || ''
  return value.trimEnd().slice(-1)
}

function isCjkCharacter(value: string) {
  return /^[\p{Script=Han}\p{Script=Hiragana}\p{Script=Katakana}\p{Script=Hangul}]$/u.test(value)
}

function isLatinLikeCharacter(value: string) {
  return /^[A-Za-z0-9@._%+\-/]$/.test(value)
}

function injectPaperTypesettingStyles(document: Document) {
  if (document.head.querySelector('style[data-dw-paper-typesetting]')) return

  const style = document.createElement('style')
  style.setAttribute('data-dw-paper-typesetting', 'true')
  style.textContent = `
    html, body {
      font-kerning: normal !important;
      text-rendering: geometricPrecision !important;
    }
    body {
      overflow-wrap: anywhere !important;
      word-break: normal !important;
    }
    body, body * {
      font-kerning: normal !important;
      letter-spacing: normal !important;
    }
    code, kbd, samp {
      display: inline !important;
      margin-inline: 0.18em !important;
      padding-inline: 0.12em !important;
      letter-spacing: 0.01em !important;
      line-height: inherit !important;
      vertical-align: baseline !important;
      white-space: break-s

    @InjectRepository(ConversationRunEntity)
    private readonly conversationRunRepository: Repository<ConversationRunEntity>,
  ) {}

  onModuleInit(): void {
    this.queuePollTimer = setInterval(() => {
      this.processQueuedRuns().catch((error) =>
        this.logger.warn(
          formatLog('session_runner.queue_process_failed', {
            error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
          }),
        ),
      );
    }, RUN_QUEUE_POLL_INTERVAL_MS);
    this.queuePollTimer.unref();
    this.processQueuedRuns().catch((error) =>
      this.logger.warn(
        formatLog('session_runner.queue_initial_process_failed', {
          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
        }),
      ),
    );
  }

  onModuleDestroy(): void {
    if (this.queuePollTimer) {
      clearInterval(this.queuePollTimer);
    }
  }

  async sendMessage(input: SendMessageInput): Promise<SendMessageResult> {
    const conversation = await this.conversationService.findById(
      input.conversationId,
    );
    if (conversation.userId !== input.userId) {
      throw new Error(
        `Conversation ${input.conversationId} does not belong to user ${input.userId}.`,
      );
    }
    if (
      (conversation.runStatus === 'running' ||
        conversation.runStatus === 'queued') &&
      !this.isStaleRunningConversation(conversation.lastRunStartedAt)
    ) {
      throw new ConflictException(
        '当前 conversation 已有正在执行的 run,请等其完成或中断后再发送。',
      );
    }

    const request = input.requestId
      ? { requestId: input.requestId }
      : await this.requestService.createForMessage({
          conversationId: input.conversationId,
          userId: input.userId,
          userMessage: input.userMessage,
          requestMode: input.requestMode,
          continueRequestId: input.continueRequestId,
        });
    const attemptNo = await this.nextAttemptNoForRequest(request.requestId);
    const runId = randomUUID();
    const attachmentIds = input.attachmentIds ?? [];
    const attachments = this.imageAttachmentService.resolveForMessage({
      authContext: ********************************
        userId: input.userId,
        userName: input.userName,
        roles: [],

assertDevelopmentDatabaseIsIsolated(appConfig);

function assertDevelopmentDatabaseIsIsolated(config: AppConfig): void {
  if (
    process.env.ENV_NAME === 'dev' &&
    config.database.database === 'dw_context_test'
  ) {
    throw new Error(
      'Refusing to start dev environment against dw_context_test. Use DB_NAME=dw_context_dev for local/dev runs.',
    );
  }
}

export function resolveActiveRuntimeModel(
  config: AiRuntimeConfig = appConfig.aiRuntime,
): string | undefined {
  return config.codex.model ?? config.model;
}

export function resolveRuntimeModelForProvider(
  provider: AiRuntimeProviderType,
  config: AiRuntimeConfig = appConfig.aiRuntime,
): string | undefined {
  return config.codex.model ?? config.model;
}

string;\n+  requestId?: string;\n+  runId: string;\n+  userMessage: string;\n+  assistantText: string;\n+  events: AcpEvent[];\n+  assessment?: InvestigationConfidenceAssessment;\n+}\n+\n+interface AiJiraAnalysis {\n+  classification: JiraFollowUpClassification;\n+  confidence?: number;\n+  title?: string;\n+  detailSummary?: string;\n+  actualBehavior?: string;\n+  expectedBehavior?: string;\n+  reproductionSteps?: string[];\n+  impact?: string;\n+  evidence?: string[];\n+  issueTypeHint?: string;\n+  componentHint?: string;\n+  searchKeywords?: string[];\n+  reason?: string;\n+}\n+\n+interface ResponsesApiResult {\n+  output_text?: unknown;\n+  output?: unknown;\n+}\n+\n+interface ChatCompletionsResult {\n+  choices?: Array<{\n+    message?: {\n+      content?: unknown;\n+    };\n+  }>;\n+}\n+\n+interface JiraSearchResult {\n+  issues?: JiraIssueJson[];\n+}\n+\n+interface JiraIssueJson {\n+  id?: string;\n+  key?: string;\n+  self?: string;\n+  fields?: {\n+    summary?: string;\n+    updated?: string;\n+    status?: { name?: string };\n+    issuetype?: { name?: string };\n+    assignee?: { displayName?: string; name?: string };\n+  };\n+}\n+\n+interface JiraCreateResult {\n+  id?: string;\n+  key?: string;\n+  self?: string;\n+}\n+\n+interface JiraCreateMeta {\n+  projects?: Array<{\n+    key?: string;\n+    issuetypes?: JiraIssueTypeMeta[];\n+  }>;\n+}\n+\n+interface JiraIssueTypeMeta {\n+  id?: string;\n+  name?: string;\n+  fields?: Record<\n+    string,\n+    {\n+      required?: boolean;\n+      name?: string;\n+      allowedValues?: Array<{ name?: string; value?: string; id?: string }>;\n+    }\n+  >;\n+}\n+\n+const JIRA_FOLLOW_UP_SYSTEM_PROMPT = [\n+  '你是 Deep Context 的 Jira 后置分析服务。',\n+  '你的任务是在排查总结完成后，判断这轮结果是否应该进入 Jira。',\n+  '只根据用户问题、AI 最终总结和证据摘要判断，不要编造事实。',\n+  '必须只输出 JSON 对象，不要输出 Markdown、解释或代码围栏。',\n+  'JSON 字段：classification、confidence、title、detailSummary、actualBehavior、expectedBehavior、reproductionSteps、impact、evidence、issueTypeHint、componentHint、searchKeywords、reason。',\n+  'classification 只能是 none、bug、optimization、requirement。',\n+  'bug 表示已发生错误、异常、回归、不可用；optimization 表示已有能力改进；requirement 表示新功能或新流程诉求；none 表示不需要 Jira。',\n+  'title 要能直接作为 Jira summary，中文优先，最多 80 字。',\n+  'searchKeywords 给 2 到 5 个适合搜索相似 Jira 的短关键词，必须具体。',\n+].join('\\n');\n+\n+@Injectable()\n+export class JiraFollowUpService {\n+  private readonly logger = new Logger(JiraFollowUpService.name);\n+\n+  constructor(\n+    private readonly publisher: AcpPublisherService,\n+    private readonly conversationService: ConversationService,\n+  ) {}\n+\n+  async runAfterCompletion(input: RunAfterCompletionInput): Promise<void> {\n+    if (!this.canRun(input)) {\n+      return;\n+    }\n+\n+    try {\n+      const followUp = await this.buildFollowUp(input);\n+      if (!followUp || followUp.status === 'skipped') {\n+        return;\n+      }\n+      await this.publishFollowUp(input, followUp);\n+    } catch (error) {\n+      this.logger.warn(\n+        formatLog('jira_follow_up.run_failed', {\n+          conversationId: input.conversationId,\n+          runId: input.runId,\n+          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),\n+        }),\n+      );\n+      await this.publishFollowUp(input, {\n+        status: 'error',\n+        classification: 'none',\n+        confidence: 0,\n+        title: 'Jira follow-up failed',\n+        detailSummary: '',\n+        searchKeywords: [],\n+        similarIssues: [],\n+        errorMessage:\n+          error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Jira follow-up failed.',\n+        analyzedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n+      });\n+    }\n+  }\n+\n+  async createIssueFromLatestDraft(input: {\n+    conversationId: string;\n+    runId: string;\n+  }): Promise<JiraCreatedIssueRecord> {\n+    if (!appConfig.jira.createEnabled) {\n+      throw new BadRequestException('Jira create is disabled.');\n+    }\n+    const followUp = await this.findLatestFollowUp(input);\n+    if (!followUp?.issueDraft) {\n+      throw new BadRequestException('No Jira draft found for this run.');\n+    }\n+    if (followUp.createdIssue) {\n+      return followUp.createdIssue;\n+    }\n+    if (!followUp.issueDraft.canCreate) {\n+      throw new BadRequestException(\n+        followUp.issueDraft.disabledReason || 'Jira draft is not creatable.',\n+      );\n+    }\n+\n+    const createdIssue = await this.createIssue(followUp.issueDraft);\n+    const updated: JiraFollowUpRecord = {\n+      ...followUp,\n+      status: 'created',\n+      createdIssue,\n+      analyzedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n+    };\n+    await this.publisher.publish({\n+      event: {\n+        kind: 'artifact.created',\n+        conversationId: input.conversationId,\n+        runId: input.runId,\n+        itemId: `jira-follow-up:${input.runId}`,\n+        artifactKind: 'jira_follow_up',\n+        label: 'Jira follow-up',\n+        preview: `Created Jira ${createdIssue.key}`,\n+        payload: updated as unknown as Record<string, unknown>,\n+      },\n+    });\n+    return createdIssue;\n+  }\n+\n+  private canRun(input: RunAfterCompletionInput): boolean {\n+    if (!appConfig.jira.enabled || !appConfig.jira.followUpEnabled) {\n+      return false;\n+    }\n+    const config = appConfig.aiRuntime.codex;\n+    if (!resolveRuntimeModelForProvider('codex') || !config.baseUrl || !config.authToken) {\n+      return false;\n+    }\n+    const text = `${input.userMessage}\\n${input.assistantText}`.toLowerCase();\n+    if (input.assessment && input.assessment.score >= 55) {\n+      return true;\n+    }\n+    return /bug|报错|异常|失败|不可用|优化|需求|feature|requirement|复现|根因|排查/.test(\n+      text,\n+    );\n+  }\n+\n+  private async buildFollowUp(\n+    input: RunAfterCompletionInput,\n+  ): Promise<JiraFollowUpRecord | undefined> {\n+    const analysis = await this.analyze(input);\n+    if (analysis.classification === 'none' || (analysis.confidence ?? 0) < 0.45) {\n+      return {\n+        status: 'skipped',\n+        classification: 'none',\n+        confidence: analysis.confidence ?? 0,\n+        title: analysis.title || '',\n+        detailSummary: analysis.reason || '当前结论不需要创建 Jira。',\n+        reason: analysis.reason,\n+        searchKeywords: [],\n+        similarIssues: [],\n+        analyzedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n+      };\n+    }\n+\n+    const projectKey = this.resolveProjectKey(input, analysis);\n+    if (!projectKey) {\n+      return this.errorRecord(\n+        analysis,\n+        '无法确定 Jira project key。请配置 JIRA_PROJECT，或在上下文中明确项目。',\n+      );\n+    }\n+\n+    const searchKeywords = normalizeKeywords(analysis.searchKeywords);\n+    const similarIssues = await this.searchSimilarIssues({\n+      projectKey,\n+      keywords: searchKeywords,\n+    });\n+    const baseRecord = this.baseRecord(analysis, searchKeywords);\n+\n+    if (similarIssues.length > 0) {\n+      return {\n+        ...baseRecord,\n+        status: 'similar_found',\n+        similarIssues,\n+      };\n+    }\n+\n+    const draft = await this.buildIssueDraft({\n+      projectKey,\n+      analysis,\n+    });\n+    return {\n+      ...baseRecord,\n+      status: 'draft_ready',\n+      similarIssues: [],\n+      issueDraft: draft,\n+    };\n+  }\n+\n+  private async analyze(input: RunAfterCompletionInput): Promise<AiJiraAnalysis> {\n+    const model = resolveRuntimeModelForProvider('codex');\n+    const config = appConfig.aiRuntime.codex;\n+    if (!model || !config.baseUrl || !config.authToken) {\n+      return { classification: 'none', confidence: 0, reason: 'AI config missing' };\n+    }\n+\n+    const prompt = JSON.stringify(\n+      {\n+        userMessage: input.userMessage,\n+        finalAnswer: truncate(input.assistantText, 9000),\n+        investigationAssessment: input.assessment,\n+        evidenceEvents: summarizeEvidenceEvents(input.events),\n+      },\n+      null,\n+      2,\n+    );\n+    const responsesText = await this.tryGenerateWithResponsesApi({\n+      model,\n+      baseUrl: config.baseUrl,\n+      authToken: config.authToken,\n+      prompt,\n+    });\n+    const responsesAnalysis = parseAnalysisJson(responsesText);\n+    if (responsesAnalysis) {\n+      return responsesAnalysis;\n+    }\n+\n+    const chatText = await this.tryGenerateWithChatCompletionsApi({\n+      model,\n+      baseUrl: config.baseUrl,\n+      authToken: config.authToken,\n+      prompt,\n+    });\n+    return (\n+      parseAnalysisJson(chatText) ?? {\n+        classification: 'none',\n+        confidence: 0,\n+        reason: 'AI did not return valid Jira follow-up JSON',\n+      }\n+    );\n+  }\n+\n+  private async tryGenerateWithResponsesApi(input: {\n+    model: string;\n+    baseUrl: string;\n+    authToken: string;\n+    prompt: string;\n+  }): Promise<string> {\n+    try {\n+      const json = await postJson<ResponsesApiResult>({\n+        url: `${normalizeAiBaseUrl(input.baseUrl)}/responses`,\n+        authToken: input.authToken,\n+        payload: {\n+          model: input.model,\n+          input: [\n+            { role: 'system', content: JIRA_FOLLOW_UP_SYSTEM_PROMPT },\n+            { role: 'user', content: input.prompt },\n+          ],\n+          max_output_tokens: 1800,\n+        },\n+        timeoutMs: 8000,\n+      });\n+      return extractResponsesText(json);\n+    } catch (error) {\n+      this.logger.warn(\n+        formatLog('jira_follow_up.responses_failed', {\n+          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),\n+        }),\n+      );\n+      return '';\n+    }\n+  }\n+\n+  private async tryGenerateWithChatCompletionsApi(input: {\n+    model: string;\n+    baseUrl: string;\n+    authToken: string;\n+    prompt: string;\n+  }): Promise<string> {\n+    try {\n+      const json = await postJson<ChatCompletionsResult>({\n+        url: `${normalizeAiBaseUrl(input.baseUrl)}/chat/completions`,\n+        authToken: input.authToken,\n+        payload: {\n+          model: input.model,\n+          messages: [\n+            { role: 'system', content: JIRA_FOLLOW_UP_SYSTEM_PROMPT },\n+            { role: 'user', content: input.prompt },\n+          ],\n+          max_tokens: 1800,\n+          temperature: 0.1,\n+        },\n+        timeoutMs: 8000,\n+      });\n+      return typeof json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content === 'string'\n+        ? json.choices[0].message.content\n+        : '';\n+    } catch (error) {\n+      this.logger.warn(\n+        formatLog('jira_follow_up.chat_failed', {\n+          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),\n+        }),\n+      );\n+      return '';\n+    }\n+  }\n+\n+  private resolveProjectKey(\n+    input: RunAfterCompletionInput,\n+    analysis: AiJiraAnalysis,\n+  ): string {\n+    const configured = appConfig.jira.projectKey?.trim();\n+    if (configured) {\n+      return configured;\n+    }\n+    const combined = `${input.userMessage}\\n${input.assistantText}\\n${analysis.title ?? ''}`;\n+    return /\\bMGX\\b|atoms\\.dev|HelpFlow/i.test(combined) ? 'MGX' : '';\n+  }\n+\n+  private async searchSimilarIssues(input: {\n+    projectKey: string;\n+    keywords: string[];\n+  }): Promise<JiraSimilarIssueRecord[]> {\n+    if (!input.keywords.length) {\n+      return [];\n+    }\n+    const terms = input.keywords.slice(0, 4).map(quoteJqlText);\n+    const jql = `project = ${quoteJqlText(input.projectKey)} AND (${terms\n+      .map((term) => `text ~ ${term}`)\n+      .join(' OR ')}) ORDER BY updated DESC`;\n+    try {\n+      const json = await this.jiraRequest<JiraSearchResult>({\n+        method: 'POST',\n+        path: '/rest/api/2/search',\n+        body: {\n+          jql,\n+          maxResults: appConfig.jira.defaultSearchLimit,\n+          fields: ['summary', 'status', 'issuetype', 'assignee', 'updated'],\n+        },\n+      });\n+      return (json.issues ?? [])\n+        .map((issue) => this.toSimilarIssue(issue))\n+        .filter((issue): issue is JiraSimilarIssueRecord => Boolean(issue));\n+    } catch (error) {\n+      this.logger.warn(\n+        formatLog('jira_follow_up.search_failed', {\n+          projectKey: input.projectKey,\n+          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),\n+        }),\n+      );\n+      return [];\n+    }\n+  }\n+\n+  private toSimilarIssue(\n+    issue: JiraIssueJson,\n+  ): JiraSimilarIssueRecord | undefined {\n+    const key = issue.key?.trim();\n+    if (!key) {\n+      return undefined;\n+    }\n+    return {\n+      key,\n+      summary: issue.fields?.summary?.trim() || key,\n+      status: issue.fields?.status?.name,\n+      issueType: issue.fields?.issuetype?.name,\n+      assignee:\n+        issue.fields?.assignee?.displayName || issue.fields?.assignee?.name,\n+      updated: issue.fields?.updated,\n+      url: this.issueUrl(key),\n+    };\n+  }\n+\n+  private async buildIssueDraft(input: {\n+    projectKey: string;\n+    analysis: AiJiraAnalysis;\n+  }): Promise<JiraIssueDraftRecord> {\n+    const meta = await this.getCreateMeta(input.projectKey);\n+    const selected = this.selectIssueType(meta, input.analysis);\n+    if (!selected?.id || !selected.name) {\n+      return disabledDraft(input, '', '', '没有找到可创建的 Jira issue type。');\n+    }\n+\n+    const requiredFields = requiredCreateFields(selected);\n+    const componentResult = this.resolveComponents(selected, input.analysis);\n+    const missingFields = requiredFields\n+      .filter((field) => !['project', 'issuetype', 'summary', 'description'].includes(field.key))\n+      .filter((field) => field.key !== 'components' || componentResult.missing)\n+      .map((field) => field.name || field.key);\n+    const description = buildDescription(input.analysis);\n+    const canCreate = missingFields.length === 0;\n+    return {\n+      projectKey: input.projectKey,\n+      issueTypeId: selected.id,\n+      issueTypeName: selected.name,\n+      summary: sanitizeSummary(input.analysis.title),\n+      description,\n+      components: componentResult.components,\n+      missingFields,\n+      canCreate,\n+      disabledReason: canCreate\n+        ? undefined\n+        : `缺少 Jira 必填字段：${missingFields.join('、')}`,\n+    };\n+  }\n+\n+  private async getCreateMeta(projectKey: string): Promise<JiraCreateMeta> {\n+    const query = new URLSearchParams({\n+      projectKeys: projectKey,\n+      expand: 'projects.issuetypes.fields',\n+    });\n+    return this.jiraRequest<JiraCreateMeta>({\n+      method: 'GET',\n+      path: `/rest/api/2/issue/createmeta?${query.toString()}`,\n+    });\n+  }\n+\n+  private selectIssueType(\n+    meta: JiraCreateMeta,\n+    analysis: AiJiraAnalysis,\n+  ): JiraIssueTypeMeta | undefined {\n+    const issueTypes = meta.projects?.[0]?.issuetypes ?? [];\n+    const candidates = issueTypeCandidates(analysis);\n+    for (const candidate of candidates) {\n+      const matched = issueTypes.find((item) =>\n+        issueTypeNameMatches(item.name, candidate),\n+      );\n+      if (matched && isManageableIssueType(matched)) {\n+        return matched;\n+      }\n+    }\n+    return issueTypes.find(\n+      (item) => issueTypeNameMatches(item.name, 'Task') && isManageableIssueType(item),\n+    ) ?? issueTypes.find(\n+      (item) => issueTypeNameMatches(item.name, '任务') && isManageableIssueType(item),\n+    ) ?? issueTypes.find(isManageableIssueType);\n+  }\n+\n+  private resolveComponents(\n+    issueType: JiraIssueTypeMeta,\n+    analysis: AiJiraAnalysis,\n+  ): { components: string[]; missing: boolean } {\n+    const componentField = issueType.fields?.components;\n+    if (!componentField?.required) {\n+      return { components: [], missing: false };\n+    }\n+    const allowedNames =\n+      componentField.allowedValues\n+        ?.map((item) => item.name || item.value)\n+        .filter((item): item is string => Boolean(item?.trim())) ?? [];\n+    const configured = appConfig.jira.defaultComponent?.trim();\n+    const hint = analysis.componentHint?.trim();\n+    const selected =\n+      findAllowedValue(allowedNames, configured) ??\n+      findAllowedValue(allowedNames, hint) ??\n+      (allowedNames.length === 1 ? allowedNames[0] : undefined);\n+    return selected\n+      ? { components: [selected], missing: false }\n+      : { components: [], missing: true };\n+  }\n+\n+  private async createIssue(\n+    draft: JiraIssueDraftRecord,\n+  ): Promise<JiraCreatedIssueRecord> {\n+    const fields: Record<string, unknown> = {\n+      project: { key: draft.projectKey },\n+      issuetype: { id: draft.issueTypeId },\n+      summary: draft.summary,\n+      description: draft.description,\n+    };\n+    if (draft.components.length > 0) {\n+      fields.components = draft.components.map((name) => ({ name }));\n+    }\n+    const created = await this.jiraRequest<JiraCreateResult>({\n+      method: 'POST',\n+      path: '/rest/api/2/issue',\n+      body: { fields },\n+    });\n+    const key = created.key?.trim();\n+    if (!key) {\n+      throw new BadRequestException('Jira create succeeded but did not return an issue key.');\n+    }\n+    return {\n+      key,\n+      id: created.id,\n+      self: created.self,\n+      url: this.issueUrl(key),\n+    };\n+  }\n+\n+  private async findLatestFollowUp(input: {\n+    conversationId: string;\n+    runId: string;\n+  }): Promise<JiraFollowUpRecord | undefined> {\n+    const events = await this.conversationService.listEvents(input.conversationId);\n+    const event = [...events].reverse().find(\n+      (item) =>\n+        item.kind === 'artifact.created' &&\n+        item.runId === input.runId &&\n+        item.artifactKind === 'jira_follow_up' &&\n+        isRecord(item.payload),\n+    );\n+    if (!event || event.kind !== 'artifact.created' || !isRecord(event.payload)) {\n+      return undefined;\n+    }\n+    return event.payload as unknown as JiraFollowUpRecord;\n+  }\n+\n+  private async publishFollowUp(\n+    input: RunAfterCompletionInput,\n+    followUp: JiraFollowUpRecord,\n+  ): Promise<void> {\n+    await this.publisher.publish({\n+      event: {\n+        kind: 'artifact.created',\n+        conversationId: input.conversationId,\n+        requestId: input.requestId,\n+        runId: input.runId,\n+        itemId: `jira-follow-up:${input.runId}`,\n+        artifactKind: 'jira_follow_up',\n+        label: 'Jira follow-up',\n+        preview: previewForFollowUp(followUp),\n+        payload: followUp as unknown as Record<string, unknown>,\n+      },\n+    });\n+  }\n+\n+  private baseRecord(\n+    analysis: AiJiraAnalysis,\n+    searchKeywords: string[],\n+  ): Omit<JiraFollowUpRecord, 'status' | 'similarIssues'> {\n+    return {\n+      classification: analysis.classification,\n+      confidence: clampNumber(analysis.confidence, 0, 1) ?? 0,\n+      title: sanitizeSummary(analysis.title),\n+      detailSummary: analysis.detailSummary?.trim() || analysis.reason || '',\n+      reason: analysis.reason,\n+      searchKeywords,\n+      analyzedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n+    };\n+  }\n+\n+  private errorRecord(\n+    analysis: AiJiraAnalysis,\n+    message: string,\n+  ): JiraFollowUpRecord {\n+    return {\n+      ...this.baseRecord(analysis, normalizeKeywords(analysis.searchKeywords)),\n+      status: 'error',\n+      similarIssues: [],\n+      errorMessage: message,\n+    };\n+  }\n+\n+  private async jiraRequest<T>(input: {\n+    method: 'GET' | 'POST';\n+    path: string;\n+    body?: unknown;\n+  }): Promise<T> {\n+    const baseUrl = appConfig.jira.baseUrl?.replace(/\\/+$/, '');\n+    if (!baseUrl) {\n+      throw new BadRequestException('Jira base URL is not configured.');\n+    }\n+    const headers: Record<string, string> = {\n+      Accept: 'application/json',\n+    };\n+    if (input.body !== undefined) {\n+      headers['Content-Type'] = 'application/json';\n+    }\n+    applyJiraAuthHeaders(headers);\n+\n+    const response = await fetch(`${baseUrl}${input.path}`, {\n+      method: input.method,\n+      headers,\n+      body: input.body === undefined ? undefined : JSON.stringify(input.body),\n+      signal: AbortSignal.timeout(appConfig.jira.httpTimeoutMs),\n+    });\n+    const text = await response.text();\n+    if (!response.ok) {\n+      throw new Error(\n+        `Jira HTTP ${response.status}: ${redactSensitiveText(text).slice(0, 600)}`,\n+      );\n+    }\n+    if (!text.trim()) {\n+      return {} as T;\n+    }\n+    return JSON.parse(text) as T;\n+  }\n+\n+  private issueUrl(key: string): string {\n+    const baseUrl = appConfig.jira.baseUrl?.replace(/\\/+$/, '') ?? '';\n+    return `${baseUrl}/browse/${encodeURIComponent(key)}`;\n+  }\n+}\n+\n+function applyJiraAuthHeaders(headers: Record<string, string>): void {\n+  const config = appConfig.jira;\n+  if (config.authMethod === 'bearer' || config.bearerToken) {\n+    const token = config.bearerToken;\n+    if (!token) {\n+      throw new BadRequestException('Jira bearer token is not configured.');\n+    }\n+    headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${token}`;\n+    return;\n+  }\n+  if (config.authMethod === 'cookie' || config.sessionCookie) {\n+    const cookie = config.sessionCookie;\n+    if (!cookie) {\n+      throw new BadRequestException('Jira session cookie is not configured.');\n+    }\n+    headers.Cookie = cookie;\n+    return;\n+  }\n+\n+  const user = config.username ?? config.email;\n+  const password = config.password ?? config.apiToken;\n+  if (!user || !password) {\n+    throw new BadRequestException('Jira basic auth credentials are not configured.');\n+  }\n+  headers.Authorization = `Basic ${Buffer.from(`${user}:${password}`).toString('base64')}`;\n+}\n+\n+async function postJson<T>(input: {\n+  url: string;\n+  authToken: string;\n+  payload: Record<string, unknown>;\n+  timeoutMs: number;\n+}): Promise<T> {\n+  const response = await fetch(input.url, {\n+    method: 'POST',\n+    headers: {\n+      Authorization: `Bearer ${input.authToken}`,\n+      'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n+    },\n+    body: JSON.stringify(input.payload),\n+    signal: AbortSignal.timeout(input.timeoutMs),\n+  });\n+  if (!response.ok) {\n+    const body = await response.text().catch(() => '');\n+    throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}: ${body.slice(0, 300)}`);\n+  }\n+  return (await response.json()) as T;\n+}\n+\n+function normalizeAiBaseUrl(value: string): string {\n+  const trimmed = value.trim().replace(/\\/+$/, '');\n+  return trimmed.endsWith('/v1') ? trimmed : `${trimmed}/v1`;\n+}\n+\n+function extractResponsesText(value: ResponsesApiResult): string {\n+  if (typeof value.output_text === 'string') {\n+    return value.output_text;\n+  }\n+  return collectText(value.output).join('\\n');\n+}\n+\n+function collectText(value: unknown): string[] {\n+  if (typeof value === 'string') return [value];\n+  if (!value || typeof value !== 'object') return [];\n+  if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.flatMap((item) => collectText(item));\n+  const record = value as Record<string, unknown>;\n+  return ['text', 'output_text', 'content']\n+    .map((key) => record[key])\n+    .flatMap((item) => collectText(item));\n+}\n+\n+function parseAnalysisJson(text: string): AiJiraAnalysis | undefined {\n+  const parsed = parseJsonObject(text);\n+  if (!parsed) {\n+    return undefined;\n+  }\n+  const classification = parsed.classification;\n+  if (\n+    classification !== 'none' &&\n+    classification !== 'bug' &&\n+    classification !== 'optimization' &&\n+    classification !== 'requirement'\n+  ) {\n+    return undefined;\n+  }\n+  return {\n+    classification,\n+    confidence: clampNumber(parsed.confidence, 0, 1),\n+    title: readString(parsed.title),\n+    detailSummary: readString(parsed.detailSummary),\n+    actualBehavior: readString(parsed.actualBehavior),\n+    expectedBehavior: readString(parsed.expectedBehavior),\n+    reproductionSteps: readStringArray(parsed.reproductionSteps),\n+    impact: readString(parsed.impact),\n+    evidence: readStringArray(parsed.evidence),\n+    issueTypeHint: readString(parsed.issueTypeHint),\n+    componentHint: readString(parsed.componentHint),\n+    searchKeywords: readStringArray(parsed.searchKeywords),\n+    reason: readString(parsed.reason),\n+  };\n+}\n+\n+function parseJsonObject(text: string): Record<string, unknown> | undefined {\n+  const trimmed = text.trim();\n+  if (!trimmed) return undefined;\n+  const withoutFence = trimmed\n+    .replace(/^```(?:json)?\\s*/i, '')\n+    .replace(/\\s*```$/i, '')\n+    .trim();\n+  const candidate = withoutFence.startsWith('{')\n+    ? withoutFence\n+    : withoutFence.slice(withoutFence.indexOf('{'), withoutFence.lastIndexOf('}') + 1);\n+  try {\n+    const parsed = JSON.parse(candidate);\n+    return isRecord(parsed) ? parsed : undefined;\n+  } catch {\n+    return undefined;\n+  }\n+}\n+\n+function summarizeEvidenceEvents(events: AcpEvent[]): Array<Record<string, string>> {\n+  return events\n+    .filter(\n+      (event) =>\n+        event.kind === 'step.completed' &&\n+        event.stepKind !== 'agent_message' &&\n+        event.stepKind !== 'reasoning',\n+    )\n+    .slice(-12)\n+    .map((event) => ({\n+      kind: event.stepKind,\n+      status: event.status,\n+      preview: truncate(event.textSummary || event.resultPreview || event.text || '', 500),\n+      error: truncate(event.errorMessage || '', 240),\n+    }));\n+}\n+\n+function issueTypeCandidates(analysis: AiJiraAnalysis): string[] {\n+  const hint = analysis.issueTypeHint?.trim();\n+  if (analysis.classification === 'bug') {\n+    return [hint, 'Bug', '缺陷', 'Task', '任务'].filter(Boolean) as string[];\n+  }\n+  if (analysis.classification === 'optimization') {\n+    return [hint, 'Improvement', '改进', 'Task', '任务'].filter(Boolean) as string[];\n+  }\n+  return [hint, 'Story', '需求', 'Task', '任务'].filter(Boolean) as string[];\n+}\n+\n+function issueTypeNameMatches(value: string | undefined, candidate: string): boolean {\n+  const left = value?.trim().toLowerCase();\n+  const right = candidate.trim().toLowerCase();\n+  return Boolean(left && right && (left === right || left.includes(right) || right.includes(left)));\n+}\n+\n+function isManageableIssueType(issueType: JiraIssueTypeMeta): boolean {\n+  const required = requiredCreateFields(issueType);\n+  return required.every((field) =>\n+    ['project', 'issuetype', 'summary', 'description', 'components'].includes(field.key),\n+  );\n+}\n+\n+function requiredCreateFields(issueType: JiraIssueTypeMeta): Array<{ key: string; name: string }> {\n+  return Object.entries(issueType.fields ?? {})\n+    .filter(([, field]) => field.required === true)\n+    .map(([key, field]) => ({ key, name: field.name || key }));\n+}\n+\n+function findAllowedValue(\n+  allowedNames: string[],\n+  candidate: string | undefined,\n+): string | undefined {\n+  const normalized = candidate?.trim().toLowerCase();\n+  if (!normalized) return undefined;\n+  return allowedNames.find((item) => {\n+    const value = item.trim().toLowerCase();\n+    return value === normalized || value.includes(normalized) || normalized.includes(value);\n+  });\n+}\n+\n+function buildDescription(analysis: AiJiraAnalysis): string {\n+  if (analysis.classification === 'requirement') {\n+    return [\n+      '## 详细描述',\n+      analysis.detailSummary || analysis.reason || '',\n+      '',\n+      '## 用户/场景',\n+      analysis.impact || '待补充',\n+      '',\n+      '## 期望能力',\n+      analysis.expectedBehavior || analysis.title || '待补充',\n+      '',\n+      '## 验收口径',\n+      '- 待补充',\n+      '',\n+      '## 补充上下文',\n+      ...(analysis.evidence ?? []).map((item) => `- ${item}`),\n+    ].join('\\n');\n+  }\n+\n+  return [\n+    '## 描述',\n+    analysis.detailSummary || analysis.reason || '',\n+    '',\n+    '## 实际表现',\n+    analysis.actualBehavior || '待补充',\n+    '',\n+    '## 期望表现',\n+    analysis.expectedBehavior || '待补充',\n+    '',\n+    '## 复现路径',\n+    ...(analysis.reproductionSteps?.length\n+      ? analysis.reproductionSteps.map((item, index) => `${index + 1}. ${item}`)\n+      : ['1. 待补充']),\n+    '',\n+    '## 影响范围',\n+    analysis.impact || '待补充',\n+    '',\n+    '## 已确认事实',\n+    ...(analysis.evidence?.length\n+      ? analysis.evidence.map((item) => `- ${item}`)\n+      : ['- 待补充']),\n+  ].join('\\n');\n+}\n+\n+function disabledDraft(\n+  input: { projectKey: string; analysis: AiJiraAnalysis },\n+  issueTypeId: string,\n+  issueTypeName: string,\n+  reason: string,\n+): JiraIssueDraftRecord {\n+  return {\n+    projectKey: input.projectKey,\n+    issueTypeId,\n+    issueTypeName,\n+    summary: sanitizeSummary(input.analysis.title),\n+    description: buildDescription(input.analysis),\n+    components: [],\n+    missingFields: [reason],\n+    canCreate: false,\n+    disabledReason: reason,\n+  };\n+}\n+\n+function normalizeKeywords(value: string[] | undefined): string[] {\n+  const seen = new Set<string>();\n+  return (value ?? [])\n+    .map((item) => item.replace(/\\s+/g, ' ').trim())\n+    .filter((item) => item.length >= 2 && item.length <= 80)\n+    .filter((item) => {\n+      const key = item.toLowerCase();\n+      if (seen.has(key)) return false;\n+      seen.add(key);\n+      return true;\n+    })\n+    .slice(0, 5);\n+}\n+\n+function sanitizeSummary(value: string | undefined): string {\n+  const normalized = (value || '待创建 Jira 单').replace(/\\s+/g, ' ').trim();\n+  return truncate(normalized, 120);\n+}\n+\n+function quoteJqlText(value: string): string {\n+  return `\"${value.replace(/\\\\/g, '\\\\\\\\').replace(/\"/g, '\\\\\"')}\"`;\n+}\n+\n+function previewForFollowUp(followUp: JiraFollowUpRecord): string {\n+  if (followUp.status === 'similar_found') {\n+    return `Found ${followUp.similarIssues.length} similar Jira issue(s).`;\n+  }\n+  if (followUp.status === 'draft_ready') {\n+    return followUp.issueDraft?.canCreate\n+      ? 'Jira issue draft is ready.'\n+      : followUp.issueDraft?.disabledReason || 'Jira issue draft needs required fields.';\n+  }\n+  if (followUp.status === 'created' && followUp.createdIssue) {\n+    return `Created Jira ${followUp.createdIssue.key}.`;\n+  }\n+  return followUp.errorMessage || followUp.reason || 'Jira follow-up completed.';\n+}\n+\n+function truncate(value: string, max: number): string {\n+  const normalized = value.trim();\n+  if (normalized.length <= max) return normalized;\n+  return `${normalized.slice(0, max - 3)}...`;\n+}\n+\n+function readString(value: unknown): string | undefined {\n+  return typeof value === 'string' && value.trim() ? value.trim() : undefined;\n+}\n+\n+function readStringArray(value: unknown): string[] | undefined {\n+  if (!Array.isArray(value)) return undefined;\n+  const items = value\n+    .map((item) => readString(item))\n+    .filter((item): item is string => Boolean(item));\n+  return items.length ? items : undefined;\n+}\n+\n+function clampNumber(value: unknown, min: number, max: number): number | undefined {\n+  if (typeof value !== 'number' || !Number.isFinite(value)) return undefined;\n+  return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, value));\n+}\n+\n+function isRecord(value: unknown): value is Record<string, unknown> {\n+  return Boolean(value && typeof value === 'object' && !Array.isArray(value));\n+}\n*** End Patch"

import {
  BadRequestException,
  Injectable,
  Logger,
  NotFoundException,
} from '@nestjs/common';
import { InjectRepository } from '@nestjs/typeorm';
import { randomUUID } from 'node:crypto';
import { Repository } from 'typeorm';
import { ConversationEntity } from '../database/conversation.entity';
import {
  AcpArtifactCreated,
  AcpEvent,
  AcpStepKind,
  InvestigationConfidenceAssessment,
} from '../acp/models';
import type { QueryImageAttachmentRecord } from '../shared/contracts';
import { formatLog } from '../shared/logging';
import { AcpEventLogService } from './acp-event-log.service';
import { ConversationTitleService } from './conversation-title.service';

export interface CreateConversationInput {
  userId: string;
  runtime: string;
  workspaceDir?: string;
  title?: string;
}

export interface ConversationSummary {
  conversationId: string;
  userId: string;
  title?: string;
  pinnedAt?: string;
  runtime: string;
  workspaceDir?: string;
  status: 'active' | 'archived' | 'deleted';
  runStatus: ConversationRunStatus;
  lastRunId?: string;
  lastRunStartedAt?: string;
  lastRunEndedAt?: string;
  createdAt: string;
  updatedAt: string;
}

export interface UpdateConversationInput {
  title?: string;
  pinned?: boolean;
}

export type ConversationRunStatus =
  | 'idle'
  | 'queued'
  | 'running'
  | 'completed'
  | 'failed'
  | 'cancelled';

interface ListEventsOptions {
  lightweight?: boolean;
  requestId?: string;
  includeLegacy?: boolean;
}

export interface ConversationEventTextDetail {
  sequence: number;
  text: string;
  textByteCount: number;
}

export interface ConversationExecutionSummary {
  itemCount: number;
  failedCount: number;
  cancelledCount: number;
  status: 'running' | 'completed' | 'error' | 'cancelled';
  latestStepKind?: AcpStepKind;
  latestTitle?: string;
  latestDetail?: string;
}

export interface ConversationMessageSummary {
  id: string;
  conversationId?: string;
  requestId?: string;
  runId?: string;
  role: 'user' | 'assistant' | 'system';
  content: string;
  attachments?: QueryImageAttachmentRecord[];
  createdAt: string;
  runDurationMs?: number;
  completedAt?: string;
  pending?: boolean;
  errorMessage?: string;
  experienceAssessment?: InvestigationConfidenceAssessment;
  executionSummary?: ConversationExecutionSummary;
}

export interface ConversationMessagesSnapshot {
  messages: ConversationMessageSummary[];
  lastSequence: number;
}

const EVENT_TEXT_SUMMARY_LIMIT = 100;

/**
 * Conversation CRUD —— 纯元数据,事件流由 AcpPublisherService 管。
 */
@Injectable()
export class ConversationService {
  private readonly logger = new Logger(ConversationService.name);

  constructor(
    @InjectRepository(ConversationEntity)
    private readonly conversationRepository: Repository<ConversationEntity>,
    private readonly eventLogService: AcpEventLogService,
    private readonly conversationTitleService: ConversationTitleService,
  ) {}

  async create(input: CreateConversationInput): Promise<ConversationSummary> {
    const title = input.title
      ? this.conversationTitleService.normalizeExplicitTitle(input.title)

Output:

    getSharedConversation: (conversationId: string) =>
      request<ConversationSummary>(`/share/conversations/${conversationId}`, {
        skipAuthRedirect: ********************************
      }),

    listConversationEvents: async (
      conversationId: string,
      options: {
        requestId?: string
        includeLegacy?: boolean
      } = {}
    ) => {
      const search = new URLSearchParams()
      if (options.requestId?.trim()) {
        search.set('requestId', options.requestId.trim())
      }
      if (options.includeLegacy) {
        search.set('includeLegacy', '1')
      }
      const suffix = search.toString() ? `?${search.toString()}` : ''
      const response = await request<ConversationEventsResponse>(
        `/conversations/${conversationId}/events${suffix}`,
        {
          headers: withAuth(),
        }
      )
      return response.events
    },

    listConversationMessages: async (
      conversationId: string,
      options: {
        requestId?: string
        includeLegacy?: boolean
      } = {}
    ) => {
      const search = new URLSearchParams()
      if (options.requestId?.trim()) {
        search.set('requestId', options.requestId.trim())
      }
      if (options.includeLegacy) {
        search.set('includeLegacy', '1')
      }
      const suffix = search.toString() ? `?${search.toString()}` : ''
      return await request<ConversationMessagesResponse>(
        `/conversations/${conversationId}/messages${suffix}`,
        {
          headers: withAuth(),
        }
      )
    },

    listConversationRequests: async (conversationId: string) => {
      const response = await request<ListConversationRequestsResponse>(
        `/conversations/${conversationId}/requests`,
        {
          headers: withAuth(),
        }
      )
      return response.items
    },

    getConversationRequest: (conversationId: string, requestId: string) =>
      request<ConversationRequestRecord>(
        `/conversations/${conversationId}/requests/${requestId}`,
        {
          headers: withAuth(),
        }
      ),

    retryConversationRequest: (conversationId: string, requestId: string) =>
      request<SendMessageResult>(
        `/conversations/${conversationId}/requests/${requestId}/retry`,
        {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: withAuth(),
        }
      ),

    getConversationInvestigationSummary: (conversationId: string) =>
      request<ConversationInvestigationSummaryRecord>(
        `/conversations/${conversationId}/investigation-summary`,
        {
          headers: withAuth(),
        }
      ),

shouldShowJiraFollowUp = computed(() => {\n+  const followUp = jiraFollowUp.value\n+  return (\n+    !isWorking.value &&\n+    Boolean(followUp) &&\n+    followUp?.status !== 'skipped' &&\n+    followUp?.classification !== 'none'\n+  )\n+})\n+const jiraClassificationLabel = computed(() => {\n+  const labels = {\n+    bug: 'Bug',\n+    optimization: 'Optimization',\n+    requirement: 'Requirement',\n+    none: 'None',\n+  } as const\n+  return labels[jiraFollowUp.value?.classification || 'none']\n+})\n+const jiraCardTitle = computed(() => {\n+  const followUp = jiraFollowUp.value\n+  if (!followUp) return 'Jira follow-up'\n+  if (createdJiraIssue.value) return `Jira created: ${createdJiraIssue.value.key}`\n+  if (followUp.status === 'similar_found') return 'Similar Jira already exists'\n+  if (followUp.status === 'draft_ready') return 'Jira issue draft'\n+  if (followUp.status === 'error') return 'Jira follow-up failed'\n+  return 'Jira follow-up'\n+})\n+const canCreateJiraIssue = computed(() => {\n+  const draft = jiraFollowUp.value?.issueDraft\n+  return (\n+    Boolean(props.message.conversationId) &&\n+    Boolean(props.message.runId) &&\n+    jiraFollowUp.value?.status === 'draft_ready' &&\n+    Boolean(draft?.canCreate) &&\n+    !createdJiraIssue.value\n+  )\n+})\n*** End Patch"

import type { AppConfig } from './app-config';

describe('appConfig', () => {
  const originalEnv = process.env;

  const loadAppConfig = (): AppConfig => {
    jest.doMock('./env-loader', () => ({
      loadEnvFiles: jest.fn(),
    }));
    /* eslint-disable @typescript-eslint/no-require-imports */
    const { appConfig } =
      require('./app-config') as typeof import('./app-config');
    /* eslint-enable @typescript-eslint/no-require-imports */
    jest.dontMock('./env-loader');
    return appConfig;
  };

  beforeEach(() => {
    jest.resetModules();
    process.env = {
      ...originalEnv,
      HOST: ' 0.0.0.0 ',

  it('should default runtime fields without explicit config', () => {
    process.env = {
      NODE_ENV: originalEnv.NODE_ENV,
    };
    jest.resetModules();

    const appConfig = loadAppConfig();

    expect(appConfig.queryPlanner).toEqual({
      mode: 'llm-only',
    });
    expect(appConfig.realtime).toEqual({
      socketRedisAdapterEnabled: false,
      socketRedisUrl: undefined,
    });
    expect(appConfig.aiRuntime).toEqual({
      provider: 'codex',
      workspaceDir: process.cwd(),
      model: undefined,
      timeoutMs: undefined,
      maxConcurrentInvocations: 2,
      maxGlobalConcurrentRuns: 12,
      codex: {
        home: undefined,
        baseUrl: undefined,
        authToken: ********************************
        wireApi: undefined,
        model: undefined,

import { loadEnvFiles } from './env-loader';
import {
  normalizeOptionalRuntimePath,
  resolveRuntimePath,
} from './runtime-environment';

loadEnvFiles();

export interface AppConfig {
  host: string;
  port: number;
  logLevel: string;
  enableDebugResponse: boolean;
  remotePluginDefaultTimeoutMs?: number;
  auth: ********************************
  database: DatabaseConfig;
  databaseBackup: DatabaseBackupConfig;
  acpEvents: AcpEventStorageConfig;
  realtime: RealtimeConfig;
  queryPlanner: QueryPlannerConfig;
  aiRuntime: AiRuntimeConfig;
  requestIsolation: RequestIsolationConfig;
  codeRepos: CodeReposConfig;
  jira: JiraConfig;
  intercom: IntercomConfig;
  feishuNotifications: FeishuNotificationsConfig;
  feishuDocuments: FeishuDocumentsConfig;
  cdn: CdnConfig;
}

export interface AuthConfig {
  tokenTtlHours: ********************************
  defaultUserId: string;
  defaultUserName: string;
  defaultRoles: string[];
  defaultSourceIdentity: string;
  /** env whitelist,匹配到直接视为 admin,绕开 users.roles */
  adminUserIds: string[];
  ldap: LdapAuthConfig;
  feishu: FeishuAuthConfig;
}

export interface LdapAuthConfig {
  enabled: boolean;
  url?: string;
  bindDn?: string;
  bindPassword?: string;
  searchBase?: string;
  searchFilter: string;
  displayNameAttribute: string;
  adminUsers: string[];
  adminGroups: string[];
  pluginIds: string[];
  timeoutMs: number;
  connectTimeoutMs: number;
}

export type FeishuUserIdField =
  | 'email'
  | 'email_localpart'
  | 'union_id'
  | 'open_id';

export interface FeishuAuthConfig {
  enabled: boolean;
  appId?: string;
  appSecret?: string;
  redirectUri?: string;
  frontendCallbackUrl?: string;
  allowedTenantKeys: string[];
  userIdField: FeishuUserIdField;
  adminUsers: string[];

export interface DatabaseConfig {

  poolQueueLimit: number;
}

export interface DatabaseBackupConfig {

}

export interface AcpEventStorageConfig {
  payloadStorage: 'database' | 'filesystem';
  filesystemDir: string;
}

export interface RealtimeConfig {
  socketRedisAdapterEnabled: boolean;
  socketRedisUrl?: string;
}

export type QueryPlannerMode = 'rules' | 'hybrid' | 'llm-only';
export type AiRuntimeProviderType = 'codex';

function parseNumber(value: string | undefined, fallback: number): number {
  if (!value) {
    return fallback;
  }

  const parsed = Number.parseInt(value, 10);
  return Number.isNaN(parsed) ? fallback : parsed;
}

function parseOptionalNumber(value: string | undefined): number | undefined {
  if (!value) {
    return undefined;
  }

  const parsed = Number.parseInt(value, 10);

  if (Number.isNaN(parsed) || parsed <= 0) {
    return undefined;
  }

  return parsed;
}

function parseOptionalNonNegativeNumber(
  value: string | undefined,
