Output:
import type { AcpEvent, AcpStepCompleted } from './models';

const MAX_DELTA_CHARS = 64_000;
const MAX_STEP_TEXT_CHARS = 512_000;
const MAX_RUN_FINAL_TEXT_CHARS = 256_000;
const MAX_MESSAGE_CHARS = 16_000;
const MAX_PREVIEW_CHARS = 4_000;
const MAX_PATH_CHARS = 4_096;
const MAX_STRUCTURED_STRING_CHARS = 2_048;
const MAX_STRUCTURED_DEPTH = 4;
const MAX_STRUCTURED_ITEMS = 40;

export function truncateAcpEventForStorage(event: AcpEvent): AcpEvent {
  switch (event.kind) {
    case 'run.completed':
      return {
        ...event,
        finalText: truncateOptionalString(
          event.finalText,
          MAX_RUN_FINAL_TEXT_CHARS,
        ),
      };
    case 'run.failed':
    case 'conversation.failed':
    case 'error':
      return {
        ...event,
        message: truncateString(event.message, MAX_MESSAGE_CHARS),
      };
    case 'step.started':
      return {
        ...event,
        title: truncateOptionalString(event.title, MAX_PREVIEW_CHARS),
        toolName: truncateOptionalString(event.toolName, 512),
        serverId: truncateOptionalString(event.serverId, 512),
        command: truncateOptionalString(event.command, MAX_PREVIEW_CHARS),
        arguments: truncateStructuredValue(event.arguments),
      };
    case 'step.delta':
      return {
        ...event,
        delta: truncateString(event.delta, MAX_DELTA_CHARS),
        contentSoFar: undefined,
      };
    case 'step.completed':
      return truncateStepCompletedForStorage(event);
    case 'gate.requested':
      return {
        ...event,
        title: truncateOptionalString(event.title, MAX_PREVIEW_CHARS),
        payload: truncateStructuredValue(event.payload) ?? {},
      };
    case 'gate.resolved':
      return {
        ...event,
        response: truncateStructuredValue(event.response) ?? {},
      };
    case 'artifact.created':
      return {
        ...event,
        label: truncateOptionalString(event.label, 512),
        filePath: truncateOptionalString(event.filePath, MAX_PATH_CHARS),
        preview: truncateOptionalString(event.preview, MAX_PREVIEW_CHARS),
      };
    default:
      return event;
  }
}

function truncateStepCompletedForStorage(
  event: AcpStepCompleted,
): AcpStepCompleted {
  const text = event.text;
  const truncatedText = truncateOptionalString(text, MAX_STEP_TEXT_CHARS);
  const textWasTruncated =
    typeof text === 'string' && typeof truncatedText === 'string'
      ? truncatedText.length < text.length
      : false;
  const textByteCo

[... truncated 4 characters ...]

'error',
]);

export function isAcpEventKind(value: string): value is AcpEventKind {
  return KNOWN_KINDS.has(value as AcpEventKind);
}

export function serializeAcpEvent(event: AcpEvent): {
  conversationId: string;
  requestId: string | null;
  runId: string | null;
  sequenceNo: number;
  kind: AcpEventKind;
  payload: Record<string, unknown>;
  occurredAt: Date;
} {
  return {
    conversationId: event.conversationId,
    requestId: event.requestId ?? null,
    runId: event.runId ?? null,
    sequenceNo: event.sequence,
    kind: event.kind,
    payload: event as unknown as Record<string, unknown>,
    occurredAt: new Date(event.occurredAt),
  };
}

export function deserializeAcpEvent(row: AcpEventDbRow): AcpEvent {
  if (!isAcpEventKind(row.kind)) {
    throw new Error(`Unknown ACP event kind in DB row: ${row.kind}`);
  }
  const payload = row.payload ?? {};
  // payload 里一般已经有全部字段,但做次兜底避免 row 污染
  const occurredAt =
    row.occurredAt instanceof Date
      ? row.occurredAt.toISOString()
      : new Date(row.occurredAt).toISOString();
  return {
    ...payload,
    kind: row.kind,
    sequence: Number(row.sequenceNo),
    conversationId: row.conversationId,
    requestId:
      row.requestId ??
      (typeof payload.requestId === 'string' ? payload.requestId : undefined),
    runId: row.runId ?? undefined,
    occurredAt,
  } as AcpEvent;
}

import { BadRequestException, Injectable, Logger } from '@nestjs/common';
import {
  appConfig,
  resolveRuntimeModelForProvider,
} from '../shared/app-config';
import type { AcpEvent, InvestigationConfidenceAssessment } from '../acp/models';
import { formatLog } from '../shared/logging';
import { redactSensitiveText } from '../shared/sensitive-redaction';
import { AcpPublisherService } from './acp-publisher.service';
import { ConversationService } from './conversation.service';

export type JiraFollowUpClassification =
  | 'none'
  | 'bug'
  | 'optimization'
  | 'requirement';

export interface JiraSimilarIssueRecord {
  key: string;
  summary: string;
  status?: string;
  issueType?: string;
  assignee?: string;
  updated?: string;
  url: string;
}

export interface JiraIssueDraftRecord {
  projectKey: string;
  issueTypeId: string;
  issueTypeName: string;
  summary: string;
  description: string;
  components: string[];
  missingFields: string[];
  canCreate: boolean;
  disabledReason?: string;
}

export interface JiraCreatedIssueRecord {
  key: string;
  id?: string;
  self?: string;
  url: string;
}

export interface JiraFollowUpRecord {
  status:
    | 'similar_found'
    | 'draft_ready'
    | 'created'
    | 'error'
    | 'skipped';
  classification: JiraFollowUpClassification;
  confidence: number;
  title: string;
  detailSummary: string;
  reason?: string;
  searchKeywords: string[];
  similarIssues: JiraSimilarIssueRecord[];
  issueDraft?: JiraIssueDraftRecord;
  createdIssue?: JiraCreatedIssueRecord;
  errorMessage?: string;
  analyzedAt: string;
}

interface RunAfterCompletionInput {
  conversationId: string;
  requestId?: string;
  runId: string;
  userMessage: string;
  assistantText: string;
  events: AcpEvent[];
  assessment?: InvestigationConfidenceAssessment;
}

interface AiJiraAnalysis {
  classification: JiraFollowUpClassification;
  confidence?: number;
  title?: string;
  detailSummary?: string;
  actualBehavior?: string;
  expectedBehavior?: string;
  reproductionSteps?: string[];
  impact?: string;
  evidence?: string[];
  issueTypeHint?: string;
  componentHint?: string;
  searchKeywords?: string[];
  reason?: string;
}

interface ResponsesApiResult {
  output_text?: unknown;
  output?: unknown;
}

interface ChatCompletionsResult {
  choices?: Array<{
    message?: {
      content?: unknown;
    };
  }>;
}

interface JiraSearchResult {
  issues?: JiraIssueJson[];
}

interface JiraIssueJson {
  id?: string;
  key?: string;

    const createdIssue = await this.createIssue(followUp.issueDraft);
    const updated: JiraFollowUpRecord = {
      ...followUp,
      status: 'created',
      createdIssue,
      analyzedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    };
    await this.publisher.publish({
      event: {
        kind: 'artifact.created',
        conversationId: input.conversationId,
        runId: input.runId,
        itemId: `jira-follow-up:${input.runId}`,
        artifactKind: 'jira_follow_up',
        label: 'Jira follow-up',
        preview: `Created Jira ${createdIssue.key}`,
        payload: updated as unknown as Record<string, unknown>,
      },
    });
    return createdIssue;
  }

  private canRun(input: RunAfterCompletionInput): boolean {
    if (!appConfig.jira.enabled || !appConfig.jira.followUpEnabled) {
      return false;
    }
    const config = appConfig.aiRuntime.codex;
    if (!resolveRuntimeModelForProvider('codex') || !config.baseUrl || !config.authToken) {
      return false;
    }
    const text = `${input.userMessage}\n${input.assistantText}`.toLowerCase();
    if (input.assessment && input.assessment.score >= 55) {
      return true;
    }
    return /bug|报错|异常|失败|不可用|优化|需求|feature|requirement|复现|根因|排查/.test(
      text,
    );

    );
  }

  private async buildFollowUp(
    input: RunAfterCompletionInput,
  ): Promise<JiraFollowUpRecord | undefined> {
    const analysis = await this.analyze(input);
    if (analysis.classification === 'none' || (analysis.confidence ?? 0) < 0.45) {
      return {
        status: 'skipped',
        classification: 'none',
        confidence: analysis.confidence ?? 0,
        title: analysis.title || '',
        detailSummary: analysis.reason || '当前结论不需要创建 Jira。',
        reason: analysis.reason,
        searchKeywords: [],
        similarIssues: [],
        analyzedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      };
    }

    const projectKey = this.resolveProjectKey(input, analysis);
    if (!projectKey) {
      return this.errorRecord(
        analysis,
        '无法确定 Jira project key。请配置 JIRA_PROJECT，或在上下文中明确项目。',
      );
    }

    const searchKeywords = normalizeKeywords(analysis.searchKeywords);
    const similarIssues = await this.searchSimilarIssues({
      projectKey,
      keywords: searchKeywords,
    });
    const baseRecord = this.baseRecord(analysis, searchKeywords);

    if (similarIssues.length > 0) {
      return {
        ...baseRecord,
        status: 'similar_found',
        similarIssues,
      };
    }

    const draft = await this.buildIssueDraft({
      projectKey,
      analysis,
    });
    return {
      ...baseRecord,
      status: 'draft_ready',
      similarIssues: [],
      issueDraft: draft,
    };
  }

  private async analyze(input: RunAfterCompletionInput): Promise<AiJiraAnalysis> {
    const model = resolveRuntimeModelForProvider('codex');
    const config = appConfig.aiRuntime.codex;
    if (!model || !config.baseUrl || !config.authToken) {
      return { classification: 'none', confidence: 0, reason: 'AI config missing' };
    }

    const prompt = JSON.stringify(
      {
        userMessage: input.userMessage,
        finalAnswer: truncate(input.assistantText, 9000),
        investigationAssessment: input.assessment,
        evidenceEvents: summarizeEvidenceEvents(input.events),
      },
      null,
      2,
    );
    const responsesText = await this.tryGenerateWithResponsesApi({
      model,
      baseUrl: config.baseUrl,
      authToken: ********************************
      prompt,
    });
    const responsesAnalysis = parseAnalysisJson(responsesText);
    if (responsesAnalysis) {
      return responsesAnalysis;
    }

    const chatText = await this.tryGenerateWithChatCompletionsApi({
      model,
      baseUrl:

[... truncated 3 characters ...]

t: JiraIssueDraftRecord,
  ): Promise<JiraCreatedIssueRecord> {
    const fields: Record<string, unknown> = {
      project: { key: draft.projectKey },
      issuetype: { id: draft.issueTypeId },
      summary: draft.summary,
      description: draft.description,
    };
    if (draft.components.length > 0) {
      fields.components = draft.components.map((name) => ({ name }));
    }
    const created = await this.jiraRequest<JiraCreateResult>({
      method: 'POST',
      path: '/rest/api/2/issue',
      body: { fields },
    });
    const key = created.key?.trim();
    if (!key) {
      throw new BadRequestException('Jira create succeeded but did not return an issue key.');
    }
    return {
      key,
      id: created.id,
      self: created.self,
      url: this.issueUrl(key),
    };
  }

  private async findLatestFollowUp(input: {
    conversationId: string;
    runId: string;
  }): Promise<JiraFollowUpRecord | undefined> {
    const events = await this.conversationService.listEvents(input.conversationId);
    const event = [...events].reverse().find(
      (item) =>
        item.kind === 'artifact.created' &&
        item.runId === input.runId &&
        item.artifactKind === 'jira_follow_up' &&
        isRecord(item.payload),
    );
    if (!event || event.kind !== 'artifact.created' || !isRecord(event.payload)) {
      return undefined;

Output:
  value: string | undefined,
): number | undefined {
  if (!value) {
    return undefined;
  }

  const parsed = Number.parseInt(value, 10);

  if (Number.isNaN(parsed) || parsed < 0) {
    return undefined;
  }

  return parsed;
}

function parseBoolean(value: string | undefined, fallback: boolean): boolean {
  if (value === undefined) {
    return fallback;
  }

  return value === 'true';
}

function parseQueryPlannerMode(value: string | undefined): QueryPlannerMode {
  if (value === 'rules') {
    return 'rules';
  }

  if (value === 'hybrid') {
    return 'hybrid';
  }

  if (value === 'llm-only') {
    return 'llm-only';
  }

  return 'llm-only';
}

function parseAiRuntimeProvider(
  value: string | undefined,
): AiRuntimeProviderType {
  const normalized = parseString(value);

  if (!normalized || normalized === 'codex') {
    return 'codex';
  }

  throw new Error(
    `Unsupported AI_RUNTIME_PROVIDER: ${normalized}. Supported value: codex.`,
  );
}

function parseCdnProvider(value: string | undefined): CdnProviderType {
  const normalized = parseString(value);

  if (!normalized || normalized === 'none') {
    return 'none';
  }

  if (normalized === 'tcloud') {
    return 'tcloud';
  }

  throw new Error(
    `Unsupported CDN_TYPE: ${normalized}. Supported values: none, tcloud.`,
  );
}

function parseFeishuUserIdField(value: string | undefined): FeishuUserIdField {
  if (value === 'email') {
    return 'email';
  }

  if (value === 'union_id') {
    return 'union_id';
  }

  if (value === 'open_id') {
    return 'open_id';
  }

  return 'email_localpart';
}

function parseJiraApiVersion(value: string | undefined): '2' | '3' {
  return parseString(value) === '3' ? '3' : '2';
}

function parseJiraAuthMethod(
  value: string | undefined,
): JiraConfig['authMethod'] {
  const normalized = parseString(value)?.toLowerCase();
  if (normalized === 'bearer' || normalized === 'cookie') {
    return normalized;
  }
  if (normalized === 'basic') {
    return 'basic';
  }
  return undefined;
}

function parseString(value: string | undefined): string | undefined {
  if (!value) {
    return undefined;
  }

  const trimmed = value.trim();
  return trimmed.length > 0 ? trimmed : undefined;
}

function parseResolvedPath(value: string | undefined): string | undefined {
  return normalizeOptionalRuntimePath(parseString(value));
}

function parseCsvList(value: string | undefined, fallback: string[]): string[] {
  if (!value) {
    return [...fallback];
  }

import {

  DialogContent,

} from '@/components/ui/dialog'

import ChatMarkdown from '~/components/chat/ChatMarkdown.vue'

import { useChatStore } from '~/stores/chat'
import type {

  ChatExecutionSegment,
  ChatMessageViewModel,
  ChatTranscriptSegment,
} from '~/stores/chat'

const props = defineProps<{
  message: ChatMessageViewModel

  requestDetail?: string
  compactTranscript?: boolean
}>()
const emit = defineEmits<{
  requestExecutionDetails: []
}>()

const api = useApi()
const chat = useChatStore()
const isWorking = computed(() => props.message.pending === true)
const transcript = computed(() => props.message.transcript ?? [])
const hasTranscript = computed(() => transcript.value.length > 0)
const executionSummary = computed(() => props.message.executionSummary)
const hasLazyExecutionSummary = computed(
  () => !hasTranscript.value && (executionSummary.value?.itemCount ?? 0) > 0
)
const executionSegments = computed<ChatExecutionSegment[]>(() =>
  transcript.value.filter(isExecutionSegment)
)
type TranscriptRenderItem =
  | {
      type: 'assistant_text'
      segment: ChatAssistantTextSegment
    }
  | {
      type: 'execution_group'
      id: string
      segments: ChatExecutionSegment[]
    }

const expandedExecutionGroups = reactive(new Set<string>())
const transcriptRenderItems = computed<TranscriptRenderItem[]>(() => {
  const items: TranscriptRenderItem[] = []
  let pendingExecutions: ChatExecutionSegment[] = []

  const flushExecutions = () => {
    if (!pendingExecutions.length) {
      return
    }
    items.push({
      type: 'execution_group',
      id: `execution-group:${pendingExecutions[0]?.id}`,
      segments: pendingExecutions,
    })
    pendingExecutions = []
  }

  for (const segment of transcript.value) {
    if (isExecutionSegment(segment)) {
      pendingExecutions.push(segment)
      continue
    }

    flushExecutions()
    items.push({
      type: 'assistant_text',
      segment,
    })
  }

  flushExecutions()
  return items
})

const finalAssistantTextSegments = computed(() => {

    return []
  }

  const items = transcriptRenderItems.value
  const lastExecutionGroupIndex = items.findLastIndex((item) => item.type === 'execution_group')

  if (lastExecutionGroupIndex < 0) {

  private async publishFollowUp(
    input: RunAfterCompletionInput,
    followUp: JiraFollowUpRecord,
  ): Promise<void> {
    await this.publisher.publish({
      event: {
        kind: 'artifact.created',
        conversationId: input.conversationId,
        requestId: input.requestId,
        runId: input.runId,
        itemId: `jira-follow-up:${input.runId}`,
        artifactKind: 'jira_follow_up',
        label: 'Jira follow-up',
        preview: previewForFollowUp(followUp),
        payload: followUp as unknown as Record<string, unknown>,
      },
    });
  }

  private baseRecord(
    analysis: AiJiraAnalysis,
    searchKeywords: string[],
  ): Omit<JiraFollowUpRecord, 'status' | 'similarIssues'> {
    return {
      classification: analysis.classification,
      confidence: clampNumber(analysis.confidence, 0, 1) ?? 0,
      title: sanitizeSummary(analysis.title),
      detailSummary: analysis.detailSummary?.trim() || analysis.reason || '',
      reason: analysis.reason,
      searchKeywords,
      analyzedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    };
  }

  private errorRecord(
    analysis: AiJiraAnalysis,
    message: string,
  ): JiraFollowUpRecord {
    return {
      ...this.baseRecord(analysis, normalizeKeywords(analysis.searchKeywords)),
      status: 'error',
      similarIssues: [],
      errorMessage: message,
    };
  }

  private async jiraRequest<T>(input: {
    method: 'GET' | 'POST';
    path: string;
    body?: unknown;
  }): Promise<T> {
    const baseUrl = appConfig.jira.baseUrl?.replace(/\/+$/, '');
    if (!baseUrl) {
      throw new BadRequestException('Jira base URL is not configured.');
    }
    const headers: Record<string, string> = {
      Accept: 'application/json',
    };
    if (input.body !== undefined) {
      headers['Content-Type'] = 'application/json';
    }
    applyJiraAuthHeaders(headers);

    const response = await fetch(`${baseUrl}${input.path}`, {
      method: input.method,
      headers,
      body: input.body === undefined ? undefined : JSON.stringify(input.body),
      signal: AbortSignal.timeout(appConfig.jira.httpTimeoutMs),
    });
    const text = await response.text();
    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(
        `Jira HTTP ${response.status}: ${redactSensitiveText(text).slice(0, 600)}`,
      );
    }
    if (!text.trim()) {
      return {} as T;
    }
    return JSON.parse(text) as T;
  }

  priva

[... truncated 4 characters ...]

in('\n');
}

function disabledDraft(
  input: { projectKey: string; analysis: AiJiraAnalysis },
  issueTypeId: string,
  issueTypeName: string,
  reason: string,
): JiraIssueDraftRecord {
  return {
    projectKey: input.projectKey,
    issueTypeId,
    issueTypeName,
    summary: sanitizeSummary(input.analysis.title),
    description: buildDescription(input.analysis),
    components: [],
    missingFields: [reason],
    canCreate: false,
    disabledReason: reason,
  };
}

function normalizeKeywords(value: string[] | undefined): string[] {
  const seen = new Set<string>();
  return (value ?? [])
    .map((item) => item.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim())
    .filter((item) => item.length >= 2 && item.length <= 80)
    .filter((item) => {
      const key = item.toLowerCase();
      if (seen.has(key)) return false;
      seen.add(key);
      return true;
    })
    .slice(0, 5);
}

function sanitizeSummary(value: string | undefined): string {
  const normalized = (value || '待创建 Jira 单').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
  return truncate(normalized, 120);
}

function quoteJqlText(value: string): string {
  return `"${value.replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/"/g, '\\"')}"`;
}

function previewForFollowUp(followUp: JiraFollowUpRecord): string {
  if (followUp.status === 'similar_found') {
    return `Found ${followUp.similarIssues.length} similar Jira issue(s).`;

Output:
    ? `Update existing experience document: ${experienceDocumentId.value}`
    : 'Save this investigation as an experience document.'
})

const feishuTooltipText = computed(() => {
  if (exportingFeishu.value) return 'Exporting Feishu document.'
  if (feishuExportError.value) return feishuExportError.value
  if (feishuExportDocumentId.value) {
    return feishuExportUrl.value
      ? `Open exported Feishu document: ${feishuExportUrl.value}`
      : `Exported Feishu document: ${feishuExportDocumentId.value}`
  }
  return 'Export this answer to a Feishu document.'
})

const paperTooltipText = computed(() => {
  if (generatingPaper.value || paperStatus.value === 'running') return 'Generating Paper.'
  if (loadingPaper.value) return 'Opening generated Paper.'
  if (paperError.value) return paperError.value
  if (paperStatus.value === 'completed') return 'Open generated Paper.'
  return 'Generate a Paper from this answer.'
})

const conclusionText = computed(() => {
  const segments = visibleFinalAssistantTextSegments.value
    .map((segment) => segment.content.trim())
    .filter(Boolean)
  return segments.join('\n\n') || props.message.content.trim()
})
const jiraFollowUp = computed(() => props.message.jiraFollowUp)
const createdJiraIssue = computed(
  () => localCreatedJiraIssue.value || jiraFollowUp.value?.createdIssue || null
)
const shouldShowJiraFollowUp = computed(() => {
  const followUp = jiraFollowUp.value
  return (
    !isWorking.value &&
    Boolean(followUp) &&
    followUp?.status !== 'skipped' &&
    followUp?.classification !== 'none'
  )
})
const jiraClassificationLabel = computed(() => {
  const labels = {
    bug: 'Bug',
    optimization: 'Optimization',
    requirement: 'Requirement',
    none: 'None',
  } as const
  return labels[jiraFollowUp.value?.classification || 'none']
})
const jiraCardTitle = computed(() => {
  const followUp = jiraFollowUp.value
  if (!followUp) return 'Jira follow-up'
  if (createdJiraIssue.value) return `Jira created: ${createdJiraIssue.value.key}`
  if (followUp.status === 'similar_found') return 'Similar Jira already exists'
  if (followUp.status === 'draft_ready') return 'Jira issue draft'
  if (followUp.status === 'error') return 'Jira follow-up failed'
  return 'Jira follow-up'
})
const canCreateJiraIssue = computed(() => {
  const draft = jiraFollowUp.value?.issueDraft
  return (
    Boolean(props.message.conversationId) &&
    Boolean(props.message.runId) &&
    jiraFollowUp.value?.status === 'draft_ready' &&
    Boolean(draft?.canCreate) &&
    !createdJiraIssue.value
  )
})

function isAssistantTextSegment(
  segment: ChatTranscriptSegment
): segment is ChatAssistantTextSegment {
  return segment.type === 'assistant_text'
}

function isExecutionSegment(segment: ChatTranscriptSegment): segment is ChatExecutionSegment {
  return segment.type === 'execution'
}

  textarea.setAttribute('readonly', '')
  textarea.style.position = 'fixed'
  textarea.style.left = '-9999px'
  textarea.style.top = '0'
  document.body.appendChild(textarea)
  textarea.select()

  try {
    if (!document.execCommand('copy')) {
      throw new Error('copy command failed')
    }
  } finally {
    document.body.removeChild(textarea)
  }
}

async function createJiraIssue() {
  const conversationId = props.message.conversationId
  const runId = props.message.runId
  if (!conversationId || !runId || !canCreateJiraIssue.value || creatingJiraIssue.value) {
    return
  }

  creatingJiraIssue.value = true
  jiraCreateError.value = ''
  try {
    const result = await api.createJiraIssueFromFollowUp({ conversationId, runId })
    localCreatedJiraIssue.value = result.issue
  } catch (error) {
    jiraCreateError.value =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Failed to create Jira issue.'
  } finally {
    creatingJiraIssue.value = false
  }
}

async function openExperienceConfirm() {
  if (!canCreateExperience.value || savingExperience.value || loadingExistingExperience.value) {
    return
  }
  experienceError.value = ''
  if (!experienceLookupLoaded.value) {
    experienceLookupLoaded.value = true
    await loadExistingExperienceDocument()

Output:
  similarIssues: JiraSimilarIssueRecord[]
  issueDraft?: JiraIssueDraftRecord
  createdIssue?: JiraCreatedIssueRecord
  errorMessage?: string
  analyzedAt: string
}

export interface CreateJiraIssueResult {
  issue: JiraCreatedIssueRecord
}

export interface ConversationMessageRecord {
  id: string
  conversationId?: string
  requestId?: string
  runId?: string
  role: 'user' | 'assistant' | 'system'
  content: string
  attachments?: QueryImageAttachmentRecord[]
  createdAt: string
  runDurationMs?: number
  completedAt?: string
  pending?: boolean
  errorMessage?: string
  experienceAssessment?: InvestigationConfidenceAssessment
  jiraFollowUp?: JiraFollowUpRecord
  executionSummary?: ConversationExecutionSummaryRecord
}

export interface ConversationMessagesResponse {
  messages: ConversationMessageRecord[]
  lastSequence: number
}

export interface ListConversationRequestsResponse {
  items: ConversationRequestRecord[]
}

export type InvestigationStage = 'intake' | 'evidence' | 'analysis' | 'result'

export interface InvestigationAssetRecord {
  id: string
  type: 'image' | 'file' | 'feishu' | 'link'
  label: string
  detail: string
  href?: string
}

export interface InvestigationEvidenceRecord {
  id: string
  title: string
  detail?: string
  status: 'running' | 'completed' | 'error' | 'cancelled'
  sequence?: number
}

export interface ConversationInvestigationSummaryRecord {
  conversationId: string
  sourceSequence: number
  stage: InvestigationStage
  problemText?: string

import { BadRequestException, Injectable, Logger } from '@nestjs/common';
import {
  appConfig,
  resolveRuntimeModelForProvider,
} from '../shared/app-config';
import type {
  AcpEvent,
  InvestigationConfidenceAssessment,
} from '../acp/models';
import { formatLog } from '../shared/logging';
import { redactSensitiveText } from '../shared/sensitive-redaction';
import { AcpPublisherService } from './acp-publisher.service';
import { ConversationService } from './conversation.service';

export type JiraFollowUpClassification =
  | 'none'
  | 'bug'
  | 'optimization'
  | 'requirement';

export interface JiraSimilarIssueRecord {
  key: string;
  summary: string;
  status?: string;
  issueType?: string;
  assignee?: string;
  updated?: string;
  url: string;

tool_output

{
  "cmd": "sed -n '870,905p' src/application/jira-follow-up.service.ts",
  "workdir": "/Users/norvan/Developer/tool/dw-context/dw-context-server",

  "max_output_tokens": 6000
}

Result

Chunk ID: b378a0
Wall time: 0.0000 seconds
Process exited with code 0
Original token count: 261
Output:
  }
}

function summarizeEvidenceEvents(
  events: AcpEvent[],
): Array<Record<string, string>> {
  return events
    .filter(
      (event) =>
        event.kind === 'step.completed' &&
        event.stepKind !== 'agent_message' &&
        event.stepKind !== 'reasoning',
    )
    .slice(-12)
    .map((event) => ({
      kind: event.stepKind,
      status: event.status,
      preview: truncate(
        event.textSummary || event.resultPreview || event.text || '',
        500,
      ),
      error: truncate(event.errorMessage || '', 240),
    }));
}

function issueTypeCandidates(analysis: AiJiraAnalysis): string[] {
  const hint = analysis.issueTypeHint?.trim();
  if (analysis.classification === 'bug') {
    return [hint, 'Bug', '缺陷', 'Task', '任务'].filter(Boolean) as string[];
  }
  if (analysis.classification === 'optimization') {
    return [hint, 'Improvement', '改进', 'Task', '任务'].filter(
      Boolean,
    ) as string[];
  }
  return [hint, 'Story', '需求', 'Task', '任务'].filter(Boolean) as string[];

    --patch-with-stat     synonym for '-p --stat'
    --numstat             machine friendly --stat
    --shortstat           output only the last line of --stat
    -X, --dirstat[=<param1>,<param2>...]
                          output the distribution of relative amount of changes for each sub-directory
    --cumulative          synonym for --dirstat=cumulative
    --dirstat-by-file[=<param1>,<param2>...]
                          synonym for --dirstat=files,<param1>,<param2>...
    --check               warn if changes introduce conflict markers or whitespace errors
    --summary             condensed summary such as creations, renames and mode changes
    --name-only           show only names of changed files
    --name-status         show only names and status of changed files
    --stat[=<width>[,<name-width>[,<count>]]]
                          generate diffstat
    --stat-width <width>  generate diffstat with a given width
    --stat-name-width <width>
                          generate diffstat with a given name width
    --stat-graph-width <width>
                          generate diffstat with a given graph width
    --stat-count <count>  generate diffstat with limited lines
    --[no-]compact-summary
                          generate compact summary in diffstat
    --binary              output a binary diff that can be applied
    --[no-]full-index     show full pre- and post-image object names on the "index" lines
    --[no-]color[=<when>] show colored diff
    --ws-error-highlight <kind>
                          highlight whitespace errors in the 'context', 'old' or 'new' lines in the diff
    -z                    do not munge pathnames and use NULs as output field terminators in --raw or --numstat
    --[no-]abbrev[=<n>]   use <n> digits to display object names
    --src-prefix <prefix> show the given source prefix instead of "a/"
    --dst-prefix <prefix> s

[... truncated 5 characters ...]

]

comparing binary files
    --ignore-submodules[=<when>]
                          ignore changes to submodules in the diff generation
    --submodule[=<format>]
                          specify how differences in submodules are shown
    --ita-invisible-in-index
                          hide 'git add -N' entries from the index
    --ita-visible-in-index
                          treat 'git add -N' entries as real in the index
    -S <string>           look for differences that change the number of occurrences of the specified string
    -G <regex>            look for differences that change the number of occurrences of the specified regex
    --pickaxe-all         show all changes in the changeset with -S or -G
    --pickaxe-regex       treat <string> in -S as extended POSIX regular expression
    -O <file>             control the order in which files appear in the output
    --rotate-to <path>    show the change in the specified path first
    --skip-to <path>      skip the output to the specified path
    --find-object <object-id>
                          look for differences that change the number of occurrences of the specified object
    --diff-filter [(A|C|D|M|R|T|U|X|B)...[*]]
                          select files by diff type
    --max-depth <depth>   maximum tree depth to recurse
    --output <file>       output to a specific file

import { existsSync } from 'node:fs'
import { resolve } from 'node:path'

import { config as loadDotenv } from 'dotenv'
import tailwindcss from '@tailwindcss/vite'

const runtimeEnv =
  (globalThis as { process?: { env?: Record<string, string | undefined> } }).process?.env ?? {}
const envName = runtimeEnv.ENV_NAME?.trim()
const envFileName =
  envName === 'dev' || envName === 'prod' ? `.env.${envName}` : envName ? `.env.${envName}` : '.env'
const envFilePath = resolve(process.cwd(), envFileName)

if (!existsSync(envFilePath)) {
  throw new Error(`Missing frontend environment file: ${envFileName}`)
}

loadDotenv({
  path: envFilePath,
  override: true,
})

const env =
  (globalThis as { process?: { env?: Record<string, string | undefined> } }).process?.env ?? {}

function readEnv(key: string) {
  const value = env[key]?.trim()
  return value || undefined
}

function readBoolean(key: string, fallback: boolean) {
  const value = readEnv(key)

  if (value === undefined) {
    return fallback
  }

  return value === 'true'
}

function normalizeBaseUrl(value: string) {
  return value.trim().replace(/\/+$/, '')
}
const defaultBackendBaseUrl = 'https://deep-context.deepwisdom.ai'
const backendBaseUrl = normalizeBaseUrl(
  readEnv('NUXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_BASE_URL') || defaultBackendBaseUrl
)

const apiBase = `${backendBaseUrl}/api`
const socketBase = normalizeBaseUrl(readEnv('NUXT_PUBLIC_SOCKET_BASE_URL') || backendBaseUrl)
const feishuLoginEnabled = readBoolean('NUXT_PUBLIC_FEISHU_LOGIN_ENABLED', false)

// https://nuxt.com/docs/api/configuration/nuxt-config
export default defineNuxtConfig({
  compatibilityDate: '2025-07-15',
  devtools: { enabled: true },
  devServer: {
    port: 5175,
  },
  vite: {
    plugins: [tailwindcss()],
    server: {
      proxy: {
        '/api': {
          target: backendBaseUrl,
          changeOrigin: true,
          ws: true,
        },
      },
    },
  },
  nitro: {
    experimental: {
      websocket: true,
    },
  },
  modules: ['@pinia/nuxt', '@vueuse/nuxt', '@nuxtjs/color-mode', 'shadcn-nuxt', '@nuxtjs/mdc'],
  colorMode: {
    classSuffix: '',
    preference: 'light',
zsh:1: no matches found: dw-context-web/app/pages/chat/[[conversationId]].vue

              <span
                class="shrink-0 rounded-md border border-border bg-muted/30 px-1.5 py-0.5 font-mono text-[11px] text-muted-foreground"
              >
                {{ kindLabel(executionSummaryKind(executionSummary)) }}
              </span>
              <ChevronRight class="size-3.5 shrink-0" />
            </button>
          </section>

          <ChatMarkdown v-if="message.content" :content="message.content" :streaming="isWorking" />
          <p v-else-if="isWorking" class="text-sm text-muted-foreground h-[32px] flex items-center">
            Waiting for model output...
          </p>
        </div>

        <section
          v-if="shouldShowJiraFollowUp && jiraFollowUp"
          class="mt-4 rounded-lg border border-border bg-muted/20 p-3 text-sm"
        >
          <div class="flex min-w-0 items-start justify-between gap-3">
            <div class="min-w-0">
              <div class="flex min-w-0 items-center gap-2">
                <Ticket class="size-4 shrink-0 text-muted-foreground" />
                <p class="truncate font-medium text-foreground">{{ jiraCardTitle }}</p>
                <Badge variant="outline" class="h-5 rounded-md px-1.5 py-0 text-[11px]">
                  {{ jiraClassificationLabel }}
                </Badge>
              </div>
              <p
                v-if="jiraFollowUp.detailSummary || jiraFollowUp.errorMessage"
                class="mt-1 line-clamp-2 text-xs leading-5 text-muted-foreground"
              >
                {{ jiraFollowUp.errorMessage || jiraFollowUp.detailSummary }}
              </p>
            </div>

            <Button
              v-if="canCreateJiraIssue"
              type="button"
              size="sm"
              class="h-8 shrink-0 rounded-md"
              :disabled="creatingJiraIssue"
              @click="createJiraIssue"
            >
              <LoaderCircle v-if="creatingJiraIssue" class="size-3.5 animate-spin" />
              {{ creatingJiraIssue ? 'Creating' : 'Create Jira' }}
            </Button>

            <a
              v-else-if="createdJiraIssue"
              :href="createdJiraIssue.url"
              target="_blank"
              rel="noreferrer"
              class="inline-flex h-8 shrink-0 items-center gap-1.5 rounded-md border border-border px-2.5 text-xs font-medium text-foreground hover:bg-background"
            >
              Open
              <ExternalLink class="size-3.5" />
            </a>
          </div>

  if (typeof error === 'string') {
    return createApiRuntimeError(error || fallback, {
      isAuthExpired: ********************************
    })
  }

  return createApiRuntimeError(fallback)
}

function unwrapResponse<T>(payload: T): T
function unwrapResponse<T>(payload: unknown): T {
  if (isWrappedResponse<T>(payload)) {
    if (payload.code !== EResponseCode.success) {
      throw createApiRuntimeError(
        appendErrorDetails(
          payload.message || 'Request failed. Please try again later.',
          payload.details
        ),
        {
          isAuthExpired: ********************************
          details: payload.details,
        }
      )
    }
    return payload.data
  }

  return payload as T
}

export function useApi() {
  const config = useRuntimeConfig()
  const nuxtApp = useNuxtApp()
  const router = useRouter()
  const chatStore = useChatStore()
  const sessionStore = useSessionStore()

  const handleAuthExpiration = async () => {
    if (!import.meta.client) {
      return
    }

    if (authRedirectPromise) {
      await authRedirectPromise
      return
    }

    authRedirectPromise = ********************************
      .runWithContext(async () => {
        const currentPath = router.currentRoute.value.fullPath || sessionStore.landingPath
        const returnTo = resolvePostLoginPath(currentPath, '')

        disconnectSessionSocket()
        chatStore.clearAll()
        sessionStore.logout()

        const target = returnTo ? `/login?returnTo=${encodeURIComponent(returnTo)}` : '/login'

        await navigateTo(target, { replace: true })
      })
      .finally(() => {
        authRedirectPromise = ********************************
      })

    await authRedirectPromise
  }

  const handleExpiredSessionError = async (error: unknown) => {
    const normalizedError = normalizeError(error)

    if (!normalizedError.isAuthExpired) {
      return false
    }

    await handleAuthExpiration()
    return true
  }

  const request = async <T>(
    path: string,
    options: Parameters<typeof $fetch<T>>[1] & { skipAuthRedirect?: boolean } = {}
  ) => {
    const { skipAuthRedirect = false, ...fetchOptions } = options

    try {
      const response = await $fetch<T>(path, {
        baseURL: String(config.public.apiBase),
        ...fetchOptions,
      })
      return unwrapResponse<T>(response)
    } catch (error) {
      const normalizedError = normalizeError(error)

      if (!skipAuthRedirect && normalizedError.isAut

[... truncated 4 characters ...]

nId}/messages${suffix}`,
        {
          headers: withAuth(),
        }
      )
    },

    createJiraIssueFromFollowUp: (input: { conversationId: string; runId: string }) =>
      request<CreateJiraIssueResult>(
        `/conversations/${input.conversationId}/runs/${input.runId}/jira-issue`,
        {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: withAuth(),
        }
      ),

    listConversationRequests: async (conversationId: string) => {
      const response = await request<ListConversationRequestsResponse>(
        `/conversations/${conversationId}/requests`,
        {
          headers: withAuth(),
        }
      )
      return response.items
    },

    getConversationRequest: (conversationId: string, requestId: string) =>
      request<ConversationRequestRecord>(`/conversations/${conversationId}/requests/${requestId}`, {
        headers: withAuth(),
      }),

    retryConversationRequest: (conversationId: string, requestId: string) =>
      request<SendMessageResult>(`/conversations/${conversationId}/requests/${requestId}/retry`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: withAuth(),
      }),

    getConversationInvestigationSummary: (conversationId: string) =>
      request<ConversationInvestigationSummaryRecord>(
        `/conversations/${conversationId}/investigation-summary`,
        {
          headers: withAuth(),
        }

    const baseRecord = this.baseRecord(analysis, searchKeywords);

    if (similarIssues.length > 0) {
      return {
        ...baseRecord,
        status: 'similar_found',
        similarIssues,
      };
    }

    const draft = await this.buildIssueDraft({
      projectKey,
      analysis,
    });
    return {
      ...baseRecord,
      status: 'draft_ready',
      similarIssues: [],
      issueDraft: draft,
    };
  }

  private async analyze(
    input: RunAfterCompletionInput,
  ): Promise<AiJiraAnalysis> {
    const model = resolveRuntimeModelForProvider('codex');
    const config = appConfig.aiRuntime.codex;
    if (!model || !config.baseUrl || !config.authToken) {
      return {
        classification: 'none',
        confidence: 0,
        reason: 'AI config missing',
      };
    }

    const prompt = JSON.stringify(
      {
        userMessage: input.userMessage,
        finalAnswer: truncate(input.assistantText, 9000),
        investigationAssessment: input.assessment,
        evidenceEvents: summarizeEvidenceEvents(input.events),
      },
      null,
      2,
    );
    const responsesText = await this.tryGenerateWithResponsesApi({
    }

    const requiredFields = requiredCreateFields(selected);
    const componentResult = this.resolveComponents(selected, input.analysis);
    const missingFields = requiredFields
      .filter(
        (field) =>
          !['project', 'issuetype', 'summary', 'description'].includes(
            field.key,
          ),
      )
      .filter((field) => field.key !== 'components' || componentResult.missing)
      .map((field) => field.name || field.key);
    const description = buildDescription(input.analysis);
    const canCreate = missingFields.length === 0;
    return {
      projectKey: input.projectKey,
      issueTypeId: selected.id,
      issueTypeName: selected.name,
      summary: sanitizeSummary(input.analysis.title),
      description,
      components: componentResult.components,
      missingFields,
      canCreate,
      disabledReason: canCreate
        ? undefined
        : `缺少 Jira 必填字段：${missingFields.join('、')}`,
    };
  }

  private async getCreateMeta(projectKey: string): Promise<JiraCreateMeta> {
    const query = new URLSearchParams({
      projectKeys: projectKey,
      expand: 'projects.issuetypes.fields',
    });
    return this.jiraRequest<JiraCreateMeta>({
      method: 'GET',
      path: `/rest/api/2/issue/createmeta?${query.toString()}`,
    });
  }

  private selectIssueType

[... truncated 4 characters ...]

ind((item) => {
    const value = item.trim().toLowerCase();
    return (
      value === normalized ||
      value.includes(normalized) ||
      normalized.includes(value)
    );
  });
}

function buildDescription(analysis: AiJiraAnalysis): string {
  if (analysis.classification === 'requirement') {
    return [
      '## 详细描述',
      analysis.detailSummary || analysis.reason || '',
      '',
      '## 用户/场景',
      analysis.impact || '待补充',
      '',
      '## 期望能力',
      analysis.expectedBehavior || analysis.title || '待补充',
      '',
      '## 验收口径',
      '- 待补充',
      '',
      '## 补充上下文',
      ...(analysis.evidence ?? []).map((item) => `- ${item}`),
    ].join('\n');
  }

  return [
    '## 描述',
    analysis.detailSummary || analysis.reason || '',
    '',
    '## 实际表现',
    analysis.actualBehavior || '待补充',
    '',
    '## 期望表现',
    analysis.expectedBehavior || '待补充',
    '',
    '## 复现路径',
    ...(analysis.reproductionSteps?.length
      ? analysis.reproductionSteps.map((item, index) => `${index + 1}. ${item}`)
      : ['1. 待补充']),
    '',
    '## 影响范围',
    analysis.impact || '待补充',
    '',
    '## 已确认事实',
    ...(analysis.evidence?.length
      ? analysis.evidence.map((item) => `- ${item}`)
      : ['- 待补充']),
  ].join('\n');
}

  input: { projectKey: string; analysis: AiJiraAnalysis },
  issueTypeId: string,

function disabledDraft(
  input: { projectKey: string; analysis: AiJiraAnalysis },
  issueTypeId: string,
  issueTypeName: string,
  reason: string,
): JiraIssueDraftRecord {
  return {
    projectKey: input.projectKey,
    issueTypeId,
    issueTypeName,
    summary: sanitizeSummary(input.analysis.title),
    description: buildDescription(input.analysis),
    components: [],
    missingFields: [reason],
    canCreate: false,
    disabledReason: reason,
  };
}

function normalizeKeywords(value: string[] | undefined): string[] {
  const seen = new Set<string>();
  return (value ?? [])
    .map((item) => item.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim())

[]).map((item) => `- ${item}`),\n     ].join('\\n');\n@@\n     '## 复现路径',\n     ...(analysis.reproductionSteps?.length\n       ? analysis.reproductionSteps.map((item, index) => `${index + 1}. ${item}`)\n       : ['1. 待补充']),\n     '',\n+    '## 对话链接',\n+    ...conversationLines,\n+    '',\n     '## 影响范围',\n     analysis.impact || '待补充',\n@@\n   ].join('\\n');\n }\n+\n+function buildConversationLines(context?: JiraConversationContext): string[] {\n+  if (!context) {\n+    return ['- 待补充'];\n+  }\n+  return [\n+    `- ${buildConversationUrl(context)}`,\n+    `- Conversation ID: ${context.conversationId}`,\n+    `- Run ID: ${context.runId}`,\n+  ];\n+}\n+\n+function buildConversationUrl(context: JiraConversationContext): string {\n+  const encodedConversationId = encodeURIComponent(context.conversationId);\n+  const encodedRunId = encodeURIComponent(context.runId);\n+  const template = appConfig.jira.conversationUrlTemplate?.trim();\n+  if (template) {\n+    return template\n+      .replace(/\\{conversationId\\}/g, encodedConversationId)\n+      .replace(/\\{runId\\}/g, encodedRunId);\n+  }\n+  return `/chat/${encodedConversationId}?runId=${encodedRunId}`;\n+}\n \n function disabledDraft(\n-  input: { projectKey: string; analysis: AiJiraAnalysis },\n+  input: {\n+    projectKey: string;\n+    analysis: AiJiraAnalysis;\n+    conversationId?: string;\n+    runId?: string;\n+  },\n   issueTypeId: string,\n   issueTypeName: string,\n@@\n     issueTypeId,\n     issueTypeName,\n     summary: sanitizeSummary(input.analysis.title),\n-    description: buildDescription(input.analysis),\n+    description:\n+      input.conversationId && input.runId\n+        ? buildDescription(input.analysis, {\n+            conversationId: input.conversationId,\n+            runId: input.runId,\n+          })\n+        : buildDescription(input.analysis),\n*** End Patch"

function unwrapResponse<T>(payload: T): T
function unwrapResponse<T>(payload: unknown): T {
  if (isWrappedResponse<T>(payload)) {
    if (payload.code !== EResponseCode.success) {
      throw createApiRuntimeError(
        appendErrorDetails(
          payload.message || 'Request failed. Please try again later.',
          payload.details
        ),
        {
          isAuthExpired: ********************************
          details: payload.details,
        }
      )
    }
    return payload.data
  }

  return payload as T
}

README.md:225:当前 Codex 运行时与 DeepFlowCore 保持一致：运行时镜像固定使用 Codex CLI `0.121.0`，默认 `AI_RUNTIME_CODEX_WIRE_API=responses`。不要用 `latest`；等 NewAPI 的 `responses` streaming 确认稳定后，再评估升级 Codex CLI。
README.md:229:运行时镜像会安装 [`zhiyue/jira-cli`](https://github.com/zhiyue/jira-cli)，用于 agent workspace 内的 `jira-cli` skill。默认固定安装 `JIRA_CLI_VERSION=v0.1.0`；如需临时验证新版本，可以在构建时显式覆盖 `JIRA_CLI_VERSION`。构建脚本会在镜像构建后执行 `jira-cli --version` 做可用性校验。

Output:
# 简单格式：name=project/path#branch 或 name=https://...git#branch
CODE_REPOSITORIES=backend=deepwisdom/metagptx-backend#main,web=https://gitlab.example.com/deepwisdom/nuxt-mgx.git#develop

# 也支持 JSON：
# CODE_REPOSITORIES='[{"name":"backend","project":"deepwisdom/metagptx-backend","branch":"main"}]'

# 全局缓存目录；每个 conversation workspace 只软链 repos/<name>，不会重复 clone
CODE_REPO_CACHE_DIR=/data/gitlab-repos
CODE_REPO_SYNC_TIMEOUT_MS=120000
CODE_REPO_GIT_DEPTH=1
# true 时同步失败直接让本轮失败；默认 false，会在 CODE_REPOS.md 记录失败原因和 GitLab 拉取指引
CODE_REPO_SYNC_STRICT=false
```

模式说明：

- `llm-only`：只走 AI planner；planner 不可用时不执行插件
- `hybrid`：先走 AI planner，失败后回退规则规划
- `rules`：只走规则规划

代码仓库同步策略：

- 优先使用 `git clone` / `git fetch` 同步到 `CODE_REPO_CACHE_DIR`
- 如果首次 `git clone` 失败，会尝试使用 GitLab Repository Archive API 下载源码并解压，保证 Codex 至少能用 `rg` 检索文件
- 如果仍失败且 `CODE_REPO_SYNC_STRICT=false`，本轮不会中断，但 `CODE_REPOS.md` 会写入失败仓库、错误原因和可执行的 GitLab 拉取命令，Codex 不应因为 `repos/` 为空就停止排查

### Jira 配置

默认按自建 Jira 场景设计。

```bash
JIRA_BASE_URL=https://jira.example.internal
JIRA_API_VERSION=2
JIRA_EMAIL=bot@example.com
JIRA_PASSWORD=********************************
JIRA_PROJECT_KEYS=ABC,PLAT
JIRA_DEFAULT_SEARCH_LIMIT=20
JIRA_HEALTH_TIMEOUT_MS=1500
# 可选；留空表示不设置插件整体超时
# JIRA_PLUGIN_TIMEOUT_MS=15000
```

可选认证方式：

- `JIRA_USERNAME + JIRA_PASSWORD`
- `JIRA_EMAIL + JIRA_API_TOKEN`
- `JIRA_BEARER_TOKEN`

### GitLab 配置

GitLab 默认作为必搜范围之一，建议显式配置项目 ID，把搜索范围收敛到真实项目。

```bash
GITLAB_BASE_URL=https://gitlab.example.internal
GITLAB_API_VERSION=4
GITLAB_TOKEN=********************************

import { mkdtempSync, rmSync, writeFileSync } from 'node:fs';
import { tmpdir } from 'node:os';
import { join } from 'node:path';
import { loadEnvFiles } from './env-loader';

describe('loadEnvFiles', () => {
  let tempDirectory: string;

  beforeEach(() => {
    tempDirectory = mkdtempSync(join(tmpdir(), 'dw-context-server-env-'));
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    rmSync(tempDirectory, { recursive: true, force: true });
  });

  it('should load the default .env file when ENV_NAME is not set', () => {
    writeFileSync(
      join(tempDirectory, '.env'),
      [
        'PORT=3010',
        'LOG_LEVEL=info',
        'JIRA_BASE_URL=https://jira-base.example.com/',
        'QUOTED_VALUE="hello world"',
      ].join('\n'),
    );
    const env: NodeJS.ProcessEnv = {};
    const loadedFiles = loadEnvFiles({
      env,
      roots: [tempDirectory],
    });

    expect(loadedFiles).toEqual([join(tempDirectory, '.env')]);
    expect(env.PORT).toBe('3010');
    expect(env.LOG_LEVEL).toBe('info');
    expect(env.JIRA_BASE_URL).toBe('https://jira-base.example.com/');
    expect(env.QUOTED_VALUE).toBe('hello world');
  });

  it('should load the named env file when ENV_NAME is set', () => {
    writeFileSync(
      join(tempDirectory, '.env.dev'),
      ['PORT=3011', 'LOG_LEVEL=debug'].join('\n'),
    );
    writeFileSync(
      join(tempDirectory, '.env'),
      ['PORT=3010', 'LOG_LEVEL=info'].join('\n'),
    );

    const env: NodeJS.ProcessEnv = {
      ENV_NAME: 'dev',
    };
    const loadedFiles = loadEnvFiles({
      env,
      roots: [tempDirectory],
    });

    expect(loadedFiles).toEqual([join(tempDirectory, '.env.dev')]);
    expect(env.PORT).toBe('3011');
    expect(env.LOG_LEVEL).toBe('debug');
  });

  it('should return no files when a requested named env file is missing by default', () => {
    const env: NodeJS.ProcessEnv = {
      ENV_NAME: 'prod',
    };

    expect(
      loadEnvFiles({
        env,
        roots: [tempDirectory],
      }),
    ).toEqual([]);
  });

  it('should throw when strict mode is enabled and a requested named env file is missing', () => {
    const env: NodeJS.ProcessEnv = {
      ENV_NAME: 'prod',
    };

tool_output

Output:
    ([a], [b]) => a.localeCompare(b),
  );
  return `{${entries
    .map(([key, item]) => `${JSON.stringify(key)}:${stableStringify(item)}`)
    .join(',')}}`;
}

function relevantRuntimeEnv(env: NodeJS.ProcessEnv): Record<string, string> {
  const relevantPrefixes = [
    'AI_RUNTIME_',
    'CODEX_',
    'MCP_',
    'OPENAI_',
    'ANTHROPIC_',
    'HELPFLOW_',
    'JIRA_',
    'TENCENTCLOUD_',
    'KIBANA_',
    'MYSQL_',
    'MGX_',
    'INTERCOM_',
    'POSTHOG_',
  ];
  const values: Record<string, string> = {};
  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(env)) {
    if (typeof value !== 'string') continue;
    if (relevantPrefixes.some((prefix) => key.startsWith(prefix))) {
      values[key] = value;
    }
  }
  return Object.fromEntries(
    Object.entries(values).sort(([a], [b]) => a.localeCompare(b)),
  );
}

function buildCodexTurnInput(
  input: RunInput,
  workspaceDir: string,
): Array<Record<string, unknown>> {
  const prompt = buildCodexUserPrompt(
    withImageAttachmentPromptContext(input.userMessage, input.imageAttachments),
    workspaceDir,
    input.conversationContext,
  );
  const items: Array<Record<string, unknown>> = [
    { type: 'text', text: prompt, text_elements: [] },
  ];
  for (const image of input.imageAttachments ?? []) {
    items.push({
      type: 'localImage',
      path: resolve(workspaceDir, image.path),
    });
  }
  return items;
}

function buildCodexDeveloperInstructions(workspaceDir: string): string {
  return [
    `You are running inside a dw-context prepared workspace at ${workspaceDir}.`,
    'Read AGENTS.md for workspace routing before acting.',
    'Read RULES.md for behavioral constraints, SKILLS.md for skill routing, and each matching skills/<name>/SKILL.md before applying a skill.',
    DATABASE_QUERY_INSTRUCTION,
    SENSITIVE_ENV_OUTPUT_INSTRUCTION,
    FORBIDDEN_BROWSER_AUTOMATION_INSTRUCTION,
    SUPPORT_INVESTIGATION_FINAL_ANSWER_INSTRUCTION,
    'For code questions, read CODE_REPOS.md and inspect repos/<name> with rg.',
    'For support or troubleshooting, search cases/ and experience-cases/ before final conclusions, then read skills/mgx-debug/references/owner-routing.md if present and include a 建议跟进责任人 section.',
    'Use scratch/ for large temporary outputs.',
  ].join('\n');
}

function normalizeAppServerItem(
  item: Record<string, unknown>,
): Record<string, unknown> {
  return { ...item };
}

function codexUsageFromTokenUsage(
  usage: Record<string, unknown> | undefined,
): Record<str

[... truncated 4 characters ...]

insForbiddenBrowserAutomation(value: unknown): boolean {
  const text = collectRuntimeDiagnosticText(value).toLowerCase();
  return [
    'playwright',
    'chromium',
    'chrome --headless',
    'google-chrome',
    'firefox',
    'webkit',
    'browser-use',
    'browser_use',
    'puppeteer',
    'selenium',
  ].some((keyword) => text.includes(keyword));
}

function collectRuntimeDiagnosticText(value: unknown, depth = 0): string {
  if (depth > 6 || value == null) {
    return '';
  }
  if (typeof value === 'string') {
    return value;
  }
  if (typeof value === 'number' || typeof value === 'boolean') {
    return String(value);
  }
  if (Array.isArray(value)) {
    return value
      .map((item) => collectRuntimeDiagnosticText(item, depth + 1))
      .join('\n');
  }
  if (typeof value === 'object') {
    return Object.entries(value as Record<string, unknown>)
      .map(
        ([key, item]) =>
          `${key}\n${collectRuntimeDiagnosticText(item, depth + 1)}`,
      )
      .join('\n');
  }
  return '';
}

export function buildCodexProviderOverrides(
  config: CodexRuntimeConfig,
): string[] {
  const { authToken, baseUrl } = config;
  if (!baseUrl || !authToken) {
    return [];
  }
  const normalizedBaseUrl = normalizeCodexBaseUrl(baseUrl);
  const wireApi = config.wireApi ?? 'responses';

  return [
    'forced_login_method="api"',

      { sessionId: 'conv_1' },
      {
        id: 8,
        method: 'execCommandApproval',
        params: { cmd: 'npx playwright test' },

});

describe('CodexRuntime configuration', () => {
  it('points Codex at workspace files without embedding their full contents', () => {
    const dir = mkdtempSync(join(tmpdir(), 'dw-codex-prompt-'));
    try {
      writeFileSync(dir + '/AGENTS.md', '# Agent\nRead skills.', 'utf8');
      writeFileSync(dir + '/RULES.md', '# Rules\nNo fabrication.', 'utf8');
      writeFileSync(
        dir + '/SKILLS.md',
        '# Skills\n- `mgx-debug`: Debug MGX incidents',
        'utf8',
      );
      writeFileSync(dir + '/MEMORY.md', '# Memory\n(none)', 'utf8');

      const prompt = buildCodexUserPrompt('查一下卡住原因', dir);

      expect(prompt).toContain(`Workspace directory: ${dir}`);
      expect(prompt).toContain('Read `SKILLS.md`');
      expect(prompt).not.toContain('## SKILLS.md');
      expect(prompt).not.toContain('`mgx-debug`: Debug MGX incidents');
      expect(prompt).toContain('visual communication guidance');
      expect(prompt).toContain('Database access:');
      expect(prompt).toContain('use `scripts/yearning-cli.py`');
      expect(prompt).toContain(
        'do not use `alpha-mysql` or `prod-mysql` MCP servers',
      );
      expect(prompt).toContain('Sensitive data:');
      expect(prompt).toContain('never reveal raw environment variable values');
      expect(prompt).toContain('Forbidden browser automation:');
      expect(prompt).toContain('Browser automation is forbidden');
      expect(prompt).toContain('建议跟进责任人');
      expect(prompt).toContain('owner-routing.md');
      expect(prompt).toContain('User request:\n查一下卡住原因');
    } finally {
      rmSync(dir, { recursive: true, force: true });
    }
  });

          '这不是固定模板:简单问题用简短自然段即可;复杂排查、业务逻辑或代码分析,优先混合使用短结论、分层列表、对比表格和必要的 Mermaid 图。',

import { Injectable, Logger, OnModuleDestroy } from '@nestjs/common';
import { spawn, type ChildProcessWithoutNullStreams } from 'node:child_process';
import { mkdirSync, readFileSync } from 'node:fs';
import { createServer } from 'node:net';
import { resolve } from 'node:path';
import {
  appConfig,
  resolveRuntimeModelForProvider,
  type CodexRuntimeConfig,
} from '../../shared/app-config';
import { formatLog } from '../../shared/logging';
import { redactSensitiveText } from '../../shared/sensitive-redaction';
import { normalizeWorkspaceReuseKey } from '../../shared/workspace-reuse';
import {
  AgentRuntime,
  OpenSessionInput,
  RunInput,
  RuntimeEvent,
  RuntimeSession,
  RuntimeTransportProbe,
  RuntimeUnavailableError,
} from '../base';

class CodexSession extends RuntimeSession {
  readonly transportLabel = 'websocket' as const;
  threadId?: string;
  currentTurnId?: string;
  rpc?: CodexAppServerRpcClient;
  lease?: CodexAppServerLease;
  readonly agentMessageTextByItemId = new Map<string, string>();
  readonly commandOutputByItemId = new Map<string, string>();
  readonly planTextByItemId = new Map<string, string>();
  readonly reasoningTextByItemId = new Map<string, string>();
  lastTokenUsage?: Record<string, unknown>;
  lastTurnError?: Record<string, unknown>;
  threadAttachedEmitted = false;
  closed = false;
  constructor(
    readonly sessionId: string,
    readonly workspaceDir: string,
    threadId: string | undefined,
    readonly authContext?: OpenSessionInput['authContext'],
    readonly runtimeEnvs?: Record<string, string>,
  ) {
    super();
    this.threadId = threadId;
  }
}

interface CodexAppServerLease {
  workspaceKey: string;
  workspaceDir: string;
  wsUrl: string;
  process: ChildProcessWithoutNullStreams;
}

interface CodexAppServerEntry extends CodexAppServerLease {
  envFingerprint: string;
  refCount: number;
  idleTimer?: NodeJS.Timeout;
}

interface JsonRpcMessage {
  id?: string | number;
  method?: string;
  params?: Record<string, unknown>;
  result?: unknown;
  error?: unknown;
}

interface McpServerConfig {
  type?: string;
  command?: string;
  args?: string[];
  env?: Record<string, string>;
  url?: string;
}

const CODEX_BINARY = process.env.CODEX_BIN ?? 'codex';
const CODEX_NEWAPI_PROVIDER_ID = 'dw_context_newapi';
const CODEX_NEWAPI_TOKEN_ENV_KEY = 'AI_RUNTIME_CODEX_AUTH_TOKEN';
const APP_SERVER_HEALTH_TIMEOUT_MS = 60_000;
const APP_SERVER_HEALTH_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS = 1_500;
const APP_SERVER_HEALTH_POLL_I

[... truncated 4 characters ...]

/`; if a prior case contains a suitable recommended reply, adapt it instead of inventing a new one.',
    'Treat these as judgment guidelines, not rigid templates: omit a section only when it is irrelevant or unsupported by evidence, and say `待补查` for missing evidence instead of guessing.',
  ].join(' ');

/**
 * Codex app-server runtime.
 *
 * DeepFlowCore 走的是常驻 `codex app-server` + WebSocket JSON-RPC,不是
 * `codex exec --json`。这里对齐那条路径,但保留 dw-context 现有 ACP adapter
 * 期望的 legacy event shape。
 */
@Injectable()
export class CodexRuntime extends AgentRuntime implements OnModuleDestroy {
  readonly runtimeId = 'codex';
  private readonly logger = new Logger(CodexRuntime.name);
  private readonly appServerManager = new CodexAppServerProcessManager(
    this.logger,
  );

  probeTransport(): RuntimeTransportProbe {
    return { transport: 'websocket' };
  }

  onModuleDestroy(): void {
    this.appServerManager.shutdownAll().catch((error) =>
      this.logger.warn(
        formatLog('runtime.codex.app_server.shutdown_all_failed', {
          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
        }),
      ),
    );
  }

  getDiagnostics(): {
    appServers: Array<{
      workspaceKey: string;
      workspaceDir: string;
      wsUrl: string;
      refCount: number;
      pid?: number;
      idle: boolean;
      exited: boolean;
    }>;

    const runtime = new CodexRuntime() as unknown as {
      respondToServerRequest(
        rpc: {
          respond(id: string | number, result: Record<string, unknown>): void;
          respondError(
            id: string | number,
            code: number,
            message: string,
          ): void;
        },
        session: Record<string, unknown>,
        message: Record<string, unknown>,
      ): void;

    const responses: Array<{ id: string | number; result: unknown }> = [];

    runtime.respondToServerRequest(
      {
        respond: (id, result) => responses.push({ id, result }),
        respondError: jest.fn(),

      { sessionId: 'conv_1' },
      {
        id: 8,
        method: 'execCommandApproval',
        params: { cmd: 'npx playwright test' },

    expect(responses).toHaveLength(1);
    expect(responses[0]?.id).toBe(8);
    expect(responses[0]?.result).toMatchObject({
      decision: 'denied',
    });
  });
});

describe('CodexRuntime configuration', () => {
  it('points Codex at workspace files without embedding their full contents', () => {
    const dir = mkdtempSync(join(tmpdir(), 'dw-codex-prompt-'));
    try {
      writeFileSync(dir + '/AGENTS.md', '# Agent\nRead skills.', 'utf8');
      writeFileSync(dir + '/RULES.md', '# Rules\nNo fabrication.', 'utf8');
      writeFileSync(
        dir + '/SKILLS.md',
        '# Skills\n- `mgx-debug`: Debug MGX incidents',
        'utf8',
      );
      writeFileSync(dir + '/MEMORY.md', '# Memory\n(none)', 'utf8');

      const prompt = buildCodexUserPrompt('查一下卡住原因', dir);

      expect(prompt).toContain(`Workspace directory: ${dir}`);
      expect(prompt).toContain('Read `SKILLS.md`');
      expect(prompt).not.toContain('## SKILLS.md');
      expect(prompt).not.toContain('`mgx-debug`: Debug MGX incidents');
      expect(prompt).toContain('visual communication guidance');
      expect(prompt).toContain('Database access:');
      expect(prompt).toContain('use `scripts/yearning-cli.py`');
      expect(prompt).toContain(
        'do not use `alpha-mysql` or `prod-mysql` MCP servers',
      );
      expect(prompt).toContain('Sensitive data:');
      expect(prompt).toContain('never reveal raw environment variable values');
      expect(prompt).toContain('Forbidden browser automation:');
      expect(prompt).toContain('Browser automation is forbidden');
      expect(prompt).toContain('建议跟进责任人');
      expect(prompt).toContain('owner-routing.md');
      expect(prompt).toContain('User request:\n查一下卡住原因');
    } finally {
      rmSync(dir, { recursive: true, force: true });
    }
  });

import { Injectable, Logger } from '@nestjs/common';
import { writeFile } from 'node:fs/promises';
import { join } from 'node:path';
import { formatLog } from '../shared/logging';
import type { RuleEntry } from './models';

/**
 * Rule setup:把规则集合并写到 workspace 根目录的 RULES.md。
 * Codex 会通过 AGENTS.md / prompt 明确读取这个文件。
 *
 * 内置规则集通过 `defaultRules()` 提供。运行时可以扩展。
 */
@Injectable()
export class RuleSetupService {
  private readonly logger = new Logger(RuleSetupService.name);

  async apply(workspaceDir: string, rules: RuleEntry[]): Promise<RuleEntry[]> {
    const merged = [...rules, ...this.defaultRules()];

    const codexPath = join(workspaceDir, 'RULES.md');
    const codexBody = this.renderCodexRules(merged);
    await writeFile(codexPath, codexBody, 'utf8');

    this.logger.log(
      formatLog('iteration.rules.applied', {
        workspaceDir,
        ruleCount: merged.length,
        ruleIds: merged.map((r) => r.id),
        codexPath,
      }),
    );

    return merged;
  }

  private renderCodexRules(rules: RuleEntry[]): string {
    const lines = [
      '# Rules',
      '',
      '> 由 dw-context iteration 注入,对所有 agent 行为生效。',
      '',
    ];
    for (const rule of rules) {
      const applies = rule.appliesTo;
      if (applies && !applies.includes('codex')) continue;
      lines.push(`## ${rule.title}`);
      lines.push('');
      lines.push(rule.body.trim());
      lines.push('');
    }
    return lines.join('\n');
  }

  /**
   * 内置规则集:覆盖核心硬约束。
   * 这些规则直接注入 RULES.md。
   */
  defaultRules(): RuleEntry[] {
    return [
      {
        id: 'no-fabrication',
        title: 'No fabrication',
        scopeType: 'global',
        body: '证据不足时直接说"待补查",**不要编造**。dw-context 下游会按你说的"已确认"做决策。',
      },
      {
        id: 'mcp-fail-fast',
        title: 'MCP fail-fast',
        scopeType: 'global',
        body: [
          '同一个 MCP 工具/server 第一次调用失败(超时 / 401 / connection closed / handshake failed),立即停止重试该 server。',
          '累计 3 次 MCP 失败后,基于已有证据立刻出结论(标"待补查")。',
          'ETIMEDOUT / ENOTFOUND / connection closed 一律视为环境/网络问题,不要重试,直接在结论里写"该数据源当前不可达"。',
        ].join('\n'),
      },
      {
        id: 'mcp-batch-over-chain',
        title: 'MCP batch over chain',
        scopeType: 'global',
        body: '同一个 MCP server 不要做"先小查 A 再小查 B 再小查 C"的链式探查。一次大查询拉够数据落到 `scratch/`,后续从本地文件读——CLI 每次 mcp_tool_call 都会重启 MCP 子进程,反复调用同一 server(尤其 npx 类)有概率握手失败。',
      },
      {
        id: 'sensitive-env-redaction',
        title: 'Sensitive env redaction',

[

[... truncated 1 characters ...]

,
          '| flowchart | 系统流程 / 页面跳转 / 业务逻辑 | 复杂时序 | ★★★★★ |',

          '图表要小而准: 只放关键节点和关键边,复杂流程先给一张总览图,再用表格补充字段、证据和风险。不要把 15 个以上节点、长 SQL、完整日志或大段代码塞进图里。',

          '写完 Mermaid 后先自检一遍: fenced block 是否闭合,图类型和语法是否常规,节点/边文本是否足够短,是否误用了复杂 HTML、style/classDef 颜色或其他容易渲染失败的特性。不确定能稳定渲染时,改用 Markdown 表格或短列表。',

        ].join('\n'),
      },
      {
        id: 'no-direct-curl',
        title: 'Use MCP, not curl',

      '',
      'This workspace is prepared by dw-context for a single conversation run.',
      '',
      '## Mandatory context',
      '',
      '- Read `RULES.md` for behavioral constraints.',
      '- Read `MEMORY.md` for conversation memory when relevant.',
      '- Read `CODE_REPOS.md` before answering code implementation or architecture questions.',
      '- If `repos/` is empty, missing, stale, or failed, do not stop; follow the GitLab recovery commands in `CODE_REPOS.md` and pull the repository into `scratch/` before concluding.',

      '- Historical cases are available under `cases/`; experience pool articles synced for this run are available under `experience-cases/`. Use `rg` to search both before finalizing troubleshooting conclusions.',

export function buildCodexUserPrompt(
  userMessage: string,
  workspaceDir?: string,
  conversationContext?: string,
): string {
  return [
    'You are running inside a dw-context prepared workspace.',
    workspaceDir ? `Workspace directory: ${workspaceDir}` : '',
    '',
    'Before taking action in this turn:',
    '1. Read `AGENTS.md` for workspace routing.',
    '2. Read `RULES.md` for hard behavioral constraints.',
    '3. Read `SKILLS.md`, then read each matching `skills/<name>/SKILL.md` before using that skill.',
    '4. For code implementation or architecture questions, read `CODE_REPOS.md` and inspect `repos/<name>` with `rg` before concluding. If `repos/` is empty, missing, stale, or failed, follow the GitLab recovery commands in `CODE_REPOS.md` and pull the repository into `scratch/` before concluding.',
    '5. For troubleshooting or support investigations, search `cases/` and `experience-cases/` with `rg` before finalizing conclusions.',
    '6. For troubleshooting or support investigations, read `skills/mgx-debug/references/owner-routing.md` if present and end with a short `建议跟进责任人` section that maps the diagnosed module/service to owner and backup.',
    '7. Use `scratch/` for large temporary outputs.',
    '8. For information-dense final answers, follow the visual communication guidance in `RULES.md`: choose concise prose, lists, tables, or Mermaid diagrams based on what best fits the content.',
    '',
    `Database access: ${DATABASE_QUERY_INSTRUCTION}`,
    `Sensitive data: ${SENSITIVE_ENV_OUTPUT_INSTRUCTION}`,
    `Forbidden browser automation: ${FORBIDDEN_BROWSER_AUTOMATION_INSTRUCTION}`,
    `Support investigation final answers: ${SUPPORT_INVESTIGATION_FINAL_ANSWER_INSTRUCTION}`,
    conversationContext?.trim()
      ? [
          '',
          'Conversation context follows. Use prior messages in this conversation as available context when they are relevant to the current request.',
  }
  return items;
}

function buildCodexDeveloperInstructions(workspaceDir: string): string {
  return [
    `You are running inside a dw-context prepared workspace at ${workspaceDir}.`,
    'Read AGENTS.md for workspace routing before acting.',
    'Read RULES.md for behavioral constraints, SKILLS.md for skill routing, and each matching skills/<name>/SKILL.md before applying a skill.',
    DATABASE_QUERY_INSTRUCTION,
    SENSITIVE_ENV_OUTPUT_INSTRUCTION,
    FORBIDDEN_BROWSER_AUTOMATION_INSTRUCTION,
    SUPPORT_INVESTIGATION_FINAL_ANSWER_INSTRUCTION,
    'For code questions, read CODE_REPOS.md and inspect repos/<name> with rg.',
    'For support or troubleshooting, search cases/ and experience-cases/ before final conclusions, then read skills/mgx-debug/references/owner-routing.md if present and include a 建议跟进责任人 section.',
    'Use scratch/ for large temporary outputs.',
  ].join('\n');
}

l 命令(`rm -rf` / `mv` / `dd`)。读类、查询类完全自由。不要修改 `skills/`、`cases/` 下的文件——它们是只读软链。',

src/iterations/rule-setup.service.ts:122:          '不要为了结构化而结构化。最终回答一般不贴大段原始 payload; 但排查结论依赖 SQL / 日志 / 代码时,要摘出关键查询、关键返回值和代码行作为依据。',

Output:

  private respondToServerRequest(
    rpc: CodexAppServerRpcClient,
    session: CodexSession,
    message: JsonRpcMessage,
  ): void {
    const method = stringFromUnknown(message.method);
    const id = message.id;
    const params = recordFromUnknown(message.params) ?? {};
    if (id === undefined || !method) return;

    this.logger.log(
      formatLog('runtime.codex.server_request', {
        sessionId: session.sessionId,
        method,
        id,
        params: redactSensitiveText(JSON.stringify(params)).slice(0, 2000),
      }),
    );

    if (
      method === 'item/commandExecution/requestApproval' ||
      method === 'item/fileChange/requestApproval'
    ) {
      if (containsForbiddenBrowserAutomation(params)) {
        rpc.respond(id, {
          decision: 'deny',
          reason:
            'Browser automation is disabled in dw-context runtime because it can exhaust server resources.',
        });
        this.logger.warn(
          formatLog('runtime.codex.browser_automation_blocked', {
            sessionId: session.sessionId,
            method,
            params: redactSensitiveText(JSON.stringify(params)).slice(0, 2000),
          }),
        );
        return;
      }
      rpc.respond(id, { decision: 'acceptForSession' });
      return;
    }

    if (method === 'applyPatchApproval' || method === 'execCommandApproval') {
      if (containsForbiddenBrowserAutomation(params)) {
        rpc.respond(id, {
          decision: 'denied',
          reason:
            'Browser automation is disabled in dw-context runtime because it can exhaust server resources.',
        });
        this.logger.warn(
          formatLog('runtime.codex.browser_automation_blocked', {
            sessionId: session.sessionId,
            method,
            params: redactSensitiveText(JSON.stringify(params)).slice(0, 2000),
          }),
        );
        return;
      }
      rpc.respond(id, { decision: 'approved_for_session' });
      return;
    }

    if (method === 'item/permissions/requestApproval') {
      rpc.respond(id, {
        permissions: recordFromUnknown(params.permissions) ?? {},
        scope: 'session',
      });
      return;
    }

"*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: /Users/norvan/Developer/tool/dw-context/dw-context-server/src/runtime/codex/runtime.ts\n@@\n const FORBIDDEN_BROWSER_AUTOMATION_INSTRUCTION =\n   'Browser automation is forbidden in dw-context runtime. Do not install, launch, or invoke Playwright, Chromium, Firefox, WebKit, browser-use, puppeteer, selenium, headed/headless browsers, or commands such as `npx playwright`. Use HTTP APIs, logs, repository inspection, or existing screenshots/files instead.';\n+const DEEP_CONTEXT_PLATFORM_SCOPE_INSTRUCTION =\n+  [\n+    'Deep Context is an issue investigation, diagnosis, summarization, and follow-up tracking platform.',\n+    'It does not own product code changes and must not implement fixes or modify source code.',\n+    'Treat repositories under `repos/` and any fetched product code as read-only evidence: inspect with `rg`, cite paths/lines, and propose recommended changes only as follow-up guidance.',\n+    'Do not use patches, file edits, commit commands, or code-writing commands against product repositories.',\n+    'Final answers must not claim that code was changed, fixed, landed, or deployed. Avoid phrases such as `已修`, `已修改`, `已落地`, `改动在`, or `代码已提交`; use `已定位`, `建议修复`, `建议跟进`, or `建议改动` instead.',\n+  ].join(' ');\n const SUPPORT_INVESTIGATION_FINAL_ANSWER_INSTRUCTION =\n   [\n@@\n     SENSITIVE_ENV_OUTPUT_INSTRUCTION,\n     FORBIDDEN_BROWSER_AUTOMATION_INSTRUCTION,\n+    DEEP_CONTEXT_PLATFORM_SCOPE_INSTRUCTION,\n     SUPPORT_INVESTIGATION_FINAL_ANSWER_INSTRUCTION,\n-    'For code questions, read CODE_REPOS.md and inspect repos/<name> with rg.',\n+    'For code questions, read CODE_REPOS.md and inspect repos/<name> with rg; only diagnose and cite evidence, do not change code.',\n     'For support or troubleshooting, search cases/ and experience-cases/ before final conclusions, then read skills/mgx-debug/references/owner-routing.md if present and include a 建议跟进责任人 section.',\n     'Use scratch/ for large temporary outputs.',\n@@\n     `Sensitive data: ${SENSITIVE_ENV_OUTPUT_INSTRUCTION}`,\n     `Forbidden browser automation: ${FORBIDDEN_BROWSER_AUTOMATION_INSTRUCTION}`,\n+    `Deep Context platform scope: ${DEEP_CONTEXT_PLATFORM_SCOPE_INSTRUCTION}`,\n     `Support investigation final answers: ${SUPPORT_INVESTIGATION_FINAL_ANSWER_INSTRUCTION}`,\n*** End Patch"

Output:
import { defineStore } from 'pinia'
import type {
  AcpArtifactCreated,
  AcpEvent,
  AcpStepKind,
  ConversationRunStatus,
  ConversationExecutionSummaryRecord,
  ConversationMessageRecord,
  ConversationSummary,
  InvestigationConfidenceAssessment,
  JiraFollowUpRecord,
  QueryImageAttachmentRecord,
} from '~/types/api'

export type ChatImageAttachmentViewModel = QueryImageAttachmentRecord & {
  previewUrl?: string
}

export interface ChatThinkingEventRecord {
  eventId: string
  sequenceNo: number
  title: string
  summaryText?: string
  status: 'running' | 'completed' | 'error'
  occurredAt: string
  rawEvent: AcpEvent
}

export interface ChatProgressStep {
  id: string
  label: string
  status: 'running' | 'completed' | 'error'
  detail?: string
  occurredAt?: string
}

export type ChatExecutionStatus = 'running' | 'completed' | 'error' | 'cancelled'

export interface ChatAssistantTextSegment {
  id: string
  type: 'assistant_text'
  sequenceNo: number
  itemId?: string
  content: string
  startedAt: string
  endedAt?: string
  pending?: boolean
}

export interface ChatExecutionSegment {
  id: string
  type: 'execution'
  sequenceNo: number
  conversationId?: string
  stepKind: AcpStepKind
  title: string
  subtitle?: string
  inputLabel?: string
  input?: string
  output?: string
  outputTruncated?: boolean
  outputByteCount?: number
  outputEventSequence?: number
  status: ChatExecutionStatus
  startedAt: string
  endedAt?: string
  durationMs?: number
  errorMessage?: string
}

export type ChatTranscriptSegment = ChatAssistantTextSegment | ChatExecutionSegment

export interface ChatMessageViewModel {
  id: string
  conversationId?: string
  requestId?: string
  runId?: string
  role: 'user' | 'assistant' | 'system'
  content: string
  attachments?: ChatImageAttachmentViewModel[]
  createdAt: string
  runDurationMs?: number
  completedAt?: string
  pending?: boolean
  progress?: ChatProgressStep[]
  thinkingEvents?: ChatThinkingEventRecord[]
  transcript?: ChatTranscriptSegment[]
  executionSummary?: ConversationExecutionSummaryRecord
  experienceAssessment?: InvestigationConfidenceAssessment
  jiraFollowUp?: JiraFollowUpRecord
  errorMessage?: string
}

interface ProjectedStepState {
  itemId: string
  stepKind: AcpStepKind
  title: string
  subtitle?: string
  content: string
}

function hasText(value: unknown): value is string {
  return typeof value === 'string' && value.trim().length > 0
}

function isRecord(value: unknown): value is Recor

    await this.publisher.publish({
      event: {
        kind: 'artifact.created',
        conversationId: input.conversationId,
        runId: input.runId,
        itemId: `jira-follow-up:${input.runId}`,
        artifactKind: 'jira_follow_up',
        label: 'Jira follow-up',
        preview: `Created Jira ${createdIssue.key}`,
        payload: updated as unknown as Record<string, unknown>,
      },
    });
    return createdIssue;
  }

  private canRun(input: RunAfterCompletionInput): boolean {
    if (!appConfig.jira.enabled || !appConfig.jira.followUpEnabled) {
      return false;
    }
    const config = appConfig.aiRuntime.codex;
    if (
      !resolveRuntimeModelForProvider('codex') ||
      !config.baseUrl ||
      !config.authToken
    ) {
      return false;
    }
    const text = `${input.userMessage}\n${input.assistantText}`.toLowerCase();
    if (input.assessment && input.assessment.score >= 55) {
      return true;
    }
    return /bug|报错|异常|失败|不可用|优化|需求|feature|requirement|复现|根因|排查/.test(
      text,
    );
  }

  private async buildFollowUp(
    input: RunAfterCompletionInput,
  ): Promise<JiraFollowUpRecord | undefined> {
    const analysis = await this.analyze(input);
    if (
      analysis.classification === 'none' ||
      (analysis.confidence ?? 0) < 0.45
    ) {
      return {
        status: 'skipped',
        classification: 'none',
        confidence: analysis.confidence ?? 0,
        title: analysis.title || '',
        detailSummary: analysis.reason || '当前结论不需要创建 Jira。',
        reason: analysis.reason,
        searchKeywords: [],
        similarIssues: [],
        analyzedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      };
    }

    const projectKey = this.resolveProjectKey(input, analysis);
    if (!projectKey) {
      return this.errorRecord(
        analysis,
        '无法确定 Jira project key。请配置 JIRA_PROJECT，或在上下文中明确项目。',
      );
    }

    const searchKeywords = normalizeKeywords(analysis.searchKeywords);
    const similarIssues = await this.searchSimilarIssues({
      projectKey,
      keywords: searchKeywords,
    });
    const baseRecord = this.baseRecord(analysis, searchKeywords);

    if (similarIssues.length > 0) {
      return {
        ...baseRecord,
        status: 'similar_found',
        similarIssues,
      };
    }

    const draft = await this.buildIssueDraft({
      projectKey,
      analysis,
      conversationId: input.conversationId,
      runId: input.runId,
    });
    return {
      ...baseRecord,
      sta
