    )
    events.value = omitRecordKey(events.value, conversationId)
    lastSequences.value = {
      ...lastSequences.value,
      [conversationId]: lastSequence,
    }
  }

  function omitRecordKey<TValue>(record: Record<string, TValue>, key: string) {
    const next = { ...record }
    delete next[key]
    return next
  }

  function rebuildMessages(conversationId: string) {
    setConversationMessages(
      conversationId,
      projectEventsToMessages(conversationId, events.value[conversationId] || [])
    )
  }

  function setEvents(conversationId: string, list: AcpEvent[]) {
    const deduped = new Map<number, AcpEvent>()
    for (const event of list) {
      deduped.set(event.sequence, event)
    }
    events.value = {
      ...events.value,
      [conversationId]: [...deduped.values()].sort((left, right) => left.sequence - right.sequence),
    }
    lastSequences.value = {
      ...lastSequences.value,
      [conversationId]:
        [...deduped.values()].at(-1)?.sequence ?? lastSequences.value[conversationId] ?? 0,
    }
    rebuildMessages(conversationId)
    syncConversationRunStatusFromEvents(conversationId)
  }

  function applyEvent(event: AcpEvent) {
    applyEvents([event])
  }

  function applyEvents(nextEvents: AcpEvent[]) {
    if (!nextEvents.length) {
      return
    }

    const groupedEvents = new Map<string, AcpEvent[]>()
    for (const event of nextEvents) {
      const conversationEvents = groupedEvents.get(event.conversationId) ?? []
      conversationEvents.push(event)
      groupedEvents.set(event.conversationId, conversationEvents)
    }

    let eventsRecord = events.value
    let messagesRecord = messages.value
    let lastSequenceRecord = lastSequences.value
    const acceptedEvents: AcpEvent[] = []

    for (const [conversationId, incomingEvents] of groupedEvents) {
      const currentEvents = eventsRecord[conversationId] || []
      const eventsBySequence = new Map<number, AcpEvent>()
      let hasChanges = false

      for (const event of currentEvents) {
        eventsBySequence.set(event.sequence, event)
      }

      for (const event of incomingEvents) {
        if (eventsBySequence.has(event.sequence)) {
          continue
        }

        eventsBySequence.set(event.sequence, event)
        acceptedEvents.push(event)
        hasChanges = true
      }

      if (!hasChanges) {
        continue
      }

      const conversationEvents = [...eventsBySequence.values()].sort(

[... truncated 22 characters ...]

ind === 'run.started') {
      patch.lastRunStartedAt = event.occurredAt
      patch.lastRunEndedAt = undefined
    } else if (event.kind === 'run.queued') {
      patch.lastRunEndedAt = undefined
    } else {
      patch.lastRunEndedAt = event.occurredAt
    }

    patchConversation(event.conversationId, patch)
  }

  function syncConversationRunStatusFromEvents(conversationId: string) {
    const latestRunEvent = [...(events.value[conversationId] ?? [])]
      .reverse()
      .find(
        (event) =>
          event.kind === 'run.started' ||
          event.kind === 'run.queued' ||
          event.kind === 'run.completed' ||
          event.kind === 'run.failed' ||
          event.kind === 'run.cancelled'
      )

    if (latestRunEvent) {
      applyConversationRunEvent(latestRunEvent)
      return
    }

    patchConversation(conversationId, { runStatus: 'idle' })
  }

  function removeConversation(conversationId: string) {
    conversations.value = conversations.value.filter(
      (item) => item.conversationId !== conversationId
    )
    events.value = omitRecordKey(events.value, conversationId)
    messages.value = omitRecordKey(messages.value, conversationId)
    lastSequences.value = omitRecordKey(lastSequences.value, conversationId)

    if (activeConversationId.value === conversationId) {
      activeConversationId.value = ''
    }

Output:
}

function flushRealtimeEvents() {
  realtimeFlushAnimationFrame = 0

  if (!pendingRealtimeEvents.length) {
    return
  }

  const batch = pendingRealtimeEvents.splice(0)
  chat.applyEvents(batch)

  for (const event of batch) {
    syncRealtimeRunState(event)
  }

  if (
    batch.some(
      (event) =>
        event.conversationId === chat.activeConversationId &&
        (event.kind === 'run.completed' ||
          event.kind === 'run.failed' ||
          event.kind === 'run.cancelled')
    )
  ) {
    void loadConversationRequestsForConversation(chat.activeConversationId, { force: true })
  }
}

function scheduleRealtimeFlush() {
  if (!import.meta.client) {
    flushRealtimeEvents()
    return
  }

  if (realtimeFlushTimer || realtimeFlushAnimationFrame) {
    return
  }

  realtimeFlushTimer = setTimeout(() => {
    realtimeFlushTimer = undefined
    realtimeFlushAnimationFrame = window.requestAnimationFrame(flushRealtimeEvents)
  }, realtimeFlushDelayMs)
}

function clearPendingRealtimeEvents() {
  pendingRealtimeEvents.splice(0)

  if (realtimeFlushTimer) {
    clearTimeout(realtimeFlushTimer)
    realtimeFlushTimer = undefined
  }

  if (realtimeFlushAnimationFrame) {
    window.cancelAnimationFrame(realtimeFlushAnimationFrame)
    realtimeFlushAnimationFrame = 0
  }
}

function handleRealtimeEvent(event: AcpEvent) {
  pendingRealtimeEvents.push(event)
  scheduleRealtimeFlush()
}

function getMessagesViewport() {
  if (!import.meta.client) {
    return null
  }

  return scrollAreaRef.value?.$el?.querySelector(
    '[data-slot="scroll-area-viewport"]'
  ) as HTMLElement | null
}

function isNearMessagesBottom(viewport: HTMLElement) {
  return viewport.scrollHeight - viewport.clientHeight - viewport.scrollTop <= scrollBottomThreshold
      return
    }
    if (await api.handleExpiredSessionError(error)) {
      return
    }

    chat.lastError = error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Failed to load messages.'
  } finally {
    if (requestId === conversationMessagesRequestId) {
      chat.loadingMessages = false
    }
  }
}

async function reconcileActiveRunState() {
  const conversationId = chat.activeConversationId
  if (!conversationId || !session.hasApiCredential || !isActiveConversationBusy.value) {
    return
  }

  try {
    const conversation = await api.getConversation(conversationId)
    if (chat.activeConversationId !== conversationId) return
    chat.upsertConversation(conversation)
    const isTerminalRun =
      conversation.runStatus === 'completed' ||
      conversation.runStatus === 'failed' ||
      conversation.runStatus === 'cancelled'
    const shouldBackfillEvents = realtimeSocket.status.value !== 'connected' || isTerminalRun

    if (shouldBackfillEvents) {
      const events = await loadConversationEventsForConversation(conversationId)
      if (chat.activeConversationId !== conversationId) return
      chat.setEvents(conversationId, events)
    }

    syncGlobalSendingState()
    if (isTerminalRun) {
      runningConversationIds.delete(conversationId)
      interruptingConversationIds.delete(conversationId)
      void loadConversationRequestsForConversation(conversationId, { force: true })
      void loadSidebarConversations()
    }
  } catch (error) {
    console.warn('[dw-context] active run reconciliation failed', error)
  }
}

  private async emitChatRunCompletedIfNeeded(event: AcpEvent): Promise<void> {
    if (event.kind !== 'run.completed') {
      return;
    }

    const conversation = await this.conversationRepository.findOne({
      where: { conversationId: event.conversationId },
      select: ['conversationId', 'userId'],
    });

    this.realtimeEvents.emitToUser(
      conversation?.userId,
      SocketServerEventType.ChatRunCompleted,
      {
        conversationId: event.conversationId,
        runId: event.runId,
        sequence: event.sequence,
        occurredAt: event.occurredAt,
      },
    );
  }

  /**
   * 从 conversations.next_sequence 拿号 + 自增。
   * 对同一 conversation 顺序发事件是安全的,底层由 MySQL 的行锁保证。
   */
  private async allocateSequenceNo(
    manager: EntityManager,
    conversationId: string,
  ): Promise<number> {
    const conversationRepo = manager.getRepository(ConversationEntity);
    const row = await conversationRepo
      .createQueryBuilder()
      .select('next_sequence', 'nextSequence')
      .where('conversation_id = :id', { id: conversationId })
      .setLock('pessimistic_write')
      .getRawOne<{ nextSequence: string }>();

    if (!row) {
      throw new Error(
        `Cannot publish ACP event: conversation ${conversationId} does not exist.`,
      );
    const conversationRepo = manager.getRepository(ConversationEntity);

    switch (input.kind) {
      case 'run.queued':
        await conversationRepo.update(
          { conversationId: input.conversationId },
          {
            runStatus: 'queued',
            lastRunId: input.runId,
            lastRunStartedAt: input.occurredAt,
            lastRunEndedAt: null,
          },
        );
        return;
      case 'run.started':
        await conversationRepo.update(
          { conversationId: input.conversationId },
          {
            runStatus: 'running',
            lastRunId: input.runId,
            lastRunStartedAt: input.occurredAt,
            lastRunEndedAt: null,
          },
        );
        return;
      case 'run.completed':
        if (!input.runId) {
          return;
        }
        await conversationRepo.update(
          { conversationId: input.conversationId, lastRunId: input.runId },
          {
            runStatus: 'completed',
            lastRunId: input.runId,
            lastRunEndedAt: input.occurredAt,
          },
        );
        return;
      case 'run.failed':
        if (!input.runId) {
          return;
        }
        await conversationRepo.update(
          { conversationId: input.conversationId, lastRunId: input.runId },
          {
            runStatus: 'failed',
            lastRunId: input.runId,
            lastRunEndedAt: input.occurredAt,
          },
        );
        return;

Output:
/**
 * ACP (Agent Communication Protocol) — 模仿 DeepFlowCore 的事件协议。
 *
 * 14 种规范化 event kind,Codex CLI 原始事件由 adapter 翻译成 ACP。
 * 翻译成 ACP 后,前端拿到的是统一格式,**再加 provider 不需要改前端**。
 */

import type { QueryImageAttachmentRecord } from '../shared/contracts';

export const ACP_PROTOCOL_VERSION = '0.1.0';

export type AcpEventKind =
  // conversation lifecycle
  | 'conversation.started'
  | 'conversation.completed'
  | 'conversation.failed'
  // run(单轮)lifecycle
  | 'run.queued'
  | 'run.started'
  | 'run.completed'
  | 'run.failed'
  | 'run.cancelled'
  // step(子单元 / agent message / reasoning)
  | 'step.started'
  | 'step.delta'
  | 'step.completed'
  // gate(中断点:工具确认 / 澄清)
  | 'gate.requested'
  | 'gate.resolved'
  // artifact(产物:tool call result / file / case)
  | 'artifact.created'
  // 用量 / 错误
  | 'usage'
  | 'error';

export type AcpStepKind =
  | 'agent_message'
  | 'reasoning'
  | 'tool_call'
  | 'mcp_tool_call'
  | 'collab_tool_call'
  | 'command_execution'
  | 'file_change'
  | 'todo_list'
  | 'web_search'
  | 'unknown';

export type AcpGateKind = 'clarification' | 'tool_approval' | 'plan_approval';

export type AcpArtifactKind =
  | 'tool_result'
  | 'case'
  | 'file_write'
  | 'file_read'
  | 'web_page'
  | 'paper'
  | 'jira_follow_up';

export interface AcpEventBase {
  kind: AcpEventKind;
  /** 单调递增,前端用来排序 */
  sequence: number;
  /** 事件发生时间 ISO 8601 */
  occurredAt: string;
  /** runtime/conversation/run 关联 */
  conversationId: string;
  requestId?: string;
  runId?: string;
  /** 不透明 step / gate / artifact id,前端用来关联 started/delta/completed */
  itemId?: string;
}

// ---------- conversation ----------

export interface AcpConversationStarted extends AcpEventBase {
  kind: 'conversation.started';
  workspaceDir: string;
  runtime: string;
}

export interface AcpConversationCompleted extends AcpEventBase {
  kind: 'conversation.completed';
  durationMs: number;
}

export interface AcpConversationFailed extends AcpEventBase {
  kind: 'conversation.failed';
  message: string;
}

  response: Record<string, unknown>;
}

// ---------- artifact ----------

export interface AcpArtifactCreated extends AcpEventBase {
  kind: 'artifact.created';
  itemId: string;
  artifactKind: AcpArtifactKind;
  label?: string;
  contentType?: string;
  /** 落到磁盘的路径(如果有) */
  filePath?: string;
  /** 简短预览 */
  preview?: string;
  /** 大小字节 */
  byteCount?: number;
  attachments?: QueryImageAttachmentRecord[];
  payload?: Record<string, unknown>;
}

// ---------- usage / error ----------

Output:
        finalAnswer: truncate(input.assistantText, 9000),
        investigationAssessment: input.assessment,
        evidenceEvents: summarizeEvidenceEvents(input.events),
      },
      null,
      2,
    );
    const responsesText = await this.tryGenerateWithResponsesApi({
      model,
      baseUrl: config.baseUrl,
      authToken: ********************************
      prompt,
    });
    const responsesAnalysis = parseAnalysisJson(responsesText);
    if (responsesAnalysis) {
      return responsesAnalysis;
    }

    const chatText = await this.tryGenerateWithChatCompletionsApi({
      model,
      baseUrl: config.baseUrl,
      authToken: ********************************
      prompt,
    });
    return (
      parseAnalysisJson(chatText) ?? {
        classification: 'none',
        confidence: 0,
        reason: 'AI did not return valid Jira follow-up JSON',
      }
    );
  }

  private async tryGenerateWithResponsesApi(input: {
    model: string;
    baseUrl: string;
    authToken: ********************************
    prompt: string;
  }): Promise<string> {
    try {
      const json = await postJson<ResponsesApiResult>({
    .filter((item) => {
      const key = item.toLowerCase();
      if (seen.has(key)) return false;
      seen.add(key);
      return true;
    })
    .slice(0, 5);
}

function sanitizeSummary(value: string | undefined): string {
  const normalized = (value || '待创建 Jira 单').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
  return truncate(normalized, 120);
}

function quoteJqlText(value: string): string {
  return `"${value.replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/"/g, '\\"')}"`;
}

function previewForFollowUp(followUp: JiraFollowUpRecord): string {
  if (followUp.status === 'similar_found') {
    return `Found ${followUp.similarIssues.length} similar Jira issue(s).`;
  }
  if (followUp.status === 'draft_ready') {
    return followUp.issueDraft?.canCreate
      ? 'Jira issue draft is ready.'
      : followUp.issueDraft?.disabledReason ||
          'Jira issue draft needs required fields.';
  }
  if (followUp.status === 'created' && followUp.createdIssue) {
    return `Created Jira ${followUp.createdIssue.key}.`;
  }
  return (
    followUp.errorMessage || followUp.reason || 'Jira follow-up completed.'
  );
}

function truncate(value: string, max: number): string {
  const normalized = value.trim();
  if (normalized.length <= max) return normalized;
  return `${normalized.slice(0, max - 3)}...`;
}

function readString(value: unknown): string | undefined {
  return typeof value === 'string' && value.trim() ? value.trim() : undefined;
}

"*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: /Users/norvan/Developer/tool/dw-context/dw-context-server/src/application/jira-follow-up.service.ts\n@@\n function parseAnalysisJson(text: string): AiJiraAnalysis | undefined {\n   const parsed = parseJsonObject(text);\n   if (!parsed) {\n@@\n   };\n }\n \n+function enrichAnalysisWithFallback(\n+  analysis: AiJiraAnalysis,\n+  input: RunAfterCompletionInput,\n+): AiJiraAnalysis {\n+  const fallback = inferAnalysisFromInput(input);\n+  if (\n+    (analysis.classification === 'none' || (analysis.confidence ?? 0) < 0.45) &&\n+    fallback.classification !== 'none'\n+  ) {\n+    return fallback;\n+  }\n+  if (analysis.classification === 'none') {\n+    return analysis;\n+  }\n+  return {\n+    ...analysis,\n+    title: analysis.title || fallback.title,\n+    detailSummary: analysis.detailSummary || fallback.detailSummary,\n+    actualBehavior: analysis.actualBehavior || fallback.actualBehavior,\n+    expectedBehavior: analysis.expectedBehavior || fallback.expectedBehavior,\n+    reproductionSteps:\n+      analysis.reproductionSteps?.length && analysis.reproductionSteps.length > 0\n+        ? analysis.reproductionSteps\n+        : fallback.reproductionSteps,\n+    impact: analysis.impact || fallback.impact,\n+    evidence:\n+      analysis.evidence?.length && analysis.evidence.length > 0\n+        ? analysis.evidence\n+        : fallback.evidence,\n+    searchKeywords:\n+      analysis.searchKeywords?.length && analysis.searchKeywords.length > 0\n+        ? analysis.searchKeywords\n+        : fallback.searchKeywords,\n+  };\n+}\n+\n+function inferAnalysisFromInput(input: RunAfterCompletionInput): AiJiraAnalysis {\n+  const userMessage = input.userMessage.trim();\n+  const finalAnswer = input.assistantText.trim();\n+  const combined = `${userMessage}\\n${finalAnswer}`;\n+  const issueLike =\n+    /bug|报错|异常|失败|不可用|错误|有误|误匹配|不对|未.*成功|提前触发|无法|不生效|问题|风险|触发搜索|已定位|定位到|建议修复/u.test(\n+      combined,\n+    );\n+  const requirementLike =\n+    /需求|希望|新增|新建|支持|一键|创建|功能/u.test(userMessage) &&\n+    !issueLike;\n+  const optimizationLike =\n+    /优化|改进|体验|建议优化/u.test(combined) && !issueLike;\n+  const classification: JiraFollowUpClassification = issueLike\n+    ? 'bug'\n+    : optimizationLike\n+      ? 'optimization'\n+      : requirementLike\n+        ? 'requirement'\n+        : 'none';\n+\n+  const assessmentScore = input.assessment?.score ?? 0;\n+  const confidence =\n+    classification === 'none' ? 0 : assessmentScore >= 55 ? 0.72 : 0.5;\n+  const title = sanitizeSummary(userMessage || inferTitleFromFinal(finalAnswer));\n+\n+  return {\n+    classification,\n+    confidence,\n+    title,\n+    detailSummary:\n+      firstMeaningfulLine(finalAnswer) ||\n+      userMessage ||\n+      '排查总结指向一个需要 Jira 跟进的问题。',\n+    actualBehavior: userMessage || '见本轮排查总结。',\n+    expectedBehavior: '待补充',\n+    reproductionSteps: ['按本轮用户反馈路径复查对应页面或接口行为。'],\n+    impact: '待确认',\n+    evidence: extractEvidenceHints(finalAnswer),\n+    searchKeywords: extractSearchKeywords(userMessage, finalAnswer),\n+    reason:\n+      classification === 'none'\n+        ? 'No issue-like signal found in the completed investigation.'\n+        : 'Fallback classified from completed investigation signals.',\n+  };\n+}\n+\n+function inferTitleFromFinal(value: string): string {\n+  return firstMeaningfulLine(value) || '待创建 Jira 单';\n+}\n+\n+function firstMeaningfulLine(value: string): string | undefined {\n+  return value\n+    .split('\\n')\n+    .map((line) => line.replace(/^#+\\s*/, '').trim())\n+    .find((line) => line.length >= 4 && !/^[-|:]+$/.test(line));\n+}\n+\n+function extractEvidenceHints(value: string): string[] {\n+  const pathPattern = /[\\w./-]+\\.(?:vue|ts|tsx|js|py|go|java|rb|php)/g;\n+  const paths = Array.from(value.matchAll(pathPattern))\n+    .map((match) => match[0])\n+    .slice(0, 5);\n+  return paths.length > 0 ? paths.map((path) => `涉及代码路径：${path}`) : [];\n+}\n+\n+function extractSearchKeywords(userMessage: string, finalAnswer: string): string[] {\n+  const combined = `${userMessage}\\n${finalAnswer}`;\n+  const candidates = [\n+    userMessage,\n+    ...Array.from(\n+      combined.matchAll(\n+        /(?:storage-manage|manage projects|管理项目|数字搜索|输入法|composition|chat_id|title|resource\\.py|index\\.vue|use-storage-manage\\.ts)/gi,\n+      ),\n+    ).map((match) => match[0]),\n+  ];\n+  return normalizeKeywords(candidates);\n+}\n+\n function parseJsonObject(text: string): Record<string, unknown> | undefined {\n   const trimmed = text.trim();\n*** End Patch"

Output:
  }

  private resolveProjectKey(
    input: RunAfterCompletionInput,
    analysis: AiJiraAnalysis,
  ): string {
    const configured = appConfig.jira.projectKey?.trim();
    if (configured) {
      return configured;
    }
    const combined = `${input.userMessage}\n${input.assistantText}\n${analysis.title ?? ''}`;
    return /\bMGX\b|atoms\.dev|HelpFlow|nuxt-mgx|storage-manage|manage projects|管理项目|Frontend Project/i.test(
      combined,
    )
      ? 'MGX'
      : '';
  }

  private async searchSimilarIssues(input: {
    projectKey: string;
    keywords: string[];
  }): Promise<JiraSimilarIssueRecord[]> {
    if (!input.keywords.length) {
      return [];
    }
    const terms = input.keywords.slice(0, 4).map(quoteJqlText);
    const jql = `project = ${quoteJqlText(input.projectKey)} AND (${terms
      .map((term) => `text ~ ${term}`)
      .join(' OR ')}) ORDER BY updated DESC`;
    try {
      const json = await this.jiraRequest<JiraSearchResult>({
        method: 'POST',
        path: '/rest/api/2/search',
        body: {
          jql,
          maxResults: appConfig.jira.defaultSearchLimit,
          fields: ['summary', 'status', 'issuetype', 'assignee', 'updated'],
        },
      });
      return (json.issues ?? [])
        .map((issue) => this.toSimilarIssue(issue))
        .filter((issue): issue is JiraSimilarIssueRecord => Boolean(issue));
    } catch (error) {
      this.logger.warn(
        formatLog('jira_follow_up.search_failed', {
          projectKey: input.projectKey,
          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
        }),
      );
      return [];
    }
  }

  private toSimilarIssue(
    issue: JiraIssueJson,
  ): JiraSimilarIssueRecord | undefined {
    const key = issue.key?.trim();
    if (!key) {
      return undefined;
    }
    return {
      key,
      summary: issue.fields?.summary?.trim() || key,
      status: issue.fields?.status?.name,
      issueType: issue.fields?.issuetype?.name,
      assignee:
        issue.fields?.assignee?.displayName || issue.fields?.assignee?.name,
      updated: issue.fields?.updated,
      url: this.issueUrl(key),
    };
  }

  private async buildIssueDraft(input: {
    projectKey: string;
    analysis: AiJiraAnalysis;
    conversationId: string;
    runId: string;
  }): Promise<JiraIssueDraftRecord> {
    const meta = await this.getCreateMeta(input.projectKey);
    const selected = this.selectIssueType(meta, input.analysis);
    if (!selected?.id || !selected.n

[... truncated 4 characters ...]

Boolean) as string[];
}

function issueTypeNameMatches(
  value: string | undefined,
  candidate: string,
): boolean {
  const left = value?.trim().toLowerCase();
  const right = candidate.trim().toLowerCase();
  return Boolean(
    left &&
    right &&
    (left === right || left.includes(right) || right.includes(left)),
  );
}

function isManageableIssueType(issueType: JiraIssueTypeMeta): boolean {
  const required = requiredCreateFields(issueType);
  return required.every((field) =>
    ['project', 'issuetype', 'summary', 'description', 'components'].includes(
      field.key,
    ),
  );
}

function requiredCreateFields(
  issueType: JiraIssueTypeMeta,
): Array<{ key: string; name: string }> {
  return Object.entries(issueType.fields ?? {})
    .filter(([, field]) => field.required === true)
    .map(([key, field]) => ({ key, name: field.name || key }));
}

function findAllowedValue(
  allowedNames: string[],
  candidate: string | undefined,
): string | undefined {
  const normalized = candidate?.trim().toLowerCase();
  if (!normalized) return undefined;
  return allowedNames.find((item) => {
    const value = item.trim().toLowerCase();
    return (
      value === normalized ||
      value.includes(normalized) ||
      normalized.includes(value)
    );
  });
}

interface JiraConversationContext {
  conversationId: string;
  runId: string;
}

}

function inferAnalysisFromInput(
  input: RunAfterCompletionInput,
): AiJiraAnalysis {
  const userMessage = input.userMessage.trim();
  const finalAnswer = input.assistantText.trim();
  const combined = `${userMessage}\n${finalAnswer}`;
  const issueLike =
    /bug|报错|异常|失败|不可用|错误|有误|误匹配|不对|未.*成功|提前触发|无法|不生效|问题|风险|触发搜索|已定位|定位到|建议修复/u.test(
      combined,
    );
  const requirementLike =
    /需求|希望|新增|新建|支持|一键|创建|功能/u.test(userMessage) && !issueLike;
  const optimizationLike =
    /优化|改进|体验|建议优化/u.test(combined) && !issueLike;
  const classification: JiraFollowUpClassification = issueLike
    ? 'bug'
    : optimizationLike
      ? 'optimization'
      : requirementLike
        ? 'requirement'
        : 'none';

  const assessmentScore = input.assessment?.score ?? 0;
  const confidence =
    classification === 'none' ? 0 : assessmentScore >= 55 ? 0.72 : 0.5;
  const title = sanitizeSummary(
    userMessage || inferTitleFromFinal(finalAnswer),
  );

  return {
    classification,
    confidence,
    title,
    detailSummary:
      firstMeaningfulLine(finalAnswer) ||
      userMessage ||
      '排查总结指向一个需要 Jira 跟进的问题。',
    actualBehavior: userMessage || '见本轮排查总结。',
    expectedBehavior: '待补充',
    reproductionSteps: ['按本轮用户反馈路径复查对应页面或接口行为。'],
    impact: '待确认',
    evidence: extractEvidenceHints(finalAnswer),
    searchKeywords: extractSearchKeywords(userMessage, finalAnswer),
    reason:
      classification === 'none'
        ? 'No issue-like signal found in the completed investigation.'
        : 'Fallback classified from completed investigation signals.',
  };
}

function inferTitleFromFinal(value: string): string {
  return firstMeaningfulLine(value) || '待创建 Jira 单';
}

function firstMeaningfulLine(value: string): string | undefined {
  return value
    .split('\n')
    .map((line) => line.replace(/^#+\s*/, '').trim())
    .find((line) => line.length >= 4 && !/^[-|:]+$/.test(line));
}

function extractEvidenceHints(value: string): string[] {
  const pathPattern = /[\w./-]+\.(?:vue|ts|tsx|js|py|go|java|rb|php)/g;
  const paths = Array.from(value.matchAll(pathPattern))
    .map((match) => match[0])
    .slice(0, 5);
  return paths.length > 0 ? paths.map((path) => `涉及代码路径：${path}`) : [];
}

function extractSearchKeywords(
  userMessage: string,
  finalAnswer: string,
): string[] {
  const combined = `${userMessage}\n${finalAnswer}`;
  const candidates = [
    userMessage,
    ...Array.from(
      combined.matchAll(
        /(?:storage-manage|manage

[... truncated 4 characters ...]

]),
  ];
  return normalizeKeywords(candidates);
}

function parseJsonObject(text: string): Record<string, unknown> | undefined {
  const trimmed = text.trim();
  if (!trimmed) return undefined;
  const withoutFence = trimmed
    .replace(/^```(?:json)?\s*/i, '')
    .replace(/\s*```$/i, '')
    .trim();
  const startIndex = withoutFence.indexOf('{');
  const endIndex = withoutFence.lastIndexOf('}');
            runId: input.runId,
          })
        : buildDescription(input.analysis),
    components: [],
    missingFields: [reason],
    canCreate: false,
    disabledReason: reason,
  };
}

function normalizeKeywords(value: string[] | undefined): string[] {
  const seen = new Set<string>();
  return (value ?? [])
    .map((item) => item.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim())
    .filter((item) => item.length >= 2 && item.length <= 80)
    .filter((item) => {
      const key = item.toLowerCase();
      if (seen.has(key)) return false;
      seen.add(key);
      return true;
    })
    .slice(0, 5);
}

function sanitizeSummary(value: string | undefined): string {
  const normalized = (value || '待创建 Jira 单').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
  return truncate(normalized, 120);
}

function quoteJqlText(value: string): string {
  return `"${value.replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/"/g, '\\"')}"`;
}

function previewForFollowUp(followUp: JiraFollowUpRecord): string {

3 : 1;\n+    score += weight;\n+    if (weight >= 3) {\n+      matchedStrongTerm = true;\n+    }\n+  }\n+\n+  if (!matchedStrongTerm || matchedTerms < 2) {\n+    return 0;\n+  }\n+  return score;\n+}\n+\n+const strongJiraSearchTerms = new Set([\n+  'storage-manage',\n+  'manageprojects',\n+  '管理项目',\n+  '数字搜索',\n+  '输入法',\n+  'composition',\n+  'chat_id',\n+  'resource.py',\n+  'use-storage-manage.ts',\n+]);\n+\n+function normalizeComparableText(value: string): string {\n+  return value\n+    .toLowerCase()\n+    .replace(/[\\s\"'“”‘’【】\\[\\]()（）]+/g, '')\n+    .trim();\n+}\n \n function parseJsonObject(text: string): Record<string, unknown> | undefined {\n*** End Patch"

  }

  private resolveProjectKey(
    input: RunAfterCompletionInput,
    analysis: AiJiraAnalysis,
  ): string {
    const configured = appConfig.jira.projectKey?.trim();
    if (configured) {
      return configured;
    }
    const combined = `${input.userMessage}\n${input.assistantText}\n${analysis.title ?? ''}`;
    return /\bMGX\b|atoms\.dev|HelpFlow|nuxt-mgx|storage-manage|manage projects|管理项目|Frontend Project/i.test(
      combined,
    )
      ? 'MGX'
      : '';
  }

  private async searchSimilarIssues(input: {
    projectKey: string;
    keywords: string[];
  }): Promise<JiraSimilarIssueRecord[]> {
    if (!input.keywords.length) {
      return [];
    }
    const searchTerms = input.keywords
      .filter(isUsefulJiraSearchTerm)
      .slice(0, 6);
    if (!searchTerms.length) {
      return [];
    }
    const terms = searchTerms.map(quoteJqlText);
    const jql = `project = ${quoteJqlText(input.projectKey)} AND (${terms
      .map((term) => `text ~ ${term}`)
      .join(' OR ')}) ORDER BY updated DESC`;
    try {
      const json = await this.jiraRequest<JiraSearchResult>({
        method: 'POST',
        path: '/rest/api/2/search',
        body: {
          jql,
          maxResults: appConfig.jira.defaultSearchLimit,
          fields: ['summary', 'status', 'issuetype', 'assignee', 'updated'],
        },
      });
      return (json.issues ?? [])
        .map((issue) => this.toSimilarIssue(issue))
        .filter((issue): issue is JiraSimilarIssueRecord => Boolean(issue))
        .map((issue) => ({
          issue,
          score: scoreSimilarIssue(issue, searchTerms),
        }))
        .filter(({ score }) => score >= 4)
        .sort((left, right) => right.score - left.score)
        .slice(0, 5)
        .map(({ issue }) => issue);
    } catch (error) {
      this.logger.warn(
        formatLog('jira_follow_up.search_failed', {
          projectKey: input.projectKey,
          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
        }),
      );
      return [];
    }
  }

  private toSimilarIssue(
    issue: JiraIssueJson,
  ): JiraSimilarIssueRecord | undefined {
    const key = issue.key?.trim();
    if (!key) {
      return undefined;
    }
    return {
      key,
      analysis.reproductionSteps?.length &&
      analysis.reproductionSteps.length > 0
        ? analysis.reproductionSteps
        : fallback.reproductionSteps,
    impact: analysis.impact || fallback.impact,
    evidence:
      analysis.evidence?.lengt

[... truncated 4 characters ...]

ex + 1}. ${item}`)
      : ['1. 待补充']),
    '',
    '## 对话链接',
    ...conversationLines,
    '',
    '## 影响范围',
    analysis.impact || '待补充',
    '',
    '## 已确认事实',
    ...(analysis.evidence?.length
      ? analysis.evidence.map((item) => `- ${item}`)
      : ['- 待补充']),
  ].join('\n');
}

function buildConversationLines(context?: JiraConversationContext): string[] {
  if (!context) {
    return ['- 待补充'];
  }
  return [
    `- ${buildConversationUrl(context)}`,
    `- Conversation ID: ${context.conversationId}`,
    `- Run ID: ${context.runId}`,
  ];
}

function buildConversationUrl(context: JiraConversationContext): string {
  const encodedConversationId = encodeURIComponent(context.conversationId);
  const encodedRunId = encodeURIComponent(context.runId);
  const template = appConfig.jira.conversationUrlTemplate?.trim();
  if (template) {
    return template
      .replace(/\{conversationId\}/g, encodedConversationId)
      .replace(/\{runId\}/g, encodedRunId);
  }
  return `/chat/${encodedConversationId}?runId=${encodedRunId}`;
}

function disabledDraft(

    projectKey: string;
    analysis: AiJiraAnalysis;
    conversationId?: string;
    runId?: string;

  issueTypeName: string,
  reason: string,
): JiraIssueDraftRecord {
  return {
    projectKey: input.projectKey,
    issueTypeId,
    issueTypeName,

import { BadRequestException, Injectable, Logger } from '@nestjs/common';
import {
  appConfig,
  resolveRuntimeModelForProvider,
} from '../shared/app-config';
import type {
  AcpEvent,
  AcpStepCompleted,
  InvestigationConfidenceAssessment,
} from '../acp/models';
import { formatLog } from '../shared/logging';
import { redactSensitiveText } from '../shared/sensitive-redaction';
import { AcpPublisherService } from './acp-publisher.service';
import { ConversationService } from './conversation.service';

export type JiraFollowUpClassification =
  | 'none'
  | 'bug'
  | 'optimization'
  | 'requirement';

export interface JiraSimilarIssueRecord {
  key: string;
  summary: string;
  status?: string;
  issueType?: string;
  assignee?: string;
  updated?: string;
  url: string;
}

export interface JiraIssueDraftRecord {
  projectKey: string;
  issueTypeId: string;
  issueTypeName: string;
  summary: string;
  description: string;
  components: string[];
  missingFields: string[];
  canCreate: boolean;
  disabledReason?: string;
}

export interface JiraCreatedIssueRecord {
  key: string;
  id?: string;
  self?: string;
  url: string;
}

export interface JiraFollowUpRecord {
  status: 'similar_found' | 'draft_ready' | 'created' | 'error' | 'skipped';
  classification: JiraFollowUpClassification;
  confidence: number;
  title: string;
  detailSummary: string;
  reason?: string;
  searchKeywords: string[];
  similarIssues: JiraSimilarIssueRecord[];
  issueDraft?: JiraIssueDraftRecord;
  createdIssue?: JiraCreatedIssueRecord;
  errorMessage?: string;
  analyzedAt: string;
}

interface RunAfterCompletionInput {
  conversationId: string;
  requestId?: string;
  runId: string;
  userMessage: string;
  assistantText: string;
  events: AcpEvent[];
  assessment?: InvestigationConfidenceAssessment;
}

interface AiJiraAnalysis {
  classification: JiraFollowUpClassification;
  confidence?: number;
  title?: string;
  detailSummary?: string;
  actualBehavior?: string;
  expectedBehavior?: string;
  reproductionSteps?: string[];
  impact?: string;
  evidence?: string[];
  issueTypeHint?: string;
  componentHint?: string;
  searchKeywords?: string[];
  reason?: string;
}

interface ResponsesApiResult {
  output_text?: unknown;
  output?: unknown;
}

interface ChatCompletionsResult {
  choices?: Array<{
    message?: {
      content?: unknown;
    };
  }>;
}

interface JiraSearchResult {
  issues?: JiraIssueJson[];
}

interface JiraIssueJson {
  id?: string;
  key?: string;

  private canRun(input: RunAfterCompletionInput): boolean {
    if (!appConfig.jira.enabled || !appConfig.jira.followUpEnabled) {
      return false;
    }
    const config = appConfig.aiRuntime.codex;
    if (
      !resolveRuntimeModelForProvider('codex') ||
      !config.baseUrl ||
      !config.authToken
    ) {
      return false;
    }
    const text = `${input.userMessage}\n${input.assistantText}`.toLowerCase();
    if (input.assessment && input.assessment.score >= 55) {
      return true;
    }
    return /bug|报错|异常|失败|不可用|优化|需求|feature|requirement|复现|根因|排查/.test(
      text,
    );
  }

  private async buildFollowUp(
    input: RunAfterCompletionInput,
  ): Promise<JiraFollowUpRecord | undefined> {
    const analysis = enrichAnalysisWithFallback(
      await this.analyze(input),
      input,
    );
    if (
      analysis.classification === 'none' ||
      (analysis.confidence ?? 0) < 0.45
    ) {
      return {
        status: 'skipped',
        classification: 'none',

    const projectKey = this.resolveProjectKey(input, analysis);
    if (!projectKey) {
      return this.errorRecord(
        analysis,
        '无法确定 Jira project key。请配置 JIRA_PROJECT，或在上下文中明确项目。',

    }

    const searchKeywords = normalizeKeywords(analysis.searchKeywords);
    const similarIssues = await this.searchSimilarIssues({
      projectKey,
      keywords: searchKeywords,
    });
    const baseRecord = this.baseRecord(analysis, searchKeywords);

    if (similarIssues.length > 0) {
      return {
        ...baseRecord,
        status: 'similar_found',
        similarIssues,
      };
    }

    const draft = await this.buildIssueDraft({
      projectKey,
      analysis,
      conversationId: input.conversationId,
      runId: input.runId,
    });
    return {
      ...baseRecord,
      status: 'draft_ready',
      similarIssues: [],
      issueDraft: draft,
    };
  }

  private async analyze(
    input: RunAfterCompletionInput,
  ): Promise<AiJiraAnalysis> {
    const model = resolveRuntimeModelForProvider('codex');

      return {
        classification: 'none',
        confidence: 0,
        reason: 'AI config missing',
      };

        finalAnswer: truncate(input.assistantText, 9000),

      null,
      2,

      model,

      authToken: ********************************
      prompt,
    });

nalysis,
  ): JiraIssueTypeMeta | undefined {
    const issueTypes = meta.projects?.[0]?.issuetypes ?? [];
    const candidates = issueTypeCandidates(analysis);
    for (const candidate of candidates) {
      const matched = issueTypes.find((item) =>
        issueTypeNameMatches(item.name, candidate),
      );
      if (matched && isManageableIssueType(matched)) {
        return matched;
      }
    }
    return (
      issueTypes.find(
        (item) =>
          issueTypeNameMatches(item.name, 'Task') &&
          isManageableIssueType(item),
      ) ??
      issueTypes.find(
        (item) =>
          issueTypeNameMatches(item.name, '任务') &&
          isManageableIssueType(item),
      ) ??
      issueTypes.find(isManageableIssueType)
    );
  }

  private resolveComponents(
    issueType: JiraIssueTypeMeta,
    analysis: AiJiraAnalysis,
  ): { components: string[]; missing: boolean } {
    const componentField = issueType.fields?.components;
    if (!componentField?.required) {
      return { components: [], missing: false };
    }
    const allowedNames =
      componentField.allowedValues
        ?.map((item) => item.name || item.value)
        .filter((item): item is string => Boolean(item?.trim())) ?? [];
    const configured = appConfig.jira.defaultComponent?.trim();
    const hint = analysis.componentHint?.trim();
    const selected =

    const selected =
      findAllowedValue(allowedNames, configured) ??
      findAllowedValue(allowedNames, hint) ??
      (allowedNames.length === 1 ? allowedNames[0] : undefined);
    return selected
      ? { components: [selected], missing: false }
      : { components: [], missing: true };
  }

  private async createIssue(
    draft: JiraIssueDraftRecord,
  ): Promise<JiraCreatedIssueRecord> {
    const fields: Record<string, unknown> = {
      project: { key: draft.projectKey },
      issuetype: { id: draft.issueTypeId },
      summary: draft.summary,
      description: draft.description,
    };
    if (draft.components.length > 0) {
      fields.components = draft.components.map((name) => ({ name }));
    }
    const created = await this.jiraRequest<JiraCreateResult>({
      method: 'POST',
      path: '/rest/api/2/issue',
      body: { fields },
    });
    const key = created.key?.trim();
    if (!key) {
      throw new BadRequestException(
        'Jira create succeeded but did not return an issue key.',
      );
    }
    return {
      key,
      id: created.id,
      self: created.self,
      url: this.issueUrl(key),
    };
  }

  private async findLatestFollowUp(input: {
    conversationId: string;
    runId: string;
  }): Promise<JiraFollowUpRecord | undefined> {
    const events = await this.conversationService.listEvents(
      input.conversationId,
    );
    const event = [...events]
      .reverse()
      .find(
        (item) =>
          item.kind === 'artifact.created' &&
          item.runId === input.runId &&
          item.artifactKind === 'jira_follow_up' &&
          isRecord(item.payload),
      );
    if (
      !event ||
      event.kind !== 'artifact.created' ||
      !isRecord(event.payload)
    ) {
      return undefined;
    }
    return event.payload as unknown as JiraFollowUpRecord;
  }

  private async publishFollowUp(
    input: RunAfterCompletionInput,
    followUp: JiraFollowUpRecord,
  ): Promise<void> {
    await this.publisher.publish({
      event: {
        kind: 'artifact.created',
        conversationId: input.conversationId,
        requestId: input.requestId,
        runId: input.runId,
        itemId: `jira-follow-up:${input.runId}`,
        artifactKind: 'jira_follow_up',
        label: 'Jira follow-up',
        preview: previewForFollowUp(followUp),
        payload: followUp as unknown as Record<string, unknown>,
      },
    });
  }

  private baseRecord(
    analysis: AiJiraAnalysis,
    searchK

[... truncated 4 characters ...]

re ?? 0;
  const confidence =
    classification === 'none' ? 0 : assessmentScore >= 55 ? 0.72 : 0.5;
  const title = sanitizeSummary(
    userMessage || inferTitleFromFinal(finalAnswer),
  );

  return {
    classification,
    confidence,
    title,
    detailSummary:
      firstMeaningfulLine(finalAnswer) ||
      userMessage ||
      '排查总结指向一个需要 Jira 跟进的问题。',
    actualBehavior: userMessage || '见本轮排查总结。',
    expectedBehavior: '待补充',
    reproductionSteps: ['按本轮用户反馈路径复查对应页面或接口行为。'],
    impact: '待确认',
    evidence: extractEvidenceHints(finalAnswer),
    searchKeywords: extractSearchKeywords(userMessage, finalAnswer),
    reason:
      classification === 'none'
        ? 'No issue-like signal found in the completed investigation.'
        : 'Fallback classified from completed investigation signals.',
  };
}

function inferTitleFromFinal(value: string): string {
  return firstMeaningfulLine(value) || '待创建 Jira 单';
}

function firstMeaningfulLine(value: string): string | undefined {
  return value
    .split('\n')
    .map((line) => line.replace(/^#+\s*/, '').trim())
    .find((line) => line.length >= 4 && !/^[-|:]+$/.test(line));
}

function extractEvidenceHints(value: string): string[] {
  const pathPattern = /[\w./-]+\.(?:vue|ts|tsx|js|py|go|java|rb|php)/g;
  const paths = Array.from(value.matchAll(pathPattern))
    .map((match) => match[0])

Output:
    classification === 'none' ? 0 : assessmentScore >= 55 ? 0.72 : 0.5;
  const title = sanitizeSummary(
    userMessage || inferTitleFromFinal(finalAnswer),
  );

  return {
    classification,
    confidence,
    title,
    detailSummary:
      firstMeaningfulLine(finalAnswer) ||
      userMessage ||
      '排查总结指向一个需要 Jira 跟进的问题。',
    actualBehavior: userMessage || '见本轮排查总结。',
    expectedBehavior: '待补充',
    reproductionSteps: ['按本轮用户反馈路径复查对应页面或接口行为。'],
    impact: '待确认',
    evidence: extractEvidenceHints(finalAnswer),
    searchKeywords: extractSearchKeywords(userMessage, finalAnswer),
    reason:
      classification === 'none'
        ? 'No issue-like signal found in the completed investigation.'
        : 'Fallback classified from completed investigation signals.',
  };
}

function inferTitleFromFinal(value: string): string {
  return firstMeaningfulLine(value) || '待创建 Jira 单';
}

function firstMeaningfulLine(value: string): string | undefined {
  return value
    .split('\n')
    .map((line) => line.replace(/^#+\s*/, '').trim())
    .find((line) => line.length >= 4 && !/^[-|:]+$/.test(line));
}

function extractEvidenceHints(value: string): string[] {
  const pathPattern = /[\w./-]+\.(?:vue|ts|tsx|js|py|go|java|rb|php)/g;
  const paths = Array.from(value.matchAll(pathPattern))
    .map((match) => match[0])
    .slice(0, 5);
  return paths.length > 0 ? paths.map((path) => `涉及代码路径：${path}`) : [];
}

function extractSearchKeywords(
  userMessage: string,
  finalAnswer: string,
): string[] {
  const combined = `${userMessage}\n${finalAnswer}`;
  const candidates = [
    ...Array.from(
      combined.matchAll(
        /(?:storage-manage|manage projects|管理项目|数字搜索|输入法|composition|chat_id|title|resource\.py|index\.vue|use-storage-manage\.ts)/gi,
      ),
    ).map((match) => match[0]),
  ];
  return normalizeKeywords(candidates);
}

function isUsefulJiraSearchTerm(value: string): boolean {
  const normalized = value.trim().toLowerCase();
  if (normalized.length < 3) {
    return /[\u4e00-\u9fa5]{2,}/u.test(normalized);
  }
  return !new Set([
    '项目',
    '搜索',
    '问题',
    '失败',
    '报错',
    'title',
    'index.vue',
  ]).has(normalized);
}

function scoreSimilarIssue(
  issue: JiraSimilarIssueRecord,
  searchTerms: string[],
): number {
  const summary = normalizeComparableText(issue.summary);
  let score = 0;
  let matchedTerms = 0;
  let matchedStrongTerm = false;

  for (const term of searchTerms) {
    const normalizedTerm = normalizeComparableText(term);
    if (!normalizedTerm || !summary.includes(normalizedTerm)) {
      continue;
    }
    matchedTerms += 1;
    const weight = strongJiraSearchTerms.has(normalizedTerm) ? 3 : 1;
    score += weight;
    if (weight >= 3) {
      matchedStrongTerm = true;
    }
  }

  if (!matchedStrongTerm || matchedTerms < 2) {
    return 0;
  }
  return score;
}

const strongJiraSearchTerms = new Set([
  'storage-manage',
  'manageprojects',
  '管理项目',
  '数字搜索',
  '输入法',
  'composition',
  'chat_id',
  'resource.py',
  'use-storage-manage.ts',
]);

function normalizeComparableText(value: string): string {
  return value
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[\s"'“”‘’【】\[\]()（）]+/g, '')
    .trim();
}

function parseJsonObject(text: string): Record<string, unknown> | undefined {
  const trimmed = text.trim();
  if (!trimmed) return undefined;
  const withoutFence = trimmed
    .replace(/^```(?:json)?\s*/i, '')
    .replace(/\s*```$/i, '')
    .trim();
  const startIndex = withoutFence.indexOf('{');
  const endIndex = withoutFence.lastIndexOf('}');
  if (startIndex < 0 || endIndex <= startIndex) {
    return undefined;
  }
  const candidate = withoutFence.slice(startIndex, endIndex + 1);
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(candidate);
    return isRecord(parsed) ? parsed : undefined;
  } catch {
    return undefined;

Output:
  const encodedConversationId = encodeURIComponent(context.conversationId);
  const encodedRunId = encodeURIComponent(context.runId);
  const template = appConfig.jira.conversationUrlTemplate?.trim();
  if (template) {
    return template
      .replace(/\{conversationId\}/g, encodedConversationId)
      .replace(/\{runId\}/g, encodedRunId);
  }
  return `/chat/${encodedConversationId}?runId=${encodedRunId}`;
}

function disabledDraft(
  input: {
    projectKey: string;
    analysis: AiJiraAnalysis;
    conversationId?: string;
    runId?: string;
  },
  issueTypeId: string,
  issueTypeName: string,
  reason: string,
): JiraIssueDraftRecord {
  return {
    projectKey: input.projectKey,
    issueTypeId,
    issueTypeName,
    summary: sanitizeSummary(input.analysis.title),
    description:
      input.conversationId && input.runId
        ? buildDescription(input.analysis, {
            conversationId: input.conversationId,
            runId: input.runId,
          })
        : buildDescription(input.analysis),
    components: [],
    missingFields: [reason],
    canCreate: false,
    disabledReason: reason,
  };
}

function normalizeKeywords(value: string[] | undefined): string[] {
  const seen = new Set<string>();
  return (value ?? [])
    .map((item) => item.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim())
    .filter((item) => item.length >= 2 && item.length <= 80)
    .filter((item) => {
      const key = item.toLowerCase();
      if (seen.has(key)) return false;
      seen.add(key);
      return true;
    })
    .slice(0, 5);
}

function sanitizeSummary(value: string | undefined): string {
  const normalized = (value || '待创建 Jira 单').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
  return truncate(normalized, 120);
}

function quoteJqlText(value: string): string {
  return `"${value.replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/"/g, '\\"')}"`;
}

function previewForFollowUp(followUp: JiraFollowUpRecord): string {
  if (followUp.status === 'similar_found') {
    return `Found ${followUp.similarIssues.length} similar Jira issue(s).`;
  }
  if (followUp.status === 'draft_ready') {
    return followUp.issueDraft?.canCreate
      ? 'Jira issue draft is ready.'
      : followUp.issueDraft?.disabledReason ||
          'Jira issue draft needs required fields.';
  }
  if (followUp.status === 'created' && followUp.createdIssue) {
    return `Created Jira ${followUp.createdIssue.key}.`;

Output:
    };
    await this.publisher.publish({
      event: {
        kind: 'artifact.created',
        conversationId: input.conversationId,
        runId: input.runId,
        itemId: `jira-follow-up:${input.runId}`,
        artifactKind: 'jira_follow_up',
        label: 'Jira follow-up',
        preview: `Created Jira ${createdIssue.key}`,
        payload: updated as unknown as Record<string, unknown>,
      },
    });
    return createdIssue;
  }

  private canRun(input: RunAfterCompletionInput): boolean {
    if (!appConfig.jira.enabled || !appConfig.jira.followUpEnabled) {
      return false;
    }
    const config = appConfig.aiRuntime.codex;
    return Boolean(
      resolveRuntimeModelForProvider('codex') &&
        config.baseUrl &&
        config.authToken &&
        input.assistantText.trim(),
    );
  }

  private async buildFollowUp(
    input: RunAfterCompletionInput,
  ): Promise<JiraFollowUpRecord | undefined> {
    const analysis = enrichAnalysisWithFallback(
      await this.analyze(input),
      input,
    );
    if (
      analysis.classification === 'none' ||
      (analysis.confidence ?? 0) < 0.45
    ) {
      return {
        status: 'skipped',
        classification: 'none',
        confidence: analysis.confidence ?? 0,
        title: analysis.title || '',
        detailSummary: analysis.reason || '当前结论不需要创建 Jira。',
        reason: analysis.reason,
        searchKeywords: [],
        similarIssues: [],
        analyzedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      };
    }

    const projectKey = this.resolveProjectKey();
    if (!projectKey) {
      return this.errorRecord(
        analysis,
        '无法确定 Jira project key。请配置 JIRA_PROJECT。',
      );
    }

    const searchKeywords = normalizeKeywords(analysis.searchKeywords);
    const similarIssues = await this.searchSimilarIssues({
      projectKey,
      keywords: searchKeywords,
    });
    const baseRecord = this.baseRecord(analysis, searchKeywords);

    if (similarIssues.length > 0) {
      return {
        ...baseRecord,
        status: 'similar_found',
        similarIssues,
      };
    }

    const draft = await this.buildIssueDraft({
      projectKey,
      analysis,
      conversationId: input.conversationId,
      runId: input.runId,
    });
    return {
      ...baseRecord,
      status: 'draft_ready',
      similarIssues: [],
      issueDraft: draft,
    };
  }

  private async analyze(
    input: RunAfterCompletionInput,
  ): Promise<AiJiraAnalysis> {
    const model = res

[... truncated 4 characters ...]

= 12 ? 5 : 4;
  }
  const chineseLength = countChineseCharacters(value);
  if (chineseLength >= 10) {
    return 5;
  }
  if (chineseLength >= 6) {
    return 4;
  }
  if (chineseLength >= 4) {
    return 3;
  }
  if (normalizedLength >= 12) {
    return 4;
  }
  return normalizedLength >= 8 ? 3 : 1;
}

function isHighConfidenceSingleMatch(value: string): boolean {
  if (isCodeLikeSearchTerm(value)) {
    return normalizeComparableText(value).length >= 8;
  }
  const chineseLength = countChineseCharacters(value);
  return chineseLength >= 8 || normalizeComparableText(value).length >= 12;
}

function countChineseCharacters(value: string): number {
  return Array.from(value.matchAll(/[\u4e00-\u9fa5]/gu)).length;
}

function normalizeComparableText(value: string): string {
  return value
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[\s"'“”‘’【】\[\]()（）]+/g, '')
    .trim();
}

function parseJsonObject(text: string): Record<string, unknown> | undefined {
  const trimmed = text.trim();
  if (!trimmed) return undefined;
  const withoutFence = trimmed
    .replace(/^```(?:json)?\s*/i, '')
    .replace(/\s*```$/i, '')
    .trim();
  const startIndex = withoutFence.indexOf('{');
  const endIndex = withoutFence.lastIndexOf('}');
  if (startIndex < 0 || endIndex <= startIndex) {
    return undefined;
  }
  const candidate = withoutFence.slice(startIndex, endIndex + 1);

Output:
  analysis: AiJiraAnalysis,
  input: RunAfterCompletionInput,
): AiJiraAnalysis {
  const fallback = inferAnalysisFromInput(input);
  if (
    (analysis.classification === 'none' || (analysis.confidence ?? 0) < 0.45) &&
    fallback.classification !== 'none'
  ) {
    return fallback;
  }
  if (analysis.classification === 'none') {
    return analysis;
  }
  return {
    ...analysis,
    title: analysis.title || fallback.title,
    detailSummary: analysis.detailSummary || fallback.detailSummary,
    actualBehavior: analysis.actualBehavior || fallback.actualBehavior,
    expectedBehavior: analysis.expectedBehavior || fallback.expectedBehavior,
    reproductionSteps:
      analysis.reproductionSteps?.length &&
      analysis.reproductionSteps.length > 0
        ? analysis.reproductionSteps
        : fallback.reproductionSteps,
    impact: analysis.impact || fallback.impact,
    evidence:
      analysis.evidence?.length && analysis.evidence.length > 0
        ? analysis.evidence
        : fallback.evidence,
    searchKeywords:
      analysis.searchKeywords?.length && analysis.searchKeywords.length > 0
        ? analysis.searchKeywords
        : fallback.searchKeywords,
  };
}

function inferAnalysisFromInput(
  input: RunAfterCompletionInput,
): AiJiraAnalysis {
  const userMessage = input.userMessage.trim();
  const finalAnswer = input.assistantText.trim();
  const title = sanitizeSummary(
    userMessage || inferTitleFromFinal(finalAnswer),
  );

  return {
    classification: 'none',
    confidence: 0,
    title,
    detailSummary:
      firstMeaningfulLine(finalAnswer) ||
      userMessage ||
      '排查总结指向一个需要 Jira 跟进的问题。',
    actualBehavior: userMessage || '见本轮排查总结。',
    expectedBehavior: '待补充',
    reproductionSteps: ['按本轮用户反馈路径复查对应页面或接口行为。'],
    impact: '待确认',
    evidence: extractEvidenceHints(finalAnswer),
    searchKeywords: extractSearchKeywords(userMessage, finalAnswer),
    reason: 'Fallback extracted non-classification fields only.',
  };
}

function inferTitleFromFinal(value: string): string {
  return firstMeaningfulLine(value) || '待创建 Jira 单';
}

function firstMeaningfulLine(value: string): string | undefined {
  return value
    .split('\n')
    .map((line) => line.replace(/^#+\s*/, '').trim())
    .find((line) => line.length >= 4 && !/^[-|:]+$/.test(line));
}

function extractEvidenceHints(value: string): string[] {
  const pathPattern = /[\w./-]+\.(?:vue|ts|tsx|js|py|go|java|rb|php)/g;
  const paths = Array.from(value.matchAll(pathPattern))
    .map((match) => match[0])
    .slice(0, 5);
  return paths.length > 0 ? paths.map((path) => `涉及代码路径：${path}`) : [];
}

function extractSearchKeywords(
  userMessage: string,
  finalAnswer: string,
): string[] {
  const combined = `${userMessage}\n${finalAnswer}`;
  const candidates = [
    ...extractCodeLikeSearchTerms(combined),
    ...extractChineseSearchTerms(userMessage),
    ...extractChineseSearchTerms(firstMeaningfulLine(finalAnswer) ?? ''),
    ...extractLatinSearchTerms(userMessage),
  ];
  return normalizeKeywords(candidates.filter(isUsefulJiraSearchTerm));
}

function isUsefulJiraSearchTerm(value: string): boolean {
  const trimmed = value.trim();
  if (!trimmed) {
    return false;
  }
  const normalized = normalizeComparableText(trimmed);
  if (!normalized || /^\d+$/.test(normalized)) {
    return false;
  }
  if (isCodeLikeSearchTerm(trimmed)) {
    return normalized.length >= 3;
  }
  const chineseLength = countChineseCharacters(trimmed);
  if (chineseLength > 0) {
    return chineseLength >= 4;
  }
  return normalized.length >= 6;
}

function scoreSimilarIssue(

  1066	function normalizeComparableText(value: string): string {
  1067	  return value

  1072
  1073	function parseJsonObject(text: string): Record<string, unknown> | undefined {
  1074	  const trimmed = text.trim();
  1075	  if (!trimmed) return undefined;
  1076	  const withoutFence = trimmed
  1077	    .replace(/^```(?:json)?\s*/i, '')
  1078	    .replace(/\s*```$/i, '')
  1079	    .trim();
  1080	  const startIndex = withoutFence.indexOf('{');
  1081	  const endIndex = withoutFence.lastIndexOf('}');
  1082	  if (startIndex < 0 || endIndex <= startIndex) {
  1083	    return undefined;
  1084	  }
  1085	  const candidate = withoutFence.slice(startIndex, endIndex + 1);
  1086	  try {
  1087	    const parsed = JSON.parse(candidate);
  1088	    return isRecord(parsed) ? parsed : undefined;
  1089	  } catch {
  1090	    return undefined;
  1091	  }
  1092	}

   259	  private async buildFollowUp(
   260	    input: RunAfterCompletionInput,
   261	  ): Promise<JiraFollowUpRecord | undefined> {
   262	    const analysis = enrichAnalysisWithFallback(
   263	      await this.analyze(input),
   264	      input,
   265	    );
   266	    if (
   267	      analysis.classification === 'none' ||
   268	      (analysis.confidence ?? 0) < 0.45
   269	    ) {
   270	      return {
   271	        status: 'skipped',
   272	        classification: 'none',
   273	        confidence: analysis.confidence ?? 0,
   274	        title: analysis.title || '',
   275	        detailSummary: analysis.reason || '当前结论不需要创建 Jira。',
   276	        reason: analysis.reason,
   277	        searchKeywords: [],
   278	        similarIssues: [],
   279	        analyzedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
   280	      };
   281	    }
   282
   283	    const projectKey = this.resolveProjectKey();
   284	    if (!projectKey) {
   285	      return this.errorRecord(
   286	        analysis,
   287	        '无法确定 Jira project key。请配置 JIRA_PROJECT。',
   288	      );
   289	    }
   290
   291	    const searchKeywords = normalizeKeywords(analysis.searchKeywords);
   292	    const similarIssues = await this.searchSimilarIssues({
   293	      projectKey,
   294	      keywords: searchKeywords,
   295	    });
   296	    const baseRecord = this.baseRecord(analysis, searchKeywords);
   297
   298	    if (similarIssues.length > 0) {
   299	      return {
   300	        ...baseRecord,
   301	        status: 'similar_found',
   302	        similarIssues,
   303	      };
   304	    }
   305
   306	    const draft = await this.buildIssueDraft({

   431	    }
   432	  }
   433
   434	  private resolveProjectKey(): string {
   435	    return appConfig.jira.projectKey?.trim() ?? '';
   436	  }
   437
   438	  private async searchSimilarIssues(input: {
   439	    projectKey: string;
   440	    keywords: string[];
   441	  }): Promise<JiraSimilarIssueRecord[]> {
   442	    if (!input.keywords.length) {
   443	      return [];
   444	    }
   445	    const searchTerms = input.keywords
   446	      .filter(isUsefulJiraSearchTerm)
   447	      .slice(0, 6);
   448	    if (!searchTerms.length) {
   449	      return [];
   450	    }
   451	    const terms = searchTerms.map(quoteJqlText);
   452	    const jql = `project = ${quoteJqlText(input.projectKey)} AND (${terms
   453	      .map((term) => `text ~ ${term}`)
   454	      .join(' OR ')}) ORDER BY updated DESC`;
   455	    try {
   456	      const json = await this.jiraRequest<JiraSearchResult>({
   457	        method: 'POST',
   458	        path: '/rest/api/2/search',
   459	        body: {
   460	          jql,
   461	          maxResults: appConfig.jira.defaultSearchLimit,
   462	          fields: ['summary', 'status', 'issuetype', 'assignee', 'updated'],
   463	        },
   464	      });
   465	      return (json.issues ?? [])
   466	        .map((issue) => this.toSimilarIssue(issue))
   467	        .filter((issue): issue is JiraSimilarIssueRecord => Boolean(issue))
   468	        .map((issue) => ({
   469	          issue,
   470	          score: scoreSimilarIssue(issue, searchTerms),
   471	        }))
   472	        .filter(({ score }) => score > 0)
   473	        .sort((left, right) => right.score - left.score)
   474	        .slice(0, 5)
   475	        .map(({ issue }) => issue);
   476	    } catch (error) {
   477	      this.logger.warn(
   478	        formatLog('jira_follow_up.search_failed', {
   479	          projectKey: input.projectKey,
   480	          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
   481	        }),
   482	      );
   483	      return [];
   484	    }
   485	  }
   486

   923	function inferTitleFromFinal(value: string): string {
   924	  return firstMeaningfulLine(value) || '待创建 Jira 单';
   925	}
   926
   927	function firstMeaningfulLine(value: string): string | undefined {
   928	  return value
   929	    .split('\n')
   930	    .map((line) => line.replace(/^#+\s*/, '').trim())
   931	    .find((line) => line.length >= 4 && !/^[-|:]+$/.test(line));
   932	}
   933
   934	function extractEvidenceHints(value: string): string[] {
   935	  const pathPattern = /[\w./-]+\.(?:vue|ts|tsx|js|py|go|java|rb|php)/g;
   936	  const paths = Array.from(value.matchAll(pathPattern))
   937	    .map((match) => match[0])
   938	    .slice(0, 5);
   939	  return paths.length > 0 ? paths.map((path) => `涉及代码路径：${path}`) : [];
   940	}
   941
   942	function extractSearchKeywords(
   943	  userMessage: string,

   950	    ...extractChineseSearchTerms(firstMeaningfulLine(finalAnswer) ?? ''),
   951	    ...extractLatinSearchTerms(userMessage),
   952	  ];
   953	  return normalizeKeywords(candidates.filter(isUsefulJiraSearchTerm));
   954	}

st(value);

  1032
  1033	function jiraSearchTermWeight(value: string): number {
  1034	  const normalizedLength = normalizeComparableText(value).length;
  1035	  if (isCodeLikeSearchTerm(value)) {
  1036	    return normalizedLength >= 12 ? 5 : 4;
  1037	  }
  1038	  const chineseLength = countChineseCharacters(value);
  1039	  if (chineseLength >= 10) {
  1040	    return 5;
  1041	  }
  1042	  if (chineseLength >= 6) {
  1043	    return 4;
  1044	  }
  1045	  if (chineseLength >= 4) {
  1046	    return 3;
  1047	  }
  1048	  if (normalizedLength >= 12) {
  1049	    return 4;
  1050	  }
  1051	  return normalizedLength >= 8 ? 3 : 1;
  1052	}
  1053
  1054	function isHighConfidenceSingleMatch(value: string): boolean {
  1055	  if (isCodeLikeSearchTerm(value)) {
  1056	    return normalizeComparableText(value).length >= 8;
  1057	  }
  1058	  const chineseLength = countChineseCharacters(value);
  1059	  return chineseLength >= 8 || normalizeComparableText(value).length >= 12;
  1060	}
  1061
  1062	function countChineseCharacters(value: string): number {
  1063	  return Array.from(value.matchAll(/[\u4e00-\u9fa5]/gu)).length;
  1064	}
  1065
  1066	function normalizeComparableText(value: string): string {
  1067	  return value
  1068	    .toLowerCase()
  1069	    .replace(/[\s"'“”‘’【】[\]()（）]+/g, '')
  1070	    .trim();
  1071	}

<script setup lang="ts">
import ChatMermaidBlock from '~/components/chat/ChatMermaidBlock.client.vue'
import { rewriteMarkdownCodeLinks } from '~/lib/code-links'

type ContentSegment =
  | { id: string; type: 'markdown'; content: string }
  | { id: string; type: 'mermaid'; content: string }

const props = withDefaults(
  defineProps<{
    content: string
    inline?: boolean
    streaming?: boolean
  }>(),
  {
    inline: false,
    streaming: false,
  }
)

const markdownBaseClass =
  'chat-markdown block break-words text-left text-current [&_a]:font-medium [&_a]:underline [&_a]:decoration-current/30 [&_a]:underline-offset-4 hover:[&_a]:decoration-current [&_blockquote]:rounded-lg [&_blockquote]:border [&_blockquote]:border-border/60 [&_blockquote]:bg-muted/35 [&_blockquote]:px-4 [&_blockquote]:py-3 [&_blockquote]:text-current/90 [&_code]:font-mono [&_h1]:text-xl [&_h1]:font-semibold [&_h2]:text-lg [&_h2]:font-semibold [&_h3]:text-base [&_h3]:font-semibold [&_h4]:text-sm [&_h4]:font-semibold [&_hr]:border-border/60 [&_li]:leading-7 [&_li+li]:mt-2 [&_ol]:list-decimal [&_ol]:pl-5 [&_p]:leading-7 [&_strong]:font-semibold [&_table]:w-full [&_table]:border-collapse [&_td]:border [&_td]:border-border/45 [&_td]:px-4 [&_td]:py-3 [&_th]:border [&_th]:border-border/45 [&_th]:bg-muted/25 [&_th]:px-4 [&_th]:py-3 [&_th]:text-left [&_ul]:list-disc [&_ul]:pl-5 [&_:not(pre)>code]:rounded-md [&_:not(pre)>code]:border-0 [&_:not(pre)>code]:bg-muted/35 [&_:not(pre)>code]:px-1 [&_:not(pre)>code]:py-0.5 [&_:not(pre)>code]:text-foreground/78'

const markdownContentClass = computed(() =>
  props.inline
    ? '[&_p]:inline [&_p]:leading-7 [&_ul]:my-2 [&_ol]:my-2'
    : 'text-sm [&_blockquote:not(:first-child)]:mt-4 [&_h1:not(:first-child)]:mt-6 [&_h2:not(:first-child)]:mt-5 [&_h3:not(:first-child)]:mt-4 [&_h4:not(:first-child)]:mt-4 [&_hr:not(:first-child)]:mt-5 [&_ol:not(:first-child)]:mt-4 [&_p:not(:first-child)]:mt-3 [&_pre:not(:first-child)]:mt-4 [&_table:not(:first-child)]:mt-4 [&_ul:not(:first-child)]:mt-4'
)

const { links: codeRepositoryLinks } = useCodeRepositoryLinks()
const renderContent = computed(() =>
  rewriteMarkdownCodeLinks(props.content, codeRepositoryLinks.value)
)
const streamingContent = computed(() =>
  props.streaming && !props.inline
    ? splitStableMarkdownPrefix(renderContent.value)
    : { stable: renderContent.value, tail: '' }
)
const mermaidFencePattern = /```mermaid[ \t]*\r?\n([\s\S]*?)```/g

const segments = computed<ContentSegment[]>(() => {

[... truncated 4 characters ...]

unction isIncompleteTableBlock(lines: string[]) {
  if (!lines.some((line) => line.includes('|'))) return false
  return !lines.some((line) => /^\s*\|?\s*:?-{3,}:?\s*(\|\s*:?-{3,}:?\s*)+\|?\s*$/.test(line))
}

function isIncompleteListBlock(lines: string[]) {
  const lastLine = lines.at(-1)?.trim() ?? ''
  return /^[-*+]\s*$/.test(lastLine) || /^\d+\.\s*$/.test(lastLine)
}

function isIncompleteHeading(lines: string[]) {
  const lastLine = lines.at(-1)?.trim() ?? ''
  return /^#{1,6}$/.test(lastLine)
}
</script>

<template>
  <MDC
    v-if="!hasMermaidBlocks"
    :value="streamingContent.stable"
    :tag="inline ? 'span' : 'div'"
    :unwrap="inline ? 'p' : false"
    :partial="true"
    :class="[markdownBaseClass, markdownContentClass]"
  />

  <div v-else class="space-y-4">
    <template v-for="segment in segments" :key="segment.id">
      <MDC
        v-if="segment.type === 'markdown'"
        :value="segment.content"
        tag="div"
        :partial="true"
        :class="[markdownBaseClass, markdownContentClass]"
      />

      <ClientOnly v-else>
        <ChatMermaidBlock :chart="segment.content" />
      </ClientOnly>
    </template>
  </div>

  <div
    v-if="streamingContent.tail"
    class="chat-markdown whitespace-pre-wrap break-words text-left text-sm leading-7 text-current"
  >
    {{ streamingContent.tail }}
  </div>
</template>

  .app-native-select {

  .app-inline-success {
    @apply flex items-start gap-2 rounded-xl bg-success/10 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-foreground;

  .app-inline-error {

  .app-table-shell {
    @apply overflow-x-auto rounded-2xl bg-card shadow-sm;

  .app-chip {

  .app-focus-ring {
    @apply outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring/50 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-background;

.chat-markdown {
  color: var(--foreground);
  font-size: 14px;
  line-height: 1.75;
  color: color-mix(in oklab, var(--foreground) 82%, transparent);

  > :first-child {
    margin-top: 0;
  }

  > :last-child {
    margin-bottom: 0;
  }

  h1,
  h2,
  h3,
  h4 {
    color: var(--foreground);
    letter-spacing: 0;
    scroll-margin-top: 96px;
  }

  h1 {
    border-bottom: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--border) 70%, transparent);
    margin: 1.75rem 0 1rem;
    padding-bottom: 0.75rem;
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    font-weight: 400;
  }

  h2 {
    font-size: 1.25rem;
    font-weight: 400;
    margin: 1.5rem 0 0.75rem;
  }

  h3 {
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    font-weight: 400;
    margin: 1.25rem 0 0.5rem;
  }

  h4 {
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    font-weight: 400;
    margin: 1.1rem 0 0.4rem;
  }

  p {
    line-height: 1.75;
    margin: 0.75rem 0;
    font-weight: 500;
  }

  ul,
  ol {
    margin: 0.75rem 0;
    padding-left: 1.5rem;
  }

  li {
    margin: 0.25rem 0;
    font-weight: 500;
  }

  strong {
    color: var(--foreground);
    font-weight: 600;
  }

  em {
    color: color-mix(in oklab, var(--foreground) 82%, transparent);
  }

  blockquote {
    border-left: 3px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 45%, transparent);
    background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--muted) 55%, transparent);
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
    margin: 1rem 0;
    color: var(--muted-foreground);
  }

  hr {
    border: none;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    margin: 1.5rem 0;
  }

  table {
    display: block;
    max-width: 100%;
    min-width: 100%;
    overflow-x: auto;
    width: max-content;
  }

  table::-webkit-scrollbar {
    height: 10px;
  }

  table::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
    background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--muted) 45%, transparent);
  }

  table::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
    background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--muted-foreground) 35%, transparent);
    border: 2px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--muted) 45%, transparent);
    border-radius: 999px;
  }

  pre {
    background: #0f1011;
    border: 1px solid #25272a;
    border-radius: 8px;
    box-shadow:
      inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06),
      rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12) 0 12px 28px -18px;
    color: #f4f5f5;
    font-family: var(--font-mono);
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1.7;

.chat-mermaid-shell {
  background:
    linear-gradient(
      180deg,
      color-mix(in oklab, var(--card) 96%, transparent),
      color-mix(in oklab, var(--background) 92%, transparent)
    ),
    radial-gradient(
      circle at top right,
      color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 8%, transparent),
      transparent 42%
    );
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--border) 80%, transparent);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.chat-mermaid-toolbar {
  align-items: center;
  background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--muted) 55%, transparent);
  border-bottom: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--border) 75%, transparent);

  gap: 0.625rem;
  justify-content: space-between;

[... truncated 4 characters ...]

{

.chat-mermaid-loading,
.chat-mermaid-error {
  color: var(--muted-foreground);
  font-size: 13px;

}

.chat-mermaid-source {
  background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--muted) 75%, transparent);
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--border) 70%, transparent);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  color: var(--foreground);

.chat-mermaid-canvas {
  overflow-x: auto;
  padding: 1rem;
}

.chat-mermaid-canvas--interactive {
  appearance: none;
  background: transparent;
  border: 0;
  cursor: zoom-in;
  display: block;
  position: relative;
  text-align: inherit;
  transition: background-color 160ms ease;
  width: 100%;
}

.chat-mermaid-canvas--interactive:hover {
  background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--muted) 40%, transparent);
}

.chat-mermaid-canvas--interactive:focus-visible {
  outline: 2px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 25%, transparent);
  outline-offset: -2px;
}

.chat-mermaid-preview-hint {
  background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--background) 84%, transparent);
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--border) 82%, transparent);

    for (const child of children) {
      if (child.nodeType === Node.ELEMENT_NODE) {
        visit(child as Element)
      }
    }
  }

  visit(root)
  return insertions
}

function needsCjkLatinBoundaryGap(left: ChildNode, right: ChildNode) {
  const leftChar = lastVisibleCharacter(left)
  const rightChar = firstVisibleCharacter(right)
  if (!leftChar || !rightChar) return false
  if (/\s/.test(leftChar) || /\s/.test(rightChar)) return false
  return (
    (isCjkCharacter(leftChar) && isLatinLikeCharacter(rightChar)) ||
    (isLatinLikeCharacter(leftChar) && isCjkCharacter(rightChar))
  )
}

function firstVisibleCharacter(node: ChildNode): string {
  const value = node.textContent || ''
  return value.trimStart().charAt(0)
}

function lastVisibleCharacter(node: ChildNode): string {
  const value = node.textContent || ''
  return value.trimEnd().slice(-1)
}

function isCjkCharacter(value: string) {
  return /^[\p{Script=Han}\p{Script=Hiragana}\p{Script=Katakana}\p{Script=Hangul}]$/u.test(value)
}

function isLatinLikeCharacter(value: string) {
  return /^[A-Za-z0-9@._%+\-/]$/.test(value)
}

function injectPaperTypesettingStyles(document: Document) {
  if (document.head.querySelector('style[data-dw-paper-typesetting]')) return

  const style = document.createElement('style')
  style.setAttribute('data-dw-paper-typesetting', 'true')
  style.textContent = `
    html, body {
      font-kerning: normal !important;
      text-rendering: geometricPrecision !important;
    }
    body {
      overflow-wrap: anywhere !important;
      word-break: normal !important;
    }
    body, body * {
      font-kerning: normal !important;
      letter-spacing: normal !important;
    }
    code, kbd, samp {
      display: inline !important;
      margin-inline: 0.18em !important;
      padding-inline: 0.12em !important;
      letter-spacing: 0.01em !important;
      line-height: inherit !important;
      vertical-align: baseline !important;
      white-space: break-spaces !important;
    }
    p, li, blockquote, td, th, figcaption {
      overflow-wrap: anywhere !important;
      word-break: normal !important;
    }
  `
  document.head.appendChild(style)
}

function openPaperExportDialog() {
  paperExportError.value = ''
  paperExportDialogOpen.value = true
}

async function exportPaper() {
  if (!paperHtml.value || paperExporting.value) return
  paperExporting.value = true
  paperExportError.value = ''
  try {

@import 'tailwindcss';
@import 'tw-animate-css';

@custom-variant dark (&:is(.dark *));

:root,
.light {
  color-scheme: light;

  --brand-blue: #2563eb;
  --brand-blue-hover: #1d4ed8;
  --link-blue: #2563eb;
  --gray-600: #5f6b7a;
  --white: #ffffff;
  --surface-gray: #f3f4f6;
  --near-black: #0f172a;
  --border-gray: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.07);
  --success-green: #2ba640;
  --warning-orange: #fb8c00;

  --primary: var(--brand-blue);
  --primary-hover: var(--brand-blue-hover);
  --primary-focus: var(--near-black);
  --on-primary: #ffffff;
  --secondary-link: var(--link-blue);
  --brand-secure: var(--gray-600);

  --semantic-success: var(--success-green);
  --semantic-overlay: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45);
  --destructive: #c2410c;
  --destructive-foreground: #ffffff;
  --warning: var(--warning-orange);
  --warning-foreground: #0f0f0f;

  --canvas: #fafafa;
  --surface-1: var(--white);
  --surface-2: var(--surface-gray);
  --surface-3: #eceff3;
  --surface-4: #e2e6ea;
  --hairline: var(--border-gray);
  --hairline-strong: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.11);
  --hairline-tertiary: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.16);

  --ink: var(--near-black);
  --ink-muted: var(--gray-600);
  --ink-subtle: var(--gray-600);
  --ink-tertiary: #8a96a8;

  --inverse-canvas: var(--near-black);
  --inverse-surface-1: #181818;
  --inverse-surface-2: #242424;
  --inverse-ink: var(--white);
  --tag-default: var(--gray-600);
  --on-light: #0f0f0f;
  --on-dark: #ffffff;

  --background: var(--canvas);
  --foreground: var(--ink);
  --card: var(--surface-1);
  --card-foreground: var(--ink);
  --popover: var(--surface-1);
  --popover-foreground: var(--ink);
  --primary-foreground: var(--on-primary);
  --secondary: var(--surface-2);
  --secondary-foreground: var(--ink);
  --muted: var(--surface-2);
  --muted-foreground: var(--ink-subtle);
  --accent: var(--surface-3);
  --accent-foreground: var(--ink);
  --success: var(--semantic-success);
  --success-foreground: #ffffff;
  --border: var(--hairline);
  --input: transparent;
  --ring: var(--near-black);
  --chart-1: var(--near-black);
  --chart-2: var(--brand-blue);
  --chart-3: var(--link-blue);
  --chart-4: var(--success-green);
  --chart-5: var(--warning-orange);
  --sidebar: #f3f4f6;
  --sidebar-rail: #e5e7eb;
  --sidebar-foreground: var(--ink);
  --sidebar-primary: var(--primary);
  --sidebar-primary-foreground: var(--on-primary);
  --sidebar-accent: #ffffff;
  --sidebar-accent-foreground: var(--ink);
  --sidebar-border: var(--hairline);
  --sidebar-ring: var(--primary-focus);

  --logo-bar-1: #0f172a;
  --logo-bar-2: #64748b;
  --logo-bar-3: #2563eb;
  --logo-bar-4: #0f172a;
  --logo-bar-5: #64748b;
  --brand-deep: #0f172a;
  --brand-deep-2: #64748b;

  --font-sans:
    'Roboto', 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', ui-sans-serif, system-ui,
    sans-serif;
  --font-serif: var(--font-sans);
  --font-mono: 'Roboto Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace;
  --font-brand: var(--font-sans);

  --text-caption: 12px;
  --leading-caption: 16px;
  --text-body: 14px;
  --leading-body: 20px;
  --text-subheading: 20px;
  --leading-subheading: 28px;
  --text-heading: 24px;
  --leading-heading: 32px;
  --text-display: 24px;
  --leading-display: 32px;

  --radius-xs: 2px;
  --radius-sm: 4px;
  --radius-md: 10px;
  --radius-lg: 14px;
  --radius-xl: 18px;

''\n   return /^#{1,6}$/.test(lastLine)\n }\n+\n+watch(\n+  renderContent,\n+  () => {\n+    queueMarkdownTableLayout()\n+  },\n+  { flush: 'post' }\n+)\n+onMounted(queueMarkdownTableLayout)\n+onUpdated(queueMarkdownTableLayout)\n+\n+let tableLayoutQueued = false\n+\n+function queueMarkdownTableLayout() {\n+  if (props.inline || tableLayoutQueued) return\n+  tableLayoutQueued = true\n+  void nextTick(() => {\n+    tableLayoutQueued = false\n+    wrapMarkdownTables()\n+  })\n+}\n+\n+function wrapMarkdownTables() {\n+  const root = markdownRoot.value\n+  if (!root) return\n+\n+  for (const table of root.querySelectorAll<HTMLTableElement>('.chat-markdown table')) {\n+    if (table.parentElement?.classList.contains('chat-markdown-table-scroll')) continue\n+\n+    const wrapper = document.createElement('div')\n+    wrapper.className = 'chat-markdown-table-scroll'\n+    table.parentElement?.insertBefore(wrapper, table)\n+    wrapper.appendChild(table)\n+  }\n+}\n </script>\n \n <template>\n-  <MDC\n-    v-if=\"!hasMermaidBlocks\"\n-    :value=\"streamingContent.stable\"\n-    :tag=\"inline ? 'span' : 'div'\"\n-    :unwrap=\"inline ? 'span' : 'div'\" ref=\"markdownRoot\" class=\"min-w-0 max-w-full\">\n+    <MDC\n+      v-if=\"!hasMermaidBlocks\"\n+      :value=\"streamingContent.stable\"\n+      :tag=\"inline ? 'span' : 'div'\"\n+      :unwrap=\"inline ? 'p' : false\"\n+      :partial=\"true\"\n+      :class=\"[markdownBaseClass, markdownContentClass]\"\n+    />\n+\n+    <div v-else class=\"space-y-4\">\n+      <template v-for=\"segment in segments\" :key=\"segment.id\">\n+        <MDC\n+          v-if=\"segment.type === 'markdown'\"\n+          :value=\"segment.content\"\n+          tag=\"div\"\n+          :partial=\"true\"\n+          :class=\"[markdownBaseClass, markdownContentClass]\"\n+        />\n+\n+        <ClientOnly v-else>\n+          <ChatMermaidBlock :chart=\"segment.content\" />\n+        </ClientOnly>\n+      </template>\n+    </div>\n+\n+    <div\n+      v-if=\"streamingContent.tail\"\n+      class=\"chat-markdown whitespace-pre-wrap break-words text-left text-sm leading-7 text-current\"\n+    >\n+      {{ streamingContent.tail }}\n+    </div>\n+  </component>\n </template>\n*** End Patch"
