Output:
<script setup lang="ts">
import ChatMermaidBlock from '~/components/chat/ChatMermaidBlock.client.vue'
import { rewriteMarkdownCodeLinks } from '~/lib/code-links'

type ContentSegment =
  | { id: string; type: 'markdown'; content: string }
  | { id: string; type: 'mermaid'; content: string }

const props = withDefaults(
  defineProps<{
    content: string
    inline?: boolean
    streaming?: boolean
  }>(),
  {
    inline: false,
    streaming: false,
  }
)

const markdownBaseClass =
  'chat-markdown block break-words text-left text-current [&_a]:font-medium [&_a]:underline [&_a]:decoration-current/30 [&_a]:underline-offset-4 hover:[&_a]:decoration-current [&_blockquote]:rounded-lg [&_blockquote]:border [&_blockquote]:border-border/60 [&_blockquote]:bg-muted/35 [&_blockquote]:px-4 [&_blockquote]:py-3 [&_blockquote]:text-current/90 [&_code]:font-mono [&_h1]:text-xl [&_h1]:font-semibold [&_h2]:text-lg [&_h2]:font-semibold [&_h3]:text-base [&_h3]:font-semibold [&_h4]:text-sm [&_h4]:font-semibold [&_hr]:border-border/60 [&_li]:leading-7 [&_li+li]:mt-2 [&_ol]:list-decimal [&_ol]:pl-5 [&_p]:leading-7 [&_strong]:font-semibold [&_table]:w-full [&_table]:border-collapse [&_td]:border [&_td]:border-border/45 [&_td]:px-4 [&_td]:py-3 [&_th]:border [&_th]:border-border/45 [&_th]:bg-muted/25 [&_th]:px-4 [&_th]:py-3 [&_th]:text-left [&_ul]:list-disc [&_ul]:pl-5 [&_:not(pre)>code]:rounded-md [&_:not(pre)>code]:border-0 [&_:not(pre)>code]:bg-muted/35 [&_:not(pre)>code]:px-1 [&_:not(pre)>code]:py-0.5 [&_:not(pre)>code]:text-foreground/78'

const markdownContentClass = computed(() =>
  props.inline
    ? '[&_p]:inline [&_p]:leading-7 [&_ul]:my-2 [&_ol]:my-2'
    : 'text-sm [&_blockquote:not(:first-child)]:mt-4 [&_h1:not(:first-child)]:mt-6 [&_h2:not(:first-child)]:mt-5 [&_h3:not(:first-child)]:mt-4 [&_h4:not(:first-child)]:mt-4 [&_hr:not(:first-child)]:mt-5 [&_ol:not(:first-child)]:mt-4 [&_p:not(:first-child)]:mt-3 [&_pre:not(:first-child)]:mt-4 [&_table:not(:first-child)]:mt-4 [&_ul:not(:first-child)]:mt-4'
)

const markdownRoot = ref<HTMLElement | null>(null)
const { links: codeRepositoryLinks } = useCodeRepositoryLinks()
const renderContent = computed(() =>
  rewriteMarkdownCodeLinks(props.content, codeRepositoryLinks.value)
)
const streamingContent = computed(() =>
  props.streaming && !props.inline
    ? splitStableMarkdownPrefix(renderContent.value)
    : { stable: renderContent.value, tail: '' }
)
const mermaidFencePattern = /```mermaid[ \t]*\r?\n([\s\S]*?)```/g

[... truncated 2 characters ...]

t.querySelectorAll<HTMLTableElement>('.chat-markdown table')) {
    if (table.parentElement?.classList.contains('chat-markdown-table-scroll')) continue

    const wrapper = document.createElement('div')
    wrapper.className = 'chat-markdown-table-scroll'
    table.parentElement?.insertBefore(wrapper, table)
    wrapper.appendChild(table)
  }
}
</script>

<template>
  <component :is="inline ? 'span' : 'div'" ref="markdownRoot" class="min-w-0 max-w-full">
    <MDC
      v-if="!hasMermaidBlocks"
      :value="streamingContent.stable"
      :tag="inline ? 'span' : 'div'"
      :unwrap="inline ? 'p' : false"
      :partial="true"
      :class="[markdownBaseClass, markdownContentClass]"
    />

    <div v-else class="space-y-4">
      <template v-for="segment in segments" :key="segment.id">
        <MDC
          v-if="segment.type === 'markdown'"
          :value="segment.content"
          tag="div"
          :partial="true"
          :class="[markdownBaseClass, markdownContentClass]"
        />

        <ClientOnly v-else>
          <ChatMermaidBlock :chart="segment.content" />
        </ClientOnly>
      </template>
    </div>

    <div
      v-if="streamingContent.tail"
      class="chat-markdown whitespace-pre-wrap break-words text-left text-sm leading-7 text-current"
    >
      {{ streamingContent.tail }}
    </div>
  </component>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import ChatMermaidBlock from '~/components/chat/ChatMermaidBlock.client.vue'
import { rewriteMarkdownCodeLinks } from '~/lib/code-links'

type ContentSegment =
  | { id: string; type: 'markdown'; content: string }
  | { id: string; type: 'mermaid'; content: string }

const props = withDefaults(
  defineProps<{
    content: string
    inline?: boolean
    streaming?: boolean
  }>(),
  {
    inline: false,
    streaming: false,
  }
)

)

    : { stable: renderContent.value, tail: '' }
)
const mermaidFencePattern = /```mermaid[ \t]*\r?\n([\s\S]*?)```/g

<script setup lang="ts">
import type { ScrollAreaRootProps } from 'reka-ui'
import type { HTMLAttributes } from 'vue'
import { reactiveOmit } from '@vueuse/core'
import { ScrollAreaCorner, ScrollAreaRoot, ScrollAreaViewport } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'
import ScrollBar from './ScrollBar.vue'

const props = defineProps<ScrollAreaRootProps & { class?: HTMLAttributes['class'] }>()

const delegatedProps = reactiveOmit(props, 'class')
</script>

<template>
  <ScrollAreaRoot
    data-slot="scroll-area"
    v-bind="delegatedProps"
    :class="cn('relative', props.class)"
  >
    <ScrollAreaViewport
      data-slot="scroll-area-viewport"
      class="focus-visible:ring-ring/50 size-full rounded-[inherit] transition-[color,box-shadow] outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:outline-1"
    >
      <slot />
    </ScrollAreaViewport>
    <ScrollBar />
    <ScrollAreaCorner />
  </ScrollAreaRoot>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import type { ScrollAreaScrollbarProps } from "reka-ui"
import type { HTMLAttributes } from "vue"
import { reactiveOmit } from "@vueuse/core"
import { ScrollAreaScrollbar, ScrollAreaThumb } from "reka-ui"
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

const props = withDefaults(defineProps<ScrollAreaScrollbarProps & { class?: HTMLAttributes["class"] }>(), {
  orientation: "vertical",
})

const delegatedProps = reactiveOmit(props, "class")
</script>

<template>
  <ScrollAreaScrollbar
    data-slot="scroll-area-scrollbar"
    v-bind="delegatedProps"
    :class="
      cn('flex touch-none p-px transition-colors select-none',
         orientation === 'vertical'
           && 'h-full w-2.5 border-l border-l-transparent',
         orientation === 'horizontal'
           && 'h-2.5 flex-col border-t border-t-transparent',
         props.class)"
  >
    <ScrollAreaThumb
      data-slot="scroll-area-thumb"
      class="bg-border relative flex-1 rounded-full"
    />
  </ScrollAreaScrollbar>
</template>

        <div
          class="flex items-center justify-between gap-3 border-b border-border/60 bg-muted/25 px-3 py-2"
        >
          <span class="font-mono text-[11px] font-semibold uppercase text-muted-foreground">
            {{ segment.inputLabel || 'input' }}
          </span>
          <button
            v-if="inputIsLong"
            type="button"
            class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs font-medium text-primary hover:underline"
            @click.stop="inputExpanded = !inputExpanded"
          >
            <component :is="inputExpanded ? ChevronDown : ChevronRight" class="size-3.5" />
            {{ inputExpanded ? 'Collapse' : 'Expand all' }}

        <ScrollArea :class="inputExpanded ? '' : 'max-h-[300px]'">
          <pre
            class="px-3 py-3 font-mono text-[12px] leading-5 whitespace-pre-wrap break-words text-foreground"
          ><span v-if="inputPrompt" class="text-primary">{{ inputPrompt }} </span>{{ visibleInput }}</pre>
        </ScrollArea>
      </div>

      <div class="overflow-hidden rounded-md border border-border/70 bg-background">
        <div
          class="flex items-center justify-between gap-3 border-b border-border/60 bg-muted/25 px-3 py-2"
        >
          <span class="font-mono text-[11px] font-semibold uppercase text-muted-foreground">
                  <span
                    v-if="index === activePlanIndex"
                    class="rounded-full bg-primary/10 px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium text-primary"
                  >
                    Current
                  </span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </li>
          </ol>
        </div>

        <ScrollArea
          v-else-if="visibleOutput"
          :class="outputExpanded ? '' : 'max-h-[120px]'"
        >
          <pre
            class="px-3 py-3 font-mono text-[12px] leading-5 whitespace-pre-wrap break-words text-foreground"
            >{{ visibleOutput }}</pre
          >
        </ScrollArea>
        <div
          v-else-if="hasTerminalOutput"
          class="px-3 py-3 font-mono text-[12px] leading-5 text-muted-foreground"
        >
          {{ segment.status === 'running' ? 'waiting for output...' : '(no output)' }}

<script setup lang="ts">
import type { ScrollAreaRootProps } from 'reka-ui'
import type { HTMLAttributes } from 'vue'
import { reactiveOmit } from '@vueuse/core'
import { ScrollAreaCorner, ScrollAreaRoot, ScrollAreaViewport } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'
import ScrollBar from './ScrollBar.vue'

const props = defineProps<ScrollAreaRootProps & { class?: HTMLAttributes['class'] }>()

const delegatedProps = reactiveOmit(props, 'class')
</script>

<template>
  <ScrollAreaRoot
    data-slot="scroll-area"
    v-bind="delegatedProps"
    :class="cn('relative', props.class)"
  >
    <ScrollAreaViewport
      data-slot="scroll-area-viewport"
      class="focus-visible:ring-ring/50 size-full rounded-[inherit] transition-[color,box-shadow] outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:outline-1"
    >
      <slot />
    </ScrollAreaViewport>
    <ScrollBar />
    <ScrollBar orientation="horizontal" />
    <ScrollAreaCorner />
  </ScrollAreaRoot>
</template>
<script setup lang="ts">
import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area'
</script>

<template>
  <ScrollArea class="chat-markdown-table-scroll">
    <table>
      <slot />
    </table>
  </ScrollArea>
</template>

  hr {
    border: none;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    margin: 1.5rem 0;
  }

  .chat-markdown-table-scroll {
    margin: 1rem 0;
    max-width: 100%;
    overscroll-behavior-x: contain;
    width: 100%;
  }

  .chat-markdown-table-scroll [data-slot='scroll-area-viewport'] {
    overflow-x: auto;
    overflow-y: hidden;
  }

  .chat-markdown-table-scroll:first-child {
    margin-top: 0;
  }

  .chat-markdown-table-scroll:last-child {
    margin-bottom: 0;
  }

  table {
    border-collapse: collapse;
    margin: 0;
    min-width: 100%;
    table-layout: auto;
    width: max-content;
  }

  th,
  td {
    max-width: 36rem;
    min-width: clamp(10rem, 22vw, 18rem);
    overflow-wrap: break-word;
    vertical-align: top;
    white-space: normal;
    word-break: normal;
  }

  th:first-child,
  td:first-child {
    min-width: clamp(12rem, 28vw, 22rem);
  }

  th code,
  td code {
    overflow-wrap: anywhere;
    white-space: break-spaces;
  }
